英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips. Extend one leg straight back, keeping your knee bent and your foot flexed. Slowly lower your hips towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your quads. Hold this position for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch on the other side.
中文描述: 开始四肢着地，双手直接放在肩膀下方，膝盖正好放在臀部下方。一条腿伸直向后，膝盖弯曲，脚弯曲。慢慢将臀部向下放向地面，感受股四头肌的拉伸。保持这个姿势20-30秒。换腿，在另一侧重复拉伸。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip. Rest the barbell on the back of your hands with your palms facing down and your fingers pointing towards your body. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，用过手握法握杠铃。将杠铃放在手背上，手掌朝下，手指指向身体。保持上臂静止，呼气并尽量将手腕向上弯曲。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down. Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索连接到拉索机，设置最高。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索，掌心朝下。双臂完全伸直，肘部微微弯曲。收紧背阔肌，缓慢将绳索向下拉向大腿方向，保持双臂伸直。在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down. Keeping your core engaged and your elbows slightly bent, press the dumbbells up and overhead until your arms are fully extended. Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward. Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，肩高，手掌朝下。保持核心收紧，肘部微弯曲，将哑铃向上并举过头顶，直到双臂完全伸展。旋转手腕，使手掌朝前。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时将手腕旋转回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward. Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，双脚稳固，头部低于臀部。双手各握一个哑铃，双臂直伸至胸前，掌心朝前。哑铃缓慢放到胸部两侧，保持肘部与90度角。将哑铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，双脚稳固，头部低于臀部。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对，双臂伸展于胸前。将哑铃向两侧放下，形成一个宽弧线，直到你感觉胸部有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后收紧胸肌，将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest. Extend your arm straight up, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Lower the dumbbell down towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow close to your body. Press the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，一只手拿着哑铃，放在胸口。手臂直伸向上，肘部微微弯曲。将哑铃向下放向肩膀，肘部靠近身体。将哑铃按回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor. Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个下坡凳以45度角架设。趴在凳上，胸口和腹部靠在凳上。双手各握一个哑铃，双臂完全伸向地面。保持双臂伸直，肩膀尽量抬高到耳朵方向。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting on it. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms fully extended. Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders as high as possible while squeezing your shoulder blades together. Hold the contraction for a brief pause, then lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个下坡凳以45度角摆好。趴在凳上，胸部和腹部靠在上面。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对，双臂完全伸展。保持手臂伸直，尽量抬高肩膀，同时双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。保持收缩短暂停，然后将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core muscles and lift your knees towards your chest, bending at the hips and knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，手掌朝向背向身体，悬挂在引体向上杆上。激活核心肌肉，抬膝向胸前，臀部和膝盖弯曲。动作顶端稍作停顿，收紧腹部。慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso. Exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手张开大于肩宽，握杠铃时用下手握法。保持背部挺直，肘部靠近躯干。呼气，将杠铃向上弯曲，向肩膀方向弯曲，保持上臂保持静止。在顶部稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly in front of the bar. Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，用略宽于肩宽的上握握法握杠铃。将杠铃举至肩高，肘部略微位于杠铃前方。将杠铃按在头顶，双臂完全伸展。将杠铃降回肩高，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps. Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在拉索机上安装V形杆附件，设置最高档位。站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用过握握法握住V型杆，手掌朝下，双手与肩同宽。整个动作过程中肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。在将V型杆向下推时，收紧肱三头肌并呼气，直到手臂完全伸展。动作结束时暂停片刻，收紧肱三头肌。吸气时缓慢将V型杆恢复到起始位置，保持控制。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh, palm facing up. Allow the dumbbell to roll down to your fingertips, then curl it back up by flexing your fingers. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一只手握着哑铃，反手握法，前臂放在大腿上，手掌朝上。让哑铃滚到指尖，然后通过屈曲手指将哑铃卷回去。重复到所需的次数，然后换到另一只手。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs. Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。保持手臂伸直，呼气，将哑铃举起直到与肩平齐。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Slowly lift the dumbbells in front of you, with your arms straight, until they are at shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。保持背部挺直，核心发力。慢慢将哑铃举起，双臂伸直，直到与肩平。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心发力。双臂向两侧举起，肘部保持轻微弯曲，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position. Now, while holding your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干。肘部靠近躯干，手掌旋转直到朝前。这将是你的起始位置。现在，保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收紧肱二头肌。继续加重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。然后，吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到推荐的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height. Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm. Interlace your fingers and press your palms together. Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽。双臂伸直，肩高。双臂交叉，右臂放在左臂上方。双手交叉，掌心合拢。轻轻挤压肩胛骨，向前推手，感受胸部和肩前的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后松开。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 悬挂在引体向上杆上，手掌朝向自己，双手与肩同宽。收紧核心，将身体拉向杠铃，胸部向前。继续拉直到下巴高于杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时跪在地上，膝盖与臀部同宽，脚趾朝前。将杠铃横跨肩膀，用上手握法握住，双手略宽于肩宽。收紧核心，保持胸部抬高，慢慢弯曲膝盖，保持背部挺直。继续放下，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟蹬地回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Place your hands on a wall or stable surface for balance. Slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾朝前。把手放在墙上或稳固的表面以保持平衡。慢慢抬起脚跟，将身体重量抬到脚掌上。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在斜坡凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing forward. Start with your arms fully extended, perpendicular to the ground. Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。坐在长椅上，背靠着垫子，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，双手握法，手掌朝前。开始时，双臂完全伸展，垂直于地面。哑铃缓慢地放到胸部两侧，保持肘部与90度角。在底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在斜凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh. Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbell at shoulder level, palm facing forward. Press the dumbbell upward and slightly inward, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在斜坡凳上，一手拿着哑铃，哑铃放在大腿上。躺在长凳上，将哑铃放在肩膀高度，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上并略微向内按压，手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbells at shoulder level with your palms facing each other. Press the dumbbells up and away from your body until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个倾斜的长凳摆成45度角，双手各握一个哑铃，坐在大腿上。躺在长凳上，将哑铃放在肩膀高度，双手相对。将哑铃向上并远离身体，直到手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides. Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other. Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双手各拿一个哑铃，手掌相对。双脚向前走，身体沿球滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部都被球支撑。哑铃保持在肩膀高度，肘部弯曲并指向两侧。哑铃向上并略微向内按压，保持手掌相对。双臂完全伸展，动作顶端收紧肱三头肌。慢慢把哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit down on the cable pulldown machine and grab the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip. Adjust the knee pad so that your thighs are secured under it. Keep your back straight and lean back slightly. Pull the v-bar down towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body. Squeeze your back muscles at the bottom of the movement. Slowly return the v-bar to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在拉绳机上，用过手握法抓住V形杆连接件。调整膝盖，使大腿固定在下方。保持背部挺直，微微向后倾斜。将V形杆向下拉向上胸部，同时保持肘部靠近身体。动作底部收紧背部肌肉。慢慢将V形杆恢复到起始位置，重复到所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest, palm facing inwards. Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground. Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 一只手拿哑铃，坐在健身球上。双脚向前走，身体向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部都被哑铃支撑。双臂伸直，手掌向内，握住哑铃。慢慢将哑铃放到一侧，肘部保持轻微弯曲。当手臂与地面平行时，暂停片刻。用力胸肌，将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh. Lean back on the bench and use your thigh to help raise the dumbbell to shoulder height. Rotate your wrist so that your palm is facing inward, towards your body. Press the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在斜凳上，一只手拿哑铃，放在大腿上。靠在长凳上，用大腿帮助将哑铃抬到肩膀高度。旋转手腕，使手掌朝内，朝向身体。将哑铃向上并远离身体，手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbell with your palm facing inward and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Press the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, straightening your arm. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，一手拿着哑铃。双脚向前走，身体向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部都支撑在哑铃上。握哑铃时，手掌朝内，肘部弯曲成90度角。将哑铃向天花板方向按压，手臂伸直。将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Lean back on the bench and raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward. Keeping your back against the bench, exhale and raise the dumbbells above your head, fully extending your arms. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在斜凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，双手放在大腿上。向后靠在长凳上，将哑铃举到肩膀高度，手掌朝前。背靠长凳，呼气，将哑铃举过头顶，双臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃降回肩膀高度。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一个倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。坐在长凳上，胸部靠在椅背上，双手各握一个哑铃。双臂直伸，手掌相对。保持肘部微微弯曲，双臂向两侧举起，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Grab a dumbbell in each hand and sit on the bench with your chest against the incline. Extend your arms fully, allowing the dumbbells to hang straight down from your shoulders. Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个斜坡凳以45度角摆好。双手各拿一个哑铃，坐在长凳上，胸部贴着斜坡。双臂完全伸展，让哑铃从肩膀直下垂下。将哑铃拉向胸前，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down. Rest the dumbbells on your thighs and lean back onto the bench. Use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward. Exhale and slowly raise the dumbbells above your head, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个倾斜的长凳摆成45度角，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝下坐下。哑铃放在大腿上，身体向后靠在长凳上。用大腿帮助将哑铃抬到肩膀高度，然后旋转手腕，使手掌朝前。呼气，缓慢将哑铃抬高过头顶，保持肘部微微弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃降回肩膀高度。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Explode upwards, jumping off the ground as high as you can. Land softly on your feet and immediately step back with one leg into a reverse lunge. Lower your body down until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight. Push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat the jump and lunge sequence on the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽，将杠铃横跨上背部。通过弯曲膝盖并向后推臀部，将身体降低到深蹲姿势。向上爆炸，尽可能高地跳起。轻柔落地，立刻用一条腿后退，进入反向弓步。身体往下放，直到前大腿与地面平行，保持背部挺直。用前脚跟用力，回到起始位置。另一条腿重复跳跃和弓步的动作。继续交替做足，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, perpendicular to the floor. Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, forming a 'T' shape with your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一张倾斜的长凳摆成45度角，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内。身体前倾，双臂垂直垂下，垂直于地面。保持手臂伸直，向两侧举起，直到与地面平行，与身体形成“T”字形。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head. Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在斜凳上，双手各拿一个哑铃，手掌朝内。双臂完全伸展过头顶，肘部靠近头部。通过弯曲肘部，保持上臂不动，将哑铃放到头后方。暂停片刻，然后伸展双臂将哑铃抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Lean forward slightly and let your arms hang straight down, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Raise your arms out to the sides and up in a Y shape until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一张倾斜的长凳摆成45度角，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内。微微前倾，手臂垂直，肘部保持微微弯曲。将手臂向两侧伸展，向上呈Y字形，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg. Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，身体下沉。用右脚跟用力，回到起始位置。左腿重复。根据需要的重复次数交替进行。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell in an arc behind your head until your forearms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then contract your triceps to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地面，头放在长凳末端。双手握住哑铃，双臂直伸至胸前，掌心相对。保持上臂静止，慢慢将哑铃以弧形向下放到头后，直到前臂与地面平行。暂停片刻，然后收紧肱三头肌，将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up over your chest. Lower the dumbbells towards your shoulders by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position by extending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，双手各拿一个哑铃，手掌相对，双臂直伸过胸前。通过弯曲肘部，保持上臂静止，将哑铃向肩膀方向降低。在底部暂停片刻，然后伸展肘部将哑铃按回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing inwards. Extend your arm straight down towards the floor, keeping it close to your body. Raise your arm up and back, squeezing your shoulder blade towards your spine. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 趴在平坦的长凳上，一手拿着哑铃，手掌朝内。将手臂直伸向地面，保持靠近身体。抬起手臂，向后收紧肩胛骨向脊柱。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your back supported and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet. Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Slowly lower the dumbbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，背部支撑，双脚平放在地上。一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝向脚下。手臂直伸向天花板，肘部微微弯曲。慢慢将哑铃放下，靠近胸部，保持肘部靠近身体。在底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing down, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder. Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，背部和头部支撑，双脚平放在地上。一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝下，手臂直伸过肩膀。保持上臂不动，慢慢将哑铃放到头后，弯曲肘部。在底部暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder. Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，背部和头部支撑，双脚平放在地上。一只手握哑铃，下手握法，手臂直直向上伸过肩膀。保持上臂不动，慢慢将哑铃放到头后，弯曲肘部。在底部暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the ball. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，向前滚动直到上背部靠在健身球上。双手握哑铃，双臂直上伸展过胸口。慢慢将哑铃放到头后，同时保持手臂伸直。停顿片刻，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，并将杠铃放在上背部。用小腿抬起脚跟，尽量抬高离地。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a wide reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in and your wrists straight. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴着长凳。用宽的反握握法握杠铃，间距略大于肩宽。把杠铃从架子上抬起，双臂完全伸展，直接举在胸口上方。杠铃慢慢向下放向胸部，保持肘部内收，手腕保持笔直。当杠铃碰到胸部时暂停片刻，然后再推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm fully extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbell in a controlled manner towards your forehead, keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，一只手拿着哑铃，手臂完全伸展在胸前。将哑铃以有控制的方式向额头放下，保持上臂保持静止。动作结束时短暂停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your legs extended and your arms by your sides, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Rotate your palms to face up, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, squeezing your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺在地板上，双腿伸直，双臂垂在身侧，双手各握一个哑铃。手掌旋转朝上，肘部靠近身体两侧。慢慢将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，收紧前臂。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Lower the dumbbells down towards your forehead, bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。双臂直伸过胸前，肘部紧贴身体。将哑铃向下压向额头，弯曲肘部。暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续加重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball. Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards. Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，一手拿着哑铃，双脚平放在地上。双脚向前走，身体向下滚动，直到上背部靠在健身球上。伸直手臂，哑铃直举胸前方，手掌向内。慢慢将哑铃放到一侧，肘部保持轻微弯曲。暂停片刻，然后收紧胸肌，将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站立时双脚比肩宽宽还宽，脚趾稍微向外。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在斜方肌或后三角肌上。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，身体下蹲，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。往下放，直到大腿与地面平行，或者尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟蹬地回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg. Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。右脚向前迈一步，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。双膝弯曲，身体向下，直到右大腿与地面平行。用右脚跟用力回归起始位置。左腿重复。交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。双臂直伸，肘部微微弯曲。保持肘部微微弯曲，双臂向两侧放下，形成一个宽弧线，直到感觉胸部有拉伸感。暂停片刻，然后反向动作，将哑铃抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary. Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一手握着哑铃，手掌朝上，肘部弯曲成90度角。手臂直伸向天花板，保持肘部不动。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your other hand on your hip for stability. Press the dumbbell upwards, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚平放在地上，背部挺直，坐在健身球上。一只手握着哑铃，手掌向内，肘部弯曲成90度。另一只手放在臀部以保持稳定。将哑铃向上按压，手臂完全伸展。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down. Extend your arm fully, letting it hang straight down towards the floor. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 趴在平坦的长凳上，一只手拿哑铃，手掌朝下。手臂完全伸展，让它直垂向地面。保持上臂不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在哑铃顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended. Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 趴在平坦的长凳上，一手拿哑铃，手掌朝向身体，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂不动，哑铃向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell with one hand and extend your arm straight up above your chest. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arm straight. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲成90度。单手握住哑铃，手臂直伸到胸前。慢慢将哑铃放到头后方，同时保持手臂伸直。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, palm facing down. Rest your forearm on your thigh, with your wrist hanging off the edge. Slowly lower the dumbbell towards the ground by flexing your wrist. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly curl your wrist back up towards your body. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地上。一只手握哑铃，手掌朝下，双手握着。前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬在边缘。通过弯曲手腕，慢慢将哑铃向下放下。在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手腕向身体方向弯曲。重复到所需的次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，身体挺直，站在两根平行杠之间。弯曲肘部，使上臂与地面平行。暂停片刻，然后伸直手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Rest your upper arms on the incline bench and let your elbows hang down, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一张倾斜的长凳摆成45度角，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将上臂放在斜凳上，肘部下垂，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Jump up explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles. While in mid-air, quickly bring your feet together. Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately drop back into a squat position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，向后推臀部，将身体降低为深蹲姿势。爆发性地跳起，伸展臀部、膝盖和脚踝。在空中时，迅速将双脚并拢。轻轻着地，脚掌着地，立即回到深蹲姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards. Lean forward and place your free hand on the bench for support. Keep your arm slightly bent and raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝内。身体前倾，空着的手放在长凳上支撑。保持手臂微微弯曲，向一侧抬起直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and grip the handles of the leverage machine. Keep your back straight and your feet flat on the ground. Exhale and squeeze the handles, contracting your forearms. Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly release and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，握紧杠杆机的把手。保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。呼气，握紧把手，收紧前臂。保持收缩一秒钟，然后慢慢松开，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up. Rest your forearm on your thigh, allowing your wrist to hang off the edge. Keeping your forearm stationary, curl your wrist upward as far as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrist back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝上。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬挂在边缘。保持前臂不动，手腕尽可能向上弯曲。在顶部暂停片刻，然后慢慢将手腕放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数，然后换到另一只手。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 站直，一手拿哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并向上弯曲重量，同时收紧肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干。肘部靠近躯干，上臂保持静止。呼气，同时收紧肱二头肌，同时弯曲哑铃。继续加重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on the bench for support. Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your upper arm close to your head and your elbow pointing forward. Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary. Extend your arm back up to the starting position, fully straightening your elbow. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，背挺直，双脚平放在地上。一只手拿哑铃，另一只手放在长凳上支撑。将哑铃举过头顶，保持上臂靠近头部，肘部朝前。将哑铃放到头后，肘部弯曲，保持上臂静止。将手臂伸回起始位置，肘部完全伸直。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上。将前臂放在长凳上，让手腕悬挂在边缘。保持上臂静止，呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down. Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝下。将前臂放在长凳上，让手腕悬挂在边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将哑铃拉向身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your forearms resting on the bench and your palms facing up, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Allow your wrists to hang over the edge of the bench. Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，前臂搭在凳上，手掌朝上，双手各握一个哑铃。让手腕悬挂在长凳边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，动作顶端用力收紧前臂。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将手腕放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position. Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干。保持肘部靠近躯干，旋转手掌直到朝前。这就是你的起始姿势。现在保持上臂不动，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至推荐次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一只手握着哑铃，反手握持，肘部放在健身球上。保持上臂不动，呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端暂停片刻，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head until you feel a stretch in your chest and shoulders. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，头在一端，双脚踩地。双手握住哑铃，双臂直伸至胸前。保持肘部微微弯曲，慢慢将哑铃放到头后，直到感觉胸部和肩膀有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level. Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead. Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，保持肩平。膝盖微微弯曲，身体向下倾斜，然后爆发性地伸展双腿，将哑铃压在头顶。动作顶端锁定双臂，然后将哑铃放回肩部高度。重复直到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。双臂向两侧展开，肘部略微弯曲，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。双臂向两侧举起，肘部保持轻微弯曲，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step backward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Bend your left knee and lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。右脚向后迈步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。左膝弯曲，身体向下，直到左大腿与地面平行。暂停片刻，然后用左脚跟力推回起始位置。反侧重复，左脚后退。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance. Position the bar behind your head, resting on your upper traps. Keep your core engaged and your chest lifted throughout the exercise. Press the bar overhead by extending your arms, fully straightening them. Pause briefly at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整铁匠机的座椅高度，使杠铃与肩平。双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握法握杠铃，宽度略大于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起，后退，保持站姿稳定。将杠铃放在头后，靠在上斜方肌上。整个动作过程中保持核心收紧，胸部抬高。伸展双臂，完全伸直，将杠铃压过头顶。动作顶端短暂停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手张开比肩宽还宽，握杠铃时用过手握法。让杠铃悬挂在大腿前方，双臂完全伸展。保持背部挺直，呼气，将杠铃直举到下巴方向，肘部先发力。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Position yourself on parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，身体挺直，站在双杠上。通过弯曲肘部，使肩膀低于肘部，降低身体。通过伸直手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart. Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height. Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight. Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
中文描述: 站在墙上，双脚与臀部同宽。双手放在墙上，与肩膀高度齐平。单脚后退，脚跟踩地，腿伸直。稍微弯曲前膝并向前倾，感受小腿的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒。换腿，重复拉伸动作。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground. Hold the dumbbell at shoulder level with your palm facing forward. Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，一只手拿着哑铃，双脚平放在地上。哑铃保持在肩膀高度，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝下，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续加重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing your body. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Let your arms hang straight down, fully extended, with a slight bend in your elbows. Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双手各握一个哑铃，双手握法，手掌朝向身体。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。让手臂直直垂下，完全伸展，肘部略微弯曲。把哑铃拉向胸口，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you contract your biceps. Continue to curl the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长椅上，上臂搭在垫子上，胸部靠着支撑。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上握。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续弯举哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢把哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your knees to bend slightly. Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then push through your heels and engage your glutes to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，采用过顶握法。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，髋部铰链，哑铃向下放下，让膝盖稍微弯曲。把哑铃放低，直到你感觉到腿后肌有拉伸感，然后用力用脚跟，收紧臀肌，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Push back up to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, extending the opposite arm out to the side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽。一只手臂伸直，平行于地面，向侧面伸出。弯曲肘部，保持背部挺直，核心收紧，身体向下。推回起始位置。另一侧重复，将对侧臂伸向侧面。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，背部和头部支撑，双脚平放在地面。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor. Rotate your arms so that your palms are facing downwards. Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。双臂向两侧举起，肘部保持轻微弯曲，直到与地面平行。旋转双臂，使手掌朝下。慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲。用下手握法握杠铃，手掌朝上，双手与肩同宽。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬在边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将杠铃靠近前臂。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and arms extended down by your sides. Keeping your arms straight, raise one dumbbell in front of you until it is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体，双臂向下伸展。保持双臂伸直，将一只哑铃举到与地面平行。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。另一只手臂重复。交替换双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press one dumbbell up overhead, fully extending your arm. Lower the dumbbell back down to shoulder height. Repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将哑铃举到肩膀高度，肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。将一个哑铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。将哑铃降回肩膀高度。另一只手臂重复。继续交替双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle. Keeping your elbows bent, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体，双臂弯曲成90度角。保持肘部弯曲，双臂向两侧举起，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your elbows close to your sides, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Once your forearms are vertical, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward. Press the dumbbells overhead until your arms are fully extended. Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展。保持肘部靠近身体两侧，将哑铃向肩膀方向弯曲。前臂竖直后，旋转手腕，使手掌朝前。将哑铃按压在头顶，直到双臂完全伸展。反向将哑铃放回起始位置，动作反向。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the bar for stability. Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。把杠铃夹在肘部弯曲处，双手握住杠铃以保持稳定。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，同时将臀部向后放下，进入深蹲姿势。保持膝盖与脚趾对齐，体重放在脚跟上。深蹲底部暂停片刻，然后用力用脚跟回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs. Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface such as a step or block, with your heels hanging off the edge. Hold onto the dumbbell for stability. Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地上，哑铃放在大腿上。将脚掌放在高处，如台阶或滑块，脚跟悬在边缘。握紧哑铃以保持稳定。将脚跟尽可能抬高，将身体重量抬到脚掌上。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso. Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。保持背部挺直，肘部靠近躯干。呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Raise the dumbbells in front of you, with your palms facing down, until they are at shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，哑铃放在大腿上。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将哑铃举到前方，手掌朝下，直到与肩平齐。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，哑铃放在大腿上。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将哑铃举向身体两侧，肘部微微弯曲，直到双臂与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，哑铃放在大腿上。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将哑铃举向身体两侧，肘部微微弯曲，直到双臂与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down. Keeping your wrists in a neutral position, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。前臂放在大腿上，让哑铃垂下。保持手腕中立，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Bend your torso forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground. Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，一只手握着哑铃。腰部向前弯曲躯干，保持背部笔直且与地面平行。手臂向后伸直，肘部靠近身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your right thigh. Extend your left leg straight out in front of you, keeping your foot flexed. Place the ball of your right foot on an elevated surface, such as a step or weight plate. Using your calf muscles, raise your right heel as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地上，哑铃放在右大腿上。左腿伸直向前，保持脚部弯曲。将右脚的脚掌放在高处，如踏板或负重板。用小腿肌肉，将右脚跟尽可能抬高。在脚跟顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place it on top of your thigh, palm facing up. Lift one leg off the ground and extend it in front of you, keeping your knee slightly bent. Raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。一只手握着哑铃，放在大腿上方，手掌朝上。抬起一条腿，向前伸展，膝盖微微弯曲。通过用脚掌球顶起，尽量抬高脚跟。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟放下。重复到所需次数，然后换腿重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Reach down towards your toes with your hands, keeping your legs as straight as possible. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，双臂垂在身侧。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。用手伸向脚趾，尽量保持双腿笔直。在底部稍作停留，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other. Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm. Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双手握住绳子的一端，手掌相对。将手臂抬到肩膀高度，肘部保持微微弯曲。开始用绳子交替制造波浪，快速上下每只手臂。继续练习所需的时长或重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双手各拿一个哑铃，哑铃放在大腿上。将哑铃举到肩膀高度，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回肩高。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双手各拿一个哑铃，手掌朝内。将哑铃抬到肩膀高度，肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回肩高。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up overhead. Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears. Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。双手握住哑铃，双臂直伸过头顶。弯曲肘部，将哑铃放到头后，保持上臂靠近耳朵。稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Keep your arms straight and let the dumbbells hang by your sides. Raise your shoulders as high as possible, as if you are trying to touch your ears with your shoulders. Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持手臂伸直，哑铃垂挂在身体两侧。尽量抬高肩膀，就像用肩膀碰耳朵一样。保持收缩一秒钟，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, letting it hang down by your side. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend sideways at the waist towards the opposite side of the dumbbell, lowering the weight as far as you comfortably can. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，一手握着哑铃，让它垂在身侧。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，慢慢从腰部侧弯，朝向哑铃的另一侧，尽量降低重量。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的次数，然后换边重复。

英文描述: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm. Hold a dumbbell in your top hand with your palm facing down. Keeping your arm straight, raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 侧卧，双腿伸直，头部由手臂支撑。用上手握着哑铃，手掌朝下。保持手臂伸直，将哑铃举到肩高。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand. Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm. Engage your core and keep your back straight as you walk forward, maintaining the dumbbell overhead. Continue walking for the desired distance or time. Switch hands and repeat the exercise.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，一手握着哑铃。将哑铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。向前走时收紧核心，保持背部挺直，哑铃举在头顶。继续走到目标距离或时间。换手重复动作。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Extend one leg forward and keep it off the ground throughout the exercise. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。动作中，向前伸出一条腿，保持离地。弯曲站立腿，身体放下，像坐回椅子上一样。保持胸膛挺直，背部挺直。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，放在身体两侧。保持胸部抬起并收紧核心，膝盖和臀部弯曲身体，就像坐在椅子上一样。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips. Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged. Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot. Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements. Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise. Continue for the desired distance or time.
中文描述: 开始时四肢着地，双手直接放在肩膀下方，膝盖正好放在臀部下方。膝盖略微抬离地面，保持背部平坦，核心收紧。右手和左脚同时向前移动，然后左手和右脚也在前。继续向前爬行，交替使用手脚动作。保持稳定的节奏，保持核心紧绷。持续到所需的距离或时间。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the backrest and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing inwards. Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the dumbbells slowly towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一个倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。坐在长凳上，背靠靠背，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内。双臂直伸至胸前，肘部保持轻微弯曲。哑铃缓慢地向肩膀放下，肘部靠近身体。在底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃按回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides with each repetition.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前倾斜，保持背部挺直。双臂向后伸直，肘部靠近身体。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。另一只手臂重复，每次重复时交替侧卧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Extend your arms straight out to the sides at shoulder height, palms facing down. Keeping your arms straight, slowly rotate your arms in a circular motion, bringing the dumbbells in front of your body and then overhead. Continue the circular motion, bringing the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。双臂伸直，双臂伸直，肩高，手掌朝下。保持手臂伸直，缓慢旋转手臂做圆周运动，将哑铃移到身体前方，然后举过头顶。继续做圆周运动，将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。用小腿的力量将脚跟尽可能抬离地面。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。双臂向后伸直，在动作顶端收紧三头肌。稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand. Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm. Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手拿着哑铃。将哑铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂靠近头部，且垂直于地面。慢慢将哑铃放到头后，弯曲肘部。停顿片刻，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip. Keep your arm fully extended and close to your body, with your palm facing down. Slowly curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，一手握哑铃，采用过顶握法。保持手臂完全伸展并贴近身体，手掌朝下。慢慢将哑铃向肩膀方向弯曲，保持上臂保持不动。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your arm straight. Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm stationary. Extend your arm back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着哑铃。将哑铃举过头顶，保持手臂伸直。弯曲肘部，将哑铃放到头后，保持上臂不动。把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface. Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the bench or step, straightening your right leg. Bring your left foot up onto the bench or step, standing fully upright. Step back down with your left foot, followed by your right foot, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 站在长凳或台阶前，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。将右脚放在长凳或台阶上，确保整只脚都与地面接触。用右脚跟用力，抬起身体上长凳或台阶，伸直右腿。将左脚抬到长凳或台阶上，站直。左脚再踏下，右脚再落地，回到起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, holding a barbell with an underhand grip. Allow the barbell to roll down to your fingertips, keeping your wrists straight. Slowly curl the barbell up towards your forearms by flexing your wrists. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，前臂搭在大腿上，用下手握法握杠铃。让杠铃顺着指尖滚动，保持手腕笔直。通过弯曲手腕，慢慢将杠铃向前臂弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. While keeping your arms extended, lift your hips off the ground, squeezing your glutes and engaging your core. Lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，哑铃放在大腿上。慢慢地将脚向前移动，将健身球顺着背部滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部都被球支撑。双手握住哑铃，双臂直伸过胸前，肘部保持轻微弯曲。将哑铃放到头后，保持手臂伸直并保持控制。停顿片刻，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。保持双臂伸展的同时，抬起臀部离地，收紧臀肌并收紧核心。将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Interlace your fingers behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Slowly squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat as desired.
中文描述: 站得笔直，双脚与肩同宽。双手交叉放在头后，肘部朝外。慢慢将肩胛骨挤压，胸部向前推。保持拉伸15-30秒。松开拉伸，然后按需要重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms straight down in front of you, palms facing each other. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。双臂直伸，掌心相对。保持肘部微微弯曲，双臂向两侧伸展，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides. Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface. Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well. Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step. Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time. Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在台阶或平台前，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身侧。右脚踩在台阶上，确保整只脚都贴在台阶上。用右脚跟用力，身体抬起台阶，同时左脚也抬起。双脚都踩在台阶上后，左脚放回起始位置，右脚保持在台阶上。重复这个动作，每次轮换用哪只脚踩上台阶。继续练习到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc-like motion. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，头放在一端，双脚稳稳踩地。双手握哑铃，双臂伸直至胸前。保持手臂伸直，缓慢将哑铃以弧形动作放到头后。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your torso to lean forward. Continue lowering the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, keeping your knees slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，采用上手握法。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，臀部弯曲，哑铃向下放下，让躯干前倾。继续放下哑铃，直到感觉腿后肌腱有拉伸感，保持膝盖微微弯曲。在底部稍作停顿，然后收紧臀肌和腿后肌，将躯干抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，分别放在两侧。保持胸部抬起并收紧核心，慢慢弯曲膝盖，将臀部向后推，身体缓慢下降。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用力用脚跟回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from you. Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back down to shoulder height.
