英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level. Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest. Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，胸部高度握着药球。向前伸出双臂，将药球从胸前推开。停顿片刻，然后慢慢将药球收回胸前。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，调整杠杆机的位置。用下手握住手柄，手掌朝上。将上臂放在讲道垫上，确保肘部完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气，将把手向肩膀弯曲。动作结束时停顿片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将手柄放回起始位置，肘部完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板位置以确保正确对齐。坐在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚平放在脚踏板上。用下手握住手柄，手掌朝上。保持背部挺直，核心肌群发力。把手柄拉向胸口，双肩胛骨紧贴。动作顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开并伸展双臂回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your lats and biceps, and pull yourself up towards the handles. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your back muscles. Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将机器调整到你想要的体重和身高设置。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握把，略宽于肩宽。用力你的背阔肌和肱二头肌，把自己拉向把手。在顶端停顿片刻，收紧背部肌肉。慢慢地把自己放回起始的位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air. Bend your knees and cross your ankles. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，身体悬浮在空中，站在两根平行杠之间。弯曲膝盖，交叉脚踝。通过弯曲肘部，使上臂与地面平行，降低身体。停顿片刻，然后伸直手臂，将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles or place your hands on the side pads for support. Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the pad to move with you. Once your upper body is at a 45-degree angle, contract your abs and crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在杠杆机上，背部贴着垫子，双脚平放在地板上。握紧手柄或将手放在侧垫上以提供支撑。收紧腹肌，慢慢向后倾斜，让垫子随你移动。当上半身呈45度角时，收紧腹肌并向前收缩，将胸部向膝盖收紧。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured under the footpads. Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the seat for support. Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs. Slowly return to the starting position, allowing your back to round slightly. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在杠杆机上，背部贴着垫子，双脚固定在脚垫下。双手放在座椅把手或侧面以获得支撑。收紧腹肌，缓慢向前挺身，胸部靠近膝盖。动作结束时暂停片刻，收紧腹部。慢慢回到起始姿势，让背部稍微弯曲。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with a pronated grip and keep your elbows slightly bent. Exhale and push the handles forward, bringing them together in front of your chest. Pause for a moment, squeezing your chest muscles. Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, allowing your chest muscles to stretch. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部贴着垫子，将自己放在机器上。用内旋握法握住把手，保持肘部微微弯曲。呼气，将把手向前推，将它们合拢到胸前。暂停片刻，收紧胸肌。吸气，缓慢回到起始姿势，让胸肌伸展。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height so that your hips are slightly higher than your knees. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the footrests. Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability. Keeping your back straight, slowly lean forward from your hips until your upper body is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your glutes and hamstrings. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，使臀部略高于膝盖。坐在机器上，背部贴着垫子，双脚平放在脚踏板上。握住座椅的把手或侧面以保持稳定。保持背部挺直，慢慢从臀部向前倾，直到上半身与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后通过臀部和腿后肌腱的推进，慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest. Place your lower legs under the padded lever, just above your ankles. Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support. Keeping your upper legs stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings. Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整器械以适应你的身体，然后背靠靠背坐下。将小腿放在有垫的杠杆下方，刚好在脚踝上方。握住机器侧面的把手以提供支撑。保持大腿保持不动，呼气并尽量将双腿卷曲。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧腿后腱。吸气，缓慢地将杠杆放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests. Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability. Engage your abs and slowly raise your legs up towards your chest, curling your torso forward at the same time. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and torso back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在杠杆机上，背靠靠背，双脚放在脚踏板上。握住把手或侧杆以保持稳定。收紧腹部，慢慢抬起双腿向胸前，同时将躯干向前弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿和躯干放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent. Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，将自己放在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚平放在地板上。用上手握把，保持手臂微微弯曲。呼气，将肩胛骨紧紧收紧，同时将手柄向后并向外拉离身体。在收缩峰值处暂停片刻，然后吸气，慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground. Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm over your left arm. Interlock your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body. Slowly raise your arms up and away from your body, feeling a stretch in your back and chest. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the opposite side.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽。双臂伸直，平行于地面。双臂交叉放在身体前方，右臂覆盖在左臂上方。双手交叉，手掌旋转离身体。慢慢将手臂抬起并远离身体，感受背部和胸部的拉伸。保持拉伸15-30秒，然后松开。反侧重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly closer than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows close to your body. Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手略近于肩宽，握杠铃时保持略近于肩宽。将杠铃举到肩高，肘部紧贴身体。将杠铃压在头顶，双臂完全伸展。将杠铃放回肩高。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。一只手握着哑铃，手掌相对，保持中性握法。肘部放在大腿内侧，膝盖上方。保持上臂不动，呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整杠杆机的座椅高度和靠背，使其舒适。坐在机器上，背靠靠背，双脚平放在地板上。用过手握把，稍宽于肩宽。把手柄向上和向前推，直到手臂完全伸展但不锁住。在顶部稍作停留，然后慢慢将手柄放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight. Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部贴着垫子，将自己放在杠杆机上。用过握握把手，保持手臂伸直。保持背部挺直，肩膀尽量抬高，朝向耳朵方向。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to your height and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place your shoulders under the pads and hold onto the handles for stability. Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整机器以适应你的高度，双脚与肩同宽站立。把肩膀放在垫子下面，握住把手以保持稳定。通过伸展脚踝，尽可能抬高脚跟。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板位置以确保正确对齐。坐在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚平放在脚踏板上。用过手握把，略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心肌群发力。把把手拉向躯干，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在收缩峰值时暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，将自己放在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚平放在地板上。用过手握把，略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心肌群发力。把手柄拉向胸口，双肩胛骨紧贴。动作顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开并伸展双臂回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and fully extend your arms in front of you. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the handles towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部贴着垫子坐好。用过手握把手，双臂完全伸展到身前。保持上臂不动，慢慢弯曲肘部，将手柄向额头方向下移。在底部暂停片刻，然后伸展双臂将手柄推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your back straight. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，并朝向机器坐好。用过握握把手，保持背部挺直。把手柄拉向身体，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在动作达到顶点时暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开并伸展手臂回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and jump backwards, pushing off with both feet. Land softly on the balls of your feet, bending your knees to absorb the impact. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。膝盖微微弯曲，向后跳，双脚用力推开。轻轻着地，弯曲膝盖吸收冲击。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward. As you curl up, twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time twisting your torso to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。躺在长椅上，双脚被脚垫固定住。双手放在头后或胸前。收紧腹肌，抬起上半身，向前弯曲。当你蜷缩时，将躯干向一侧扭转，肘部朝向对侧膝盖。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始姿势。重复这个动作，这次将躯干扭向另一侧。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your arms by your sides, palms facing down. Engage your glutes and core, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes. Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双臂放在身体两侧，手掌朝下。用力臀部和核心肌群，然后抬起臀部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶部停顿片刻，收紧臀部。慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a fixed point above you, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam. Sit down on a bench or chair facing the band, with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Grasp the band with a close grip, palms facing towards you. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats. Slowly release the band back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在你上方的固定点上，比如引体向上杆或坚固的横梁。坐在长凳或椅子上，面向乐队，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲。紧握带子，手掌朝向自己。保持背部挺直，核心肌群发力。将胸围拉下，将肩胛骨紧贴。动作结束时停顿片刻，感受背阔肌的收缩。缓慢地将弹力带放回起始位置，保持整个动作的控制。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. As you lunge, twist your torso to the right, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping forward with your left foot and twisting your torso to the left. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立，双脚与肩同宽。右脚向前迈一步，身体降低进入弓步姿势。弓步时，将躯干向右扭转，左肘靠近右膝。暂停片刻，然后回到起始位置。反向重复，左脚向前迈步，躯干向左扭转。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee. At the same time, extend your right leg straight out and lift it off the ground. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and extending your left leg. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。收紧腹肌，抬起上半身，右肘向左膝靠近。同时，右腿伸直并抬离地面。稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。重复动作，这次左肘朝右膝，左腿伸直。继续交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a flat bench with your back pressed against it. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Keep your legs straight and together, and lift them up towards the ceiling. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在平坦的长凳上，背部贴着它。双手放在臀大肌下方支撑。保持双腿伸直并拢，抬向天花板。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸展，双臂放在身体两侧。双手放在臀大肌下方支撑。收紧核心，抬起双腿，朝向天花板。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部贴近垫子，将自己放在机器上。用过手握把，肘部呈90度角。将手柄向前推，直到手臂完全伸展，动作中呼气。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置，同时吸气。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable pulley to a high position and attach a straight bar. Sit facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Pull the bar down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将滑轮调整到高位，并固定一根直杆。坐着面向滑轮机，双脚平放在地上，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握住杠铃，略宽于肩宽。稍微向后倾斜，保持胸部抬起，保持下背部轻微拱起。将杠铃向下拉向胸部，肘部先行，肩胛骨紧拢。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands gripping the kettlebells and your feet hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels. Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手握住壶铃，双脚与髋部同宽。收紧核心，保持身体从头到脚跟的直线。将一个壶铃拉向胸口，肘部靠近身体。将壶铃放回起始位置，另一只手臂重复。继续交替双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level. Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest with force. As you release the ball, follow through with your arms and torso, transferring your weight from your back foot to your front foot. Catch the ball as it rebounds off the wall or partner, and immediately repeat the movement. Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将药球放在胸前。双臂向前伸出，用力将药球从胸前推开。放球时，用手臂和躯干继续动作，将重心从后脚转移到前脚。球弹到墙壁或搭档时接住，立即重复该动作。继续完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine. Grasp the rope with both hands and extend your arms overhead. Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary. Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳子系在高滑轮上，背对机器站立。双手握紧绳索，双臂伸直。保持肘部靠近头部，上臂保持静止。慢慢地弯曲肘部，将绳子放到头后。暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a 3 point stance with one hand on the medicine ball and the other hand on the ground. Extend your legs and position your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground while keeping your back straight. Push the medicine ball away from your body, extending your arm fully. Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从三点站姿开始，一手握药球，一手撑地。伸直双腿，身体保持直线。胸部向下贴地，同时保持背部挺直。将药球推离身体，完全伸展手臂。回到起始位置，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手放在药球上，肩宽。通过弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，身体向下。推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip (palms facing towards you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用下手握法抓住引体向上杠铃（手掌朝向自己），双手略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，双脚离地悬挂在杠铃上。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，胸部先行。继续拉，直到下巴高于杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置，保持控制。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet hip-width apart. Lower your body towards the ground, bending your elbows and keeping your core engaged. As you lower your body, shift your weight back and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, creating an inverted V shape with your body. Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground, then reverse the movement, pushing your hips back down and extending your arms to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚与臀部同宽。身体向下贴地，弯曲肘部，保持核心收紧。当你降低身体时，将重心往后移，臀部抬起向天花板，形成倒V形。继续降低身体直到胸部刚好离地，然后反向移动，将臀部往下推，双臂伸展回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Lower your body down towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Once your elbows are at a 90-degree angle, lower your forearms to the ground, keeping your elbows directly under your shoulders. Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to lift your forearms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手直接放在肩膀下方，身体保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，身体向下降低。当肘部与肩膀成90度角时，将前臂放向地面，肘部保持正下方。稍作停顿，然后用手掌撑起，将前臂抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height. Kneel down in front of the cable machine and grab the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Sit back on your heels, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the bar towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一根直杠挂在拉力机上，位置与胸高。跪在拉力机前，双手与肩同宽，用上手握住杠铃。坐回脚跟，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将杠铃拉向上腹部，双肩胛骨紧贴。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢松开杠铃回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Place your hands on the ground slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, with your feet elevated on a stable surface. Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core muscles. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双手稍微宽于肩宽，双脚放在稳定的地面上。保持身体从头到脚直线，核心肌群发动。弯曲肘部，将胸部贴近地面。用手掌撑开双臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the kettlebell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet and your arm extended straight up towards the ceiling. Slowly lower the kettlebell towards your chest by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm close to your body. Pause for a moment when the kettlebell is just above your chest, then push it back up to the starting position by extending your elbow. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 仰躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面。一手握壶铃，手掌朝向脚部，手臂直伸向天花板。慢慢将壶铃向下放向胸部，弯曲肘部，保持上臂贴近身体。壶铃刚好在胸口上方时暂停片刻，然后伸展肘部将壶铃推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Place a resistance band around your ankles. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees. Take a step to the side with your right foot, maintaining tension on the resistance band. Follow with your left foot, stepping to the side to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 在脚踝上绑上阻力带。双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。右脚向一侧迈步，保持阻力带的张力。左脚跟上，侧步回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you. Continue pulling yourself up until your chest is above the bar and your arms are fully flexed. Reverse the movement by slowly lowering yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，手掌朝向背向杠铃，双臂完全伸展，悬挂在引体向上杠铃上。收紧核心，将身体拉向杠铃，胸部先行。达到动作顶点时，将握法转换到手掌朝向自己。继续拉自己，直到胸部高出杠铃，双臂完全屈曲。反向移动，缓慢地将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a plank position with your forearms on the ground and elbows directly below your shoulders. Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从平板支撑姿势开始，前臂贴地，肘部正好放在肩膀下方。收紧核心，保持身体从头到脚的直线。通过弯曲肘部，将胸部靠近地面，保持靠近身体。在底部稍作停顿，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the ball, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe. Lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将稳定球放在地上，双手握球，保持俯卧撑姿势，略窄于肩宽。收紧核心，保持身体从头到脚保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体，将胸部向下贴近球。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the barbell with an overhand grip. Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双脚与肩同宽站立，并用上握握法握住杠铃。将杠铃举过头顶，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂靠近头部，肘部弯曲，慢慢将杠铃放到头后。稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body. Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.
中文描述: 站立时背对长凳或椅子，双脚与肩同宽。一只手放在身后的长椅或椅子上，手指指向身体方向。双腿向前伸直，脚跟保持着地。弯曲手肘，身体向下，背部贴近长椅或椅子。在底部稍作停顿，然后用手掌撑直手臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧，另一只手臂重复。

英文描述: Attach the ankle cuff to your ankle and stand facing the cable machine. Position yourself far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable. Place your hands on the machine for support. Keeping your leg straight, slowly move your leg across your body towards the midline. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将脚踝铐固定在脚踝上，站立面向拉索机。保持距离机器足够远的位置，使钢索有张力。双手放在机器上以提供支撑。保持腿部伸直，缓慢地将腿穿过身体，向中线移动。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball with one hand in front of your waist. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Raise the medicine ball above your head, fully extending your arm. Forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground, using your core and shoulders to generate power. Catch the medicine ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一只手握住药球，放在腰前。膝盖微微弯曲，收紧核心。将药球举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。用核心和肩膀用力将药球重重砸向地面。在弹跳时接住药球，重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Place your hands on a stable surface for support, such as a wall or a bar. Lift one leg off the ground, keeping your knee slightly bent. Raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾朝前。将双手放在稳定的支撑物上，如墙壁或横杆。抬起一条腿，膝盖微微弯曲。尽量抬高脚跟，使用小腿肌肉。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放下。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline. Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys. Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them to shoulder height. Push the handles forward and upward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将长椅调整为45度倾斜。将拉线把手固定在高滑轮上。坐在长椅上，面向拉索机，双脚平放在地面。用过握握把手，将其举到肩膀高度。将把手向前向上推，直到双臂完全伸展。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将把手放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place your hands on a wall or sturdy object for balance. Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot. Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，双手放在墙上或坚固物体上保持平衡。抬起一只脚，另一只脚保持平衡。慢慢抬起脚跟，身体抬起脚掌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight. Push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。一条腿向前伸，保持离地。弯曲站立腿，身体像坐回椅子一样放下。保持胸膛挺直，背部挺直。用脚跟用力回归起始位置。另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands by your sides. Engage your abs and tilt your pelvis upward, pressing your lower back into the ground. Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your abs. Release the tilt and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面。双手放在身体两侧。收紧腹部，向上倾斜骨盆，将下背部压向地面。保持这个姿势几秒钟，专注于收缩腹肌。松开倾斜，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Push explosively off the ground, using your chest muscles to propel your upper body off the ground. Land softly with your hands back in the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽。通过弯曲肘部，保持身体直线，将胸部向下压向地面。用胸肌爆发力地撑起地面，将上半身推离地面。双手回到起始位置，轻柔落地。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold onto a stable support, such as a chair or wall, for balance. Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾略微向外。握住稳定的支撑，如椅子或墙壁以保持平衡。通过弯曲膝盖并向后推臀，将身体降低为深蹲姿势。整个动作过程中，保持胸部挺直、背部挺直。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe. Engage your core and squeeze your glutes to maintain a stable position. Lower your body down onto your forearms, one arm at a time, maintaining a straight line from head to toe. Hold this position for the desired amount of time, keeping your core and glutes engaged. To return to the starting position, push through your forearms and lift your body back up into a high plank position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手直接放在肩膀下方，身体从头到脚保持直线。收紧核心并收紧臀肌以保持稳定姿势。将身体放下，一只手臂一只手臂，保持从头到脚的直线。保持该姿势所需时间，保持核心和臀肌的收紧。回到起始位置时，用力用前臂，将身体抬回高平板支撑姿势。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean forward slightly and keep your back straight. Pull the bar down towards your thighs by extending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一根直杆连接到高滑轮钢索机上。站立时背对机器，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握法握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。身体微微前倾，背部保持挺直。伸展肘部将杠铃拉向大腿方向。在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment. Sit on the machine with your back straight and feet flat on the footplate. Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other. Keep your chest up and shoulders back throughout the exercise. Pull one handle towards your torso while keeping the other handle stationary. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement. Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat with the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和脚板位置，确保正确对齐。坐在机器上，背部挺直，双脚平放在脚踏板上。用窄握力握把，手掌相对。整个练习过程中保持胸部抬起，肩膀向后。将一个手柄拉向躯干，同时保持手柄不动。动作结束时将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。慢慢将手柄恢复到起始位置，重复另一侧。继续交替握把，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms fully extended. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your hips. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用中立握法（手掌相对）悬挂在引体向上杠铃上，双臂完全伸展。收紧核心，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。通过弯曲肘部并将肘部向下推向臀部，将身体拉向杠铃。继续拉直到下巴高于杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置，保持控制。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight. Push through your hands to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Quickly bring one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring the other knee towards your chest. Continue alternating knees as fast as you can while maintaining good form. Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，身体保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持身体直线，将胸部向下压向地面。用手推开手臂，回到起始位置。快速将一只膝盖靠近胸口，然后迅速换膝盖，另一膝盖靠近胸口。尽快保持交替跪地，同时保持良好姿势。继续练习所需的时长或重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚并拢。收紧核心，通过弯曲肘部将身体向下，保持身体直线。当胸部刚好离地时停顿片刻，然后伸直手臂，将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up. Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball. Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将bosu球放在地上，平坦的一面朝上。将自己摆成俯卧撑姿势，双手放在bosu球的外缘。收紧核心，弯曲肘部，身体向下压向bosu球。通过伸展手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes. Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将稳定球放在地上，身体俯卧，双手按在球上，肩宽分开。双腿伸直，脚尖站立。通过弯曲肘部，保持身体直线，收紧核心，将胸部向下贴近球。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away. Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart. Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line. Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在墙边，距离大约一臂之遥。双手放在墙上，肩高，略宽于肩宽。后退几英尺，保持身体挺直，双脚与臀部同宽。弯曲肘部，胸部向下贴墙，保持身体直线。往后推回起始位置，伸直手臂。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away. Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back with your feet, keeping them hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels. Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body straight. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在墙边，距离大约一臂之遥。双手放在墙上，肩高，略宽于肩宽。脚步后退，保持臀部宽度。收紧核心，保持身体从头到脚跟的直线。弯曲肘部，胸部贴近墙壁，保持身体挺直。暂停片刻，然后把自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position. Attach a straight bar to the cable. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead. Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Bend your elbows and lower the bar behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将钢索机调到低滑轮位置。在电缆上接一根直杆。站立时背对机器，双脚与肩同宽。用过顶握法握住杠铃，双臂伸直过头顶。稍微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。弯曲肘部，将杠铃放到头后，保持上臂靠近耳朵。暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过握握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。将杠铃拉向下胸，双肩胛骨紧贴。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, resting them on the ground. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手紧贴，正好放在肩膀下方。双手各握一个哑铃，放在地上。通过弯曲肘部，身体向地面降低，保持靠近身体两侧。用手掌撑开，伸展双臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides. Begin by rapidly moving your feet up and down, as if you were running in place. Keep your movements quick and light, focusing on staying on the balls of your feet. Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，双臂放在身侧。开始时快速上下移动双脚，就像原地跑步一样。保持动作快速轻盈，专注于脚掌着地。按预期时间或重复次数继续。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Push back up to the starting position, using your chest muscles to lift your body. Repeat with the other arm extended.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚并拢。一只手臂伸直，平行于地面。通过弯曲肘部，保持背部挺直，核心收紧，身体向地面下放。用胸肌抬起身体，推回起始位置。重复时另一只手臂伸展。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲。双臂放在身体两侧，手掌朝下。收紧臀肌和腿后腱，抬起臀部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your right arm across your chest, placing your left hand on your right elbow. Gently pull your right arm towards your left shoulder, feeling a stretch in your right shoulder. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽。右臂横跨胸口，左手放在右肘上。轻轻地将右臂拉向左肩，感受右肩的拉伸。保持拉伸15-30秒，然后松开。另一侧重复。

英文描述: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用上手握法抓住引体向上杠铃，间距略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在杠铃上。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，肘部紧贴身体。继续拉直到下巴高于杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Loop the rope around the ball of your right foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands. Slowly raise your right leg towards your chest, keeping your knee straight and your foot flexed. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，双腿伸直，双臂垂在身侧。将绳子绕在右脚脚掌上，双手握住绳索两端。慢慢将右腿抬向胸口，保持膝盖伸直，脚部弯曲。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后慢慢将腿放回起始位置。左腿重复。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended along your sides. Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs perpendicular to the floor. Contract your abs and curl your hips off the floor, bringing your knees towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双臂伸直沿身体两侧。弯曲膝盖，抬起双脚，使大腿垂直于地面。收紧腹肌，将臀部离地弯曲，膝盖向胸前收起。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles. Take a big step forward with your right foot and a smaller step back with your left foot. Bend your knees and lower your body until your right thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your left knee slightly above the ground. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，并在脚踝上系上阻力带。右脚向前迈出大步，左脚向后迈小步。弯曲膝盖，降低身体，直到右大腿与地面平行，左膝略微离地。用右脚跟用力回起始位置。另一侧重复。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest. Place your feet on the footrests and grip the handles for stability. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then push against the footrests to extend your hips and raise your legs backward. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整器械以适应你的身体，然后坐上去，背靠靠背。把脚放在脚踏板上，握紧把手以保持稳定。用力臀部和腿后腱，然后用力推脚踏板，伸展臀部，双腿向后抬起。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放下回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope handle to a low cable pulley and kneel down facing the machine. Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend your arms fully in front of you. Keeping your back straight and core engaged, pull the rope towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement and hold for a brief pause. Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索把手连接到低滑轮，跪下面向机器。用中性握法（手掌相对）握住绳子，双臂完全伸直在身前。保持背部挺直并收紧核心，通过收回肩胛骨将绳索拉向身体。动作结束时将肩胛骨紧紧挤合，并保持短暂停顿。慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with an overhand grip. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head up. Let the barbell hang in front of you with your arms fully extended. Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲，用过手握法握杠铃。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，头抬高。让杠铃悬挂在你面前，双臂完全伸展。将杠铃拉向胸前，保持肘部靠近身体。动作顶端将肩胛骨紧紧收紧。把杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees. Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support. Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。将阻力带绕在大腿上，刚好在膝盖上方。将手放在椅子或长凳的两侧以获得支撑。收紧外展肌（大腿外侧肌肉），缓慢地将膝盖分开，抵抗弹力带的阻力。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢将膝盖收回。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you. Place your hands on the ground in front of you for stability. Engaging your glutes and hamstrings, lift your legs up towards the ceiling as high as you can. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴在稳定球上，臀部靠在球上，双腿伸直。双手放在前方地面以保持稳定。用力臀部和腿后腱，尽量抬腿向天花板抬高。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on a flat bench with your hips at the edge and your legs hanging off the bench. Hold onto the bench for stability. Keeping your legs straight, raise them up towards the ceiling as high as you can. Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴在平坦的长凳上，臀部靠近边缘，双腿悬在长凳外。抓紧长凳以保持稳定。保持双腿伸直，尽量抬高到天花板。动作顶端收紧臀部。慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your hands resting on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet. Press through your hands and lift your hips off the ground, coming into a reverse plank position. Engage your core and lift one leg off the ground, extending it straight up towards the ceiling. Hold for a moment, then lower your leg back down. Repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直在前，双手放在身后地面上，手指指向脚部。用力用手撑地，抬起臀部，进入反向平板支撑姿势。收紧核心，抬起一条腿，直直向上伸展向天花板。保持片刻，然后将腿放下。另一条腿重复同样动作。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand in front of a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在引体向上杠前，双脚与肩同宽。伸手用略宽于肩宽的过握握法抓住杠铃。双臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在杠铃上。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，胸部引领。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Place the roller perpendicular to your body, just below your glutes. Slowly roll your body backwards, allowing the roller to move up your back. Continue rolling until the roller reaches your upper back. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先坐在地上，双腿伸直在前。将滚轮垂直于身体，靠近臀部下方。慢慢向后滚动，让滚轮向上移动。继续滚动直到滚轮到达上背部。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回滚回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, balancing on the balls of your feet. Slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃横跨上背部。脚跟尽量抬高离地，脚掌保持平衡。慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly back. Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement. Slowly release the tension and allow the rope to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在高处将绳索固定在拉索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用过握握法握住绳索，手掌相对。保持背部挺直，微微向后倾斜。将绳子向下拉向身体两侧，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。动作结束时暂停片刻。慢慢放松紧张，让绳索回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心发力。双臂向两侧举起，直到与地面平行，肘部保持轻微弯曲。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward. Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm. Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level. Repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，肩膀高度，手掌朝前。用一个哑铃压过头顶，手臂完全伸展。把哑铃放回肩膀高度。另一只手重复。继续交替挥臂，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate. Place your toes on the footplate, with your heels hanging off the edge. Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability. Push through the balls of your feet, raising your heels as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，使膝盖稍微弯曲，双脚平放在脚踏板上。脚趾放在脚踏板上，脚跟悬在边缘。抓住机器的把手或侧面以获得稳定性。用脚掌掌力，尽量抬高脚跟。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet on the footrests. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement. Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板，使其舒适。坐在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚放在脚踏板上。用肩宽握把手，握住手柄。保持背部挺直，核心发力。把手柄拉向身体，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在乐章高潮处稍作停顿。慢慢松开手柄，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach the rope to a high anchor point. Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索固定在高锚点上。站立时背对锚点，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握法握住绳索，手掌朝下。稍微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。把绳子拉向身体，把肩胛骨挤在一起。在动作高潮处暂停片刻，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended straight above your head and your legs straight out in front of you. Place the roller between your feet and grip it with your toes. Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground and curl your knees towards your chest, rolling the roller towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position, rolling the roller away from your body. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，双臂伸直过头顶，双腿伸直。把滚轮放在脚之间，用脚趾夹住。收紧腹部，抬起双腿离地，膝盖向胸前弯曲，滚动滚筒向身体方向。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将双腿放下，将滚筒从身体上移开。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you. Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs. Lean forward slightly and roll the roller away from your body, extending your arms straight in front of you. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the roller back towards your body, bending your arms and bringing the roller back to your thighs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在平面上，双腿伸直在前。双手握住滚筒，掌心朝下，放在大腿上。稍微前倾，将滚筒从身体外面滚动，双臂伸直。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将滚筒向身体方向滚动，弯曲手臂，将滚筒收回大腿。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you. Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs. Lean back slightly and engage your core muscles. Raise the roller up to shoulder level, keeping your arms straight. Slowly lower the roller back down to your thighs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在平坦的表面上，双腿向前伸展。双手握住滚轮，手掌朝下，放在大腿上。稍微向后倾斜，激活核心肌肉。将滚轮抬到肩膀水平，保持手臂伸直。慢慢将滚轮放回大腿。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在机器上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握住把手，手掌朝下。保持背部挺直，身体微微前倾，肘部保持轻微弯曲。将把手拉向身体，双肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在动作达到顶点时暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开把手回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your back against a wall and your feet hip-width apart. Slowly slide your back down the wall until your knees are bent at a 90-degree angle. Lift your right foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest. Lower your right foot back down and lift your left foot off the ground, bringing your knee towards your chest. Continue alternating between lifting your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 背靠墙站立，双脚与臀部同宽。慢慢将背部滑向墙壁，直到膝盖弯曲成90度角。抬起右脚，膝盖向胸前。右脚放下，抬起左脚，膝盖向胸前。继续交替抬起左右脚，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed. Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet. Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance. Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.
中文描述: 先站直，双脚与髋部同宽。收紧核心，保持上半身放松。开始原地慢跑，抬膝向胸前，轻柔地落地。保持稳定的配速，并持续慢跑达到所需的时间或距离。记得在整个锻炼过程中深呼吸并保持良好姿势。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended. Retract your shoulder blades by pulling them down and back. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, focusing on squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，手掌朝向背侧，双臂完全伸展，悬挂在引体向上杆上。通过向下拉肩胛骨并向后拉来收回。激活背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，专注于将肩胛骨紧紧收紧。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Jump off the ground and simultaneously cross your right leg in front of your left leg. As you land, quickly switch legs, crossing your left leg in front of your right leg. Continue alternating legs and jumping as quickly as possible. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。跳起时同时将右腿交叉在左腿前方。落地时迅速换腿，左腿交叉在右腿前方。继续交替双腿并尽可能快地跳跃。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your feet flat on the ground. Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground. Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your calf muscle. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
中文描述: 坐在椅子或长凳的边缘，双脚平放在地上。一条腿伸直，保持脚跟着地。微微前倾，感觉小腿肌肉被拉伸。保持拉伸20-30秒。换腿，重复拉伸动作。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Bend your right knee and cross your right ankle over your left thigh. Place your right hand on the ground behind you for support. With your left hand, gently press down on your right knee to deepen the stretch. Hold the stretch for 30 seconds to 1 minute. Switch sides and repeat.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直在前。弯曲右膝，右脚踝交叉在左大腿上。右手放在身后地面上支撑。用左手轻轻按压右膝，加深拉伸。保持拉伸30秒到1分钟。换边重复。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a chair with your feet flat on the ground. Place your hands on your thighs or on the sides of the chair for support. Slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight. Feel the stretch in your lower back and hold for 20-30 seconds. Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在椅子边缘，双脚平放在地上。把手放在大腿上或椅子两侧以获得支撑。慢慢从臀部向前倾，保持背部挺直。感受下背部的拉伸，保持20-30秒。慢慢回到起始位置，重复到想要的次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Bend your right knee and place your right foot on the outside of your left knee. Place your left elbow on the outside of your right knee and gently twist your torso to the right. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直在前。弯曲右膝，右脚放在左膝外侧。将左肘放在右膝外侧，轻轻将躯干向右扭转。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后换边重复。

英文描述: Sit on the floor with your back against a wall and your legs extended in front of you. Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and lean to one side, bringing your elbow towards your hip. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地板上，背靠墙壁，双腿向前伸展。弯曲膝盖，双脚平放在地上，与臀部同宽。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。收紧腹肌，身体向一侧倾斜，肘部向臀部方向。暂停片刻，然后回到起始位置。反复重复。继续交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart. Lift your hips off the ground, engaging your glutes and hamstrings. Slowly curl your legs towards your glutes, keeping your hips lifted. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position. Lower your hips back down to the ground. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰卧，双腿伸直，双臂放在身体两侧。弯曲膝盖，双脚平放在地面上，与髋部同宽。抬起臀部，收紧臀肌和腿后腱。慢慢将双腿向臀部弯曲，保持臀部抬起。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿伸回起始位置。将臀部放回地面。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand. Place your other hand on an incline bench for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握哑铃。另一只手放在斜凳上以提供支撑。保持上臂不动，收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Engage your core and bring your right knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring your left knee towards your chest. Continue alternating legs in a running motion, keeping your hips low and your core engaged. Maintain a steady pace and breathe evenly throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手正好放在肩膀下方，身体保持直线。收紧核心，将右膝向胸前收紧，然后迅速切换，将左膝向胸前移动。继续交替双腿进行跑步动作，保持低胯部，核心发力。保持稳定的节奏，在整个动作过程中保持均匀呼吸。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the floor, rotating your torso to one side. Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the floor. Repeat on the other side, alternating sides with each repetition.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地板上。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧腹肌，抬起肩胛骨，将躯干旋转到一侧。暂停片刻，然后将肩胛骨放回地面。在另一侧重复，每次重复时交替侧卧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position. Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees while swinging your arms for momentum. Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，身体低垂成深蹲姿势。爆发力跳跃，伸展臀部和膝盖，同时摆动手臂获得动力。轻轻着地，立即进入下一个动作。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Grab the pull-up bar with a shoulder-width grip, palms facing away from you. Hang freely with your arms fully extended. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用肩宽握把抓住引体向上杠铃，手掌朝外。双臂完全伸展，自由悬挂。收紧背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，直到下巴高出杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Engage your core and lift your right hand off the ground, reaching across to tap your left shoulder. Place your right hand back on the ground and repeat with your left hand tapping your right shoulder. Continue alternating shoulder taps while keeping your hips and torso stable. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手直接放在肩膀下方，身体保持直线。收紧核心，抬起右手，横跨拍打左肩。右手放回地面，左手重复敲击右肩。继续交替拍肩，保持臀部和躯干稳定。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet. Hold this position for the desired amount of time. Lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 侧卧，双腿伸展并叠放在一侧。将前臂放在肩膀正下方的地面上，肘部弯曲成90度角。收紧核心，抬起臀部，形成从头到脚的直线。保持该姿势所需的时间。将臀部放回起始位置。反复重复。

英文描述: Stand between two parallel bars with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place your hands on the bars and lift your body off the ground, supporting your weight on your arms. Engage your abs and slowly lift your legs to the side, keeping them straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在两根平行杠之间，双脚与肩同宽。双手放在杠铃上，抬起身体，双臂支撑体重。收紧腹肌，慢慢将双腿抬向一侧，保持伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed. Tilt your head to the right, bringing your right ear towards your right shoulder. Place your right hand on the left side of your head and gently apply pressure to increase the stretch. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Repeat on the other side, tilting your head to the left and applying pressure with your left hand. Repeat the stretch 2-3 times on each side.
中文描述: 站直或坐直，肩膀放松。头向右倾斜，右耳靠近右肩。右手放在头部左侧，轻轻施加压力以增加拉伸。保持拉伸15-30秒。另一侧重复，头向左倾斜，左手施加压力。在两侧重复拉伸2-3次。

英文描述: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Place your bottom hand on the ground directly under your shoulder, fingers pointing forward. Press through your bottom hand to lift your body off the ground, keeping your legs straight and your core engaged. Extend your top arm straight up towards the ceiling, creating a straight line from your head to your heels. Lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 开始侧卧，双腿伸展叠放。下手放在肩膀正下方的地面上，手指向前。用下手按压，将身体抬离地面，保持双腿伸直，核心收紧。上臂伸直向天花板，形成从头到脚跟的直线。身体放下，回到起始位置，保持控制。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一根直杆连接到低滑轮拉索机上。面朝上躺在平坦的长凳上，双脚平放在地上。用下手握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。双臂完全伸展，肘部靠近身体两侧。保持上臂静止，呼气，将杠铃向上弯曲向肩膀方向。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the handles to the cables and lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground. Hold the handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight above your chest. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将把手固定在钢索上，平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上。双手掌相对，双臂伸直，握住把手。保持肘部微微弯曲，双臂向两侧展开，形成一个宽弧线，直到感觉胸部有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后收紧胸肌，将手臂恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees. Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，采用过手握法。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，髋部铰接，哑铃向下放下，膝盖略微弯曲。降低哑铃直到感觉腿后肌拉伸，然后收紧臀肌，用脚跟推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Reach up and grab the bar with an underhand grip, with one hand gripping the bar and the other hand holding your wrist for support. Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended, keeping your body straight and your core engaged. Pull yourself up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
中文描述: 站在引体向上杠铃前，双脚与肩同宽。伸手用下手握住杠铃，一只手握住杠铃，另一只手握住手腕支撑。手臂完全伸展悬挂在杠铃上，保持身体挺直，核心收紧。通过弯曲肘部并收紧背部肌肉，将自己拉向杠铃。继续拉直到下巴高出杠铃，然后慢慢放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数，然后换臂，重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if you were sitting on a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾略微向外。通过弯曲膝盖和向后推臀部，像坐在椅子上一样降低身体。整个动作中保持胸部挺直，背部挺直。降低身体直到大腿与地面平行或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed. Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight. Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握法握住引体向上杠，双手略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，身体放松地挂在杆子上。通过弯曲肘部并将下巴朝向杠铃，同时保持身体挺直来拉起自己。一旦下巴超过杠铃，再放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides. Bend at the waist to the right, reaching your right hand towards your right foot while keeping your left hand extended to the side. Return to the starting position and then bend at the waist to the left, reaching your left hand towards your left foot while keeping your right hand extended to the side. Repeat the side-to-side bending motion for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，双臂向两侧伸展。腰部向右弯曲，右手伸向右脚，同时左手保持向侧面伸展。回到起始位置，然后腰部向左弯曲，左手伸向左脚，同时右手保持向侧面伸展。重复左右弯曲动作，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend one leg straight out in front of you. Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。一条腿伸直在身前。收紧臀肌，抬起臀部，从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶部保持片刻，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot. Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，一手拿哑铃。抬起一只脚，另一只脚保持平衡。慢慢地将脚跟抬高，尽量用小腿肌肉。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将脚跟放下。重复到想要的重复次数，然后换到另一条腿。

英文描述: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head. Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down. Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在头顶一个结实的锚点上。跪下，一只手握住乐队，手掌朝下。将手臂完全伸过头顶，肘部略微弯曲。收紧背阔肌，将弹力带向下拉向身体侧面，肘部靠近肋骨。在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢松开紧张，回到起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a resistance band under both feet. Hold the ends of the band with your hands for stability. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双脚下方放一个阻力带。用手抓住阻力带的两端以保持稳定。用小腿将脚跟尽可能抬离地面。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手放在药球上，肩宽。通过弯曲肘部，保持背部挺直，收紧核心并降低身体向地面。通过手掌推开双臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward. Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed. Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微向外。如有需要，握紧稳定物体保持平衡。慢慢降低身体，弯曲膝盖，身体向后倾斜，保持躯干直立。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行或尽可能靠近。暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复至目标次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Sit up straight with your feet flat on the footrests. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Engage your triceps and push the handles down towards your thighs. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板，使其舒适。用过手握把手，手掌朝下。坐直，双脚平放在脚踏板上。双臂伸直，肘部微微弯曲。收紧三头肌，将把手向下压向大腿。在底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and keep your back straight. Jump to the right, landing on your right foot while swinging your left leg behind your right leg. Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot while swinging your right leg behind your left leg. Continue alternating jumps from side to side, mimicking a skiing motion. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。膝盖微微弯曲，背部保持挺直。向右跳，落地时右脚着地，同时左腿摆到右腿后方。立即向左跳，落地时左脚着地，同时右腿摆动到左腿后方。继续左右交替跳跃，模仿滑雪动作。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate. Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you. Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将雪橇机调整到45度角。坐在雪橇机上，背部靠着垫子，双脚放在脚踏板上。一只脚踩在脚踏板上，伸直腿，将雪橇推离你。慢慢弯曲膝盖，将雪橇放回起始位置。另一条腿重复。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle. Place your feet on the sled platform with your toes pointing forward. Push the sled platform away from you by extending your ankles and calves. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled platform back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将雪橇机调整成45度角。将脚放在雪橇平台上，脚趾朝前。通过伸展脚踝和小腿，将雪橇平台推开。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将平台放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled. Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the sled, with your toes pointing forward. Release the safety handles and push the sled away from you by extending your knees and ankles. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the sled back down by bending your knees and ankles. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整腿推机的座椅，使双脚踩在雪橇上时膝盖微微弯曲。双脚与肩同宽，脚趾朝前。松开安全手柄，通过伸展膝盖和脚踝将雪橇推开。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后通过弯曲膝盖和脚踝缓慢将雪橇放下。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself with your back against the pad. Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards. Grip the handles on the sides of the machine for stability. Engage your core and slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to extend your legs and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整雪橇机的重量，背部贴着垫子。双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微向外。握紧机器侧面的把手以保持稳定。收紧核心，通过弯曲膝盖和臀部缓慢降低身体，保持背部挺直。继续下降，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。在底部暂停片刻，然后用脚跟撑开双腿，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine. Lie down on a flat bench facing up, with your head towards the cable machine. Grasp the rope handle with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the rope handle towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索把手连接到低滑轮钢索机上。躺在平坦的长凳上，面朝上，头朝向钢索机。双手握住绳柄，手掌相对，双臂直伸过胸前。保持上臂静止，弯曲肘部，缓慢将绳柄向额头方向放下。在底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the resistance band to a sturdy anchor point and secure it around your ankle. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Keeping your core engaged and your upper body stable, extend your leg straight out in front of you. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return your leg to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 将阻力带固定在坚固的锚点上，并固定在脚踝上。站在锚点前，双脚与肩同宽。保持核心收紧且上半身稳定，双腿伸直向前。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将腿恢复到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself on the machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off. Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the machine for support. Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels as high as possible, pushing against the resistance of the sled. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整雪橇机的重量到舒适的位置，将脚趾放在平台上，脚跟悬空。双手放在机器的把手或侧面以获得支撑。收紧小腿，慢慢将脚跟抬高，抵抗雪橇的阻力。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the platform. Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the edge of the platform, with your heels hanging off. Push the platform away from you by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent. Continue pushing until your calves are fully contracted. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the platform back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整雪橇机到舒适的重量。坐在雪橇机上，背靠垫子，双脚踩在平台上。脚趾和脚掌放在平台边缘，脚跟悬空。伸展脚踝，保持膝盖微微弯曲，将平台推开。继续推，直到小腿完全收缩。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将平台放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight. Lie on your back on the sled machine with your feet on the footplate. Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly angled outwards. Grip the handles of the sled machine for stability. Engage your glutes and core muscles. Push through your heels and extend your legs to lift the sled. Lower the sled back down by bending your knees and hips. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整雪橇机的重量到舒适的状态。仰躺在雪橇机上，双脚踩在脚踏板上。双脚与肩同宽，略微向外倾斜。握紧雪橇机的把手以保持稳定。用力发动臀部和核心肌肉。用脚跟用力，伸直双腿抬起雪橇。通过弯曲膝盖和臀部，将雪橇放下。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your arms straight and allow the barbell to hang in front of your thighs. Lift your shoulders straight up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top. Hold for a moment, then lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。保持双臂伸直，杠铃悬挂在大腿前方。将肩膀直举到耳朵方向，斜方肌在顶部收紧。保持片刻，然后将肩膀放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height. Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
