Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将杠铃架设在臀部高度。站在杠铃前，双脚与肩同宽。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部前倾，保持背部挺直。用上手握法握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。将杠铃拉向下胸部，双肩胛骨紧拢。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to a comfortable position. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整史密斯机杆的高度，使其保持舒适位置。双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。将杠铃横放在上背部，放在斜方肌上。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，缓慢弯曲膝盖和臀部。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。暂停片刻，然后用力用脚跟回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart. Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off. Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整腿推机的座椅，使双脚踩在雪橇上时膝盖微微弯曲。坐在机器上，背部靠靠背，双脚放在雪橇上，肩宽。脚趾和脚掌掌放在雪橇上，保持脚跟不着地。通过伸展脚踝推动雪橇向前，保持膝盖微微弯曲。在雪橇顶部稍作停顿，然后通过屈曲脚踝慢慢将雪橇放下。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm. Hold your upper arm against your side and bend your elbow to curl your forearm towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 侧卧，双腿伸直，头部用手臂支撑。将上臂贴在身体侧面，弯曲肘部，使前臂向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach cables to both sides of a cable machine at chest height. Stand in the center of the machine with one foot slightly in front of the other. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides. Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a slight forward lean. Engage your chest muscles and bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion. Pause for a moment at the center, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在钢索机的两侧胸部高度连接钢索。站在机器中央，一只脚稍微向前。用过手握把手，双臂向两侧伸展。保持肘部微微弯曲，保持微微前倾。收紧胸肌，双臂向前扫荡。在中间暂停片刻，然后慢慢将手臂收回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Find an open space or a treadmill to perform the exercise. Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart. Start jogging in place, lifting your knees high and pumping your arms. After a few seconds, start taking short strides forward, maintaining a quick pace. Continue running with short strides for the desired duration or distance.
中文描述: 找一个空旷的地方或跑步机来做这个练习。站得笔直，双脚与臀部同宽。开始原地慢跑，抬高膝盖，双臂用力抽动。几秒后，开始小步向前，保持快速步伐。继续用短步幅跑到所需的时间或距离。

英文描述: Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将下坡台调整到所需的角度。躺在长椅上，双脚被脚垫固定住。用略宽于肩宽的上手握法握住杠铃。卸下杠铃，慢慢将杠铃放向胸口，肘部收紧。在底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to an appropriate height for your body. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed outwards. Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you unrack the barbell. Take a step back and position your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down, keeping your chest up and back straight. Continue descending until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将杠铃调整到适合你身体的高度。双脚与肩同宽，脚趾略微向外。将自己放在杠铃下方，将杠铃放在上方斜方肌和肩膀上。用上手握法握杠铃，稍宽于肩宽。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，同时松开杠铃。后退一步，双脚略宽于肩宽。弯曲膝盖，身体向下，保持胸部抬起，背部挺直。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。在底部暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，双脚平放在长凳上。紧握杠铃，略窄于肩宽。将杠铃向下放向胸部，肘部紧贴身体。在底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the smith machine to a decline position. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将Smith机调整到下斜位置。躺在长凳上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。用反向握法握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。卸下杠铃，向下放向胸部，保持肘部内收。在底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Position yourself on the smith machine with your back against the pad and your feet shoulder-width apart. Place your hands on the barbell, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and glutes, then push through your heels to raise your hips off the ground. Continue lifting until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在Smith机器上，背靠垫子，双脚与肩同宽。把手放在杠铃上，略宽于肩宽。锻炼核心和臀部，然后用脚跟支撑，抬起臀部离地。继续举重，直到你的身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶部保持片刻，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the smith machine to a comfortable incline angle. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip that is slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the bar and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment when the bar is just above your chest. Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将铁匠机的座椅调整到一个舒适的倾斜角度。坐在机器上，背靠着垫子，双脚平放在地上。用略宽于肩宽的过手握法握住杠铃。把杠铃从杠铃上拉下来，慢慢放到胸口，肘部收紧。当杠铃刚好在你胸口上方时，暂停片刻。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back against an incline bench. Hold a cable handle in one hand with your arm extended and palm facing inward. Keeping a slight bend in your elbow, slowly lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部靠着斜凳。一只手握住钢索把手，手臂伸直，手掌朝内。保持肘部微微弯曲，慢慢将手臂向一侧放下，直到手与肩膀保持对齐。停顿片刻，然后收紧胸肌，将手臂拉回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Curl the barbell upwards by contracting your biceps, while exhaling. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position as you inhale. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，用下手握法握住EZ杠铃。整个动作过程中，肘部靠近躯干，上臂保持静止。通过收缩肱二头肌向上弯曲杠铃，同时呼气。继续抬起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部水平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。慢慢开始将杠铃回到起始位置，同时吸气。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet. While keeping your core engaged, lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips. Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your leg back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 侧躺，双腿伸展叠放在一侧。用前臂支撑身体，肘部保持在肩膀正下方。收紧核心，抬起臀部，从头部到脚部形成一条直线。保持核心收紧的同时，尽量抬起上腿，但不旋转臀部。在顶部稍作停顿，然后把腿放下。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position. Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine. Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height. Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position. Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 将钢索机调到低滑轮位置。坐在斜坡长凳上，背对缆绳机。用一只手握住把手，把它举到肩膀高度。双脚稳稳地站稳，保持稳定姿势。将手柄向前向上推，手臂完全伸展。在顶部稍作停留，然后慢慢将手柄放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you. Extend your right arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with your palm facing down. With your left hand, grab your right hand and gently pull it towards your body, feeling a stretch in your right forearm. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂伸直在身前。右臂向侧面伸展，平行于地面，手掌朝下。用左手抓住右手，轻轻拉向身体，感受右前臂的拉伸。保持拉伸15-30秒，然后松开。另一侧重复。

英文描述: Adjust the smith machine to an incline position. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Raise the barbell up towards the ceiling, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将史密斯机调整到倾斜位置。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握法握住杠铃，略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将杠铃抬向天花板，肘部先行。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the bench on the smith machine to a decline position. Lie down on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将史密斯机的长凳调整为下斜姿势。双脚稳稳地放在长凳上。紧握杠铃，略窄于肩宽。卸下杠铃，缓慢地向胸口放下，肘部紧贴身体。当杠铃刚好在胸口上方时暂停。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the smith machine to a decline position. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将Smith机调整到下斜位置。躺在长凳上，双脚固定在脚垫下。紧握杠铃，略窄于肩宽。卸下杠铃，缓慢地将杠铃放向胸部，保持肘部收紧。在杠铃底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your chest up as you pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，双脚平放在机器上。用上手握把，略窄于肩宽。保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，将手柄拉向身体，肩胛骨紧贴。动作达到顶点暂停，然后慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复到目标次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把一根直杆连接到低滑轮钢索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用下手握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。整个动作过程中，肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气，将杠铃向上弯曲，向肩膀方向弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。动作结束时停顿片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Position yourself on the floor under the smith machine bar, facing away from the machine. Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface, such as a weight plate or block. Position the smith machine bar across your lower legs, just above your ankles. Hold onto the bar with your hands for stability. Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles, lifting your body up. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把自己放在铁匠机杆下方的地板上，背对机器。将脚掌球放在一个高起的物体上，比如配重板或块。将铁匠机杆横放在小腿上方，脚踝上方。用手抓住杠铃以保持稳定。抬起脚跟，抬起脚踝，抬起身体。动作结束时停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged as you pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，将自己放在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚平放在地面上。用过手握把，略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心发力，将把手拉向胸前，双肩胛骨紧贴。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable. Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向有线器。用一只手握住钢索把手，手掌朝下，站得离机器足够远，这样钢索上有张力。保持手臂伸直，慢慢向一侧抬起，直到与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footrest. Place one leg on the footrest and keep the other leg off the footrest. Using your calf muscles, raise your heel as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 坐在器械上，背靠垫子，双脚放在脚踏板上。一条腿放在脚踏板上，另一条腿保持不碰脚踏板。用小腿肌肉，尽量抬高脚跟。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿重复。

英文描述: Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在史密斯器械前的长凳上，双脚平放在地上。用下手握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬空。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将杠铃向前臂方向弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your arms straight and your shoulders relaxed. Lift your shoulders up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top. Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。保持手臂伸直，肩膀放松。将肩膀抬向耳朵方向，顶部收紧斜方肌。保持片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, with your palms facing forward. Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用上手握法握住杠铃，略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起，手掌朝前，保持到肩膀高度。将杠铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回肩部水平。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the waist, keeping your back straight. Extend your arm with the dumbbell towards the opposite foot, rotating your torso as you do so. Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，腰部前倾，保持背部挺直。用哑铃伸出手臂向另一只脚，同时旋转躯干。回到起始位置，在另一侧重复。继续左右交替，重复次数达到目标。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the lowest position. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Slowly curl your forearm towards your bicep, keeping your upper arm stationary against the pad. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep. Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
中文描述: 调整钢索机，使滑轮处于最低位置。站在有线电视机前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住钢索把手，并将上臂贴在讲道台垫上。在整个练习过程中保持背部挺直，核心保持集中。慢慢将前臂向肱二头肌弯曲，保持上臂贴着垫子保持静止。动作顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。慢慢把钢索把手放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。换手臂，重复这个动作。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，身体往下放，就像坐在椅子上一样。保持胸膛挺起，体重放在脚跟上。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟蹬地回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and jump to the right, landing on your right foot. As you land, swing your left leg behind your right leg and tap the ground with your left toes. Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot. As you land, swing your right leg behind your left leg and tap the ground with your right toes. Continue alternating sides, jumping and tapping the ground with each leg. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。膝盖微微弯曲，向右跳跃，落地时用右脚着地。落地时，左腿摆到右腿后面，左脚趾轻敲地面。立刻向左跳，落地时用左脚着地。落地时，右腿摆到左腿后面，右脚趾轻敲地面。继续交替走动，每条腿跳跃并轻敲地面。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with one foot and place it about two feet in front of the other foot. Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight. Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, and your back knee is hovering just above the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。单脚向前迈出一步，将脚放在另一只脚前方约两英尺处。通过弯曲膝盖和臀部，保持背部挺直，降低身体。继续下蹲，直到前大腿与地面平行，后膝盖悬在地面上方。暂停片刻，然后用前脚跟推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿重复。

英文描述: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side up. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and position yourself on top of the bosu ball. Lower your body down by bending your knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your weight on your heels. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将bosu球平放在地上，平时朝上。双脚与肩同宽站立，并将自己置于bosu球上方。通过弯曲膝盖和臀部，像坐回椅子一样降低身体。保持胸部抬起，体重放在脚跟上。降低身体直到大腿与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后用力用脚跟回归起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. As you come up from the squat, extend your arms overhead, reaching towards the ceiling. Return to the starting position by lowering your arms and bending your knees to squat down again. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。通过弯曲膝盖并向后推臀部，将身体降低到深蹲姿势。从深蹲站起来时，双臂伸展过头顶，向天花板伸出。通过放下手臂和弯曲膝盖，回到起始位置再次深蹲。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended overhead. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Lower your body down into a squat position while keeping your arms extended overhead. As you squat down, press your arms down towards the ground, engaging your triceps. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to stand back up while simultaneously raising your arms back overhead. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立，双脚与肩同宽，双臂伸过头顶。膝盖微微弯曲，收紧核心。将身体降低为深蹲姿势，同时双臂保持伸展过头顶。蹲下时，双臂向下压，三头肌发力。深蹲底部暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑站起，同时双臂举高举过头顶。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand on the edge of a step or a sturdy platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step. Hold onto a railing or wall for balance if needed. Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在台阶边缘或结实平台，脚跟悬空，脚趾踩在台阶上。如果需要，可以抓着栏杆或墙保持平衡。慢慢抬起脚跟，尽量抬高脚跟，将身体重量抬到脚掌掌上。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground. Slowly lean your upper body to one side, feeling a stretch in your side and lats. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂伸直，向两侧伸直，与地面平行。慢慢将上半身倾向一侧，感受侧腹和背阔肌的拉伸感。保持拉伸15-30秒。回到起始位置，在另一侧重复。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Place your hands on your hips or let them hang by your sides. Engage your core muscles and tilt your pelvis forward, pushing your lower back towards the wall behind you. Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双手叉腰或垂在身侧。收紧核心肌群，将骨盆向前倾，将下背部向身后的墙壁推向。保持该姿势几秒钟，然后松开并回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the bar down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把一根直杆连接到高滑轮钢索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气，将杠铃向下弯曲，保持上臂保持静止。动作结束时停顿片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Reach down with your hands and clasp them together behind your legs. Slowly raise your hands up and over your head in a circular motion, keeping your legs straight. Continue the circular motion until your hands touch your toes. Reverse the motion and bring your hands back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，双臂向两侧伸展。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。双手伸下去，双手在腿后合十。慢慢地将双手抬起，绕过头顶，保持双腿伸直。继续做圆周运动，直到你的手碰到脚趾。反向动作，把手放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed. Engage your core and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest. Continue to lift your legs up and over your head, allowing your body to pass through the arms. Once your legs are fully extended over your head, begin to lower them back down towards the starting position. As you lower your legs, allow your body to pass back through the arms until you are hanging with your arms fully extended again. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双臂完全伸展，身体放松地悬挂在杠铃上。收紧核心，抬起双腿，将膝盖靠近胸前。继续将双腿抬起并举过头顶，让身体通过双臂。当双腿完全伸展过头顶后，开始将其放回起始位置。当你放下双腿时，让身体再次穿过手臂，直到双臂再次完全伸展悬挂。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your hands on your hips. Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot off the ground, bending your knee. Slowly curl your right heel towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstring. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your right foot back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，双手放在臀部。将重心转移到左腿，右脚抬离地面，弯曲膝盖。慢慢将右脚跟向臀部弯曲，收紧腿后肌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将右脚放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Start by standing tall with your feet shoulder-width apart and the wheel roller in front of you. Bend at your waist and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Continue rolling forward until you feel a stretch in your abs and your body is extended as far as possible. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your body, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站直，双脚与肩同宽，轮子滚筒放在前面。腰部弯曲，缓慢向前滚动轮子，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。继续向前滚动，直到感觉腹部被拉伸，身体尽可能伸展。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将轮子向身体方向滚动，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides. Bend your knees slightly and jump up explosively. As you jump, spread your legs and extend your arms out to the sides, forming a star shape with your body. Land softly on the balls of your feet with your knees slightly bent. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，双臂放在两侧。膝盖微微弯曲，然后爆发性地跳起来。跳跃时，分开双腿，双臂向两侧伸展，与身体形成星形。轻柔着地，膝盖微微弯曲，脚掌着地。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position on the stationary bike to ensure proper alignment. Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available. Start pedaling at a comfortable pace, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance level if desired. Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout. Cool down by gradually reducing your pace and resistance level. Stretch your leg muscles after the workout to prevent tightness and promote recovery.
中文描述: 调整固定车的座椅高度和位置，确保正确对齐。将脚放在踏板上，如果有绑带，请固定好。开始以舒适的节奏踩踏，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。保持稳定节奏，如果需要可以增加阻力。在有氧训练的预期时间内继续踩踏。通过逐渐降低配速和阻力来降温。训练后拉伸腿部肌肉，以防止肌肉紧绷并促进恢复。

英文描述: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other. Place your bottom arm under your head for support. Engage your core and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 侧卧，双腿伸直并叠放。将下臂放在头下支撑。收紧核心，尽量抬高上腿，但不旋转臀部或向后倾斜。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将腿放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your knees up towards your chest, curling your pelvis towards your ribcage. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 悬挂在引体向上杆上，双臂完全伸展，手掌朝向背对。收紧核心，抬膝向胸前，骨盆向肋骨弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将膝盖放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up a suspension trainer at an appropriate height. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground. Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在合适的高度架设一个悬挂训练器。站在锚点前，双脚与肩同宽。用过握握住把手，手掌相对。身体向后倾，保持身体笔直，脚跟着地。将胸部拉向把手，双肩胛骨紧贴。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball and hold the cable handle with an underhand grip. Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears. Slowly curl the cable down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，用下手握住拉索把手。双臂完全伸展过头顶，肘部靠近耳朵。慢慢将拉索向下弯曲，靠近额头，保持上臂静止。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform. Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart. Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将雪橇机调整成45度角。坐在雪橇机上，背部贴着垫子，双脚放在脚踏平台上。双脚张开比肩宽宽。用力推脚踏台，伸展双腿并伸直膝盖。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢弯曲膝盖回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on a mat with your arms extended overhead. Engage your core and lift your chest and legs off the ground simultaneously. Kick your legs up and down in a fluttering motion, as if you were swimming. Continue kicking for the desired number of repetitions. Lower your chest and legs back down to the starting position.
中文描述: 趴在垫子上，双臂伸出。收紧核心，同时抬起胸部和双腿离地。上下踢腿，做出轻盈的动作，就像在游泳一样。继续踢到所需的重复次数。将胸部和双腿放回起始位置。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground. Engage your core and swing your arms in a circular motion, rotating your torso as you do so. Continue the circular motion, swinging your arms and rotating your torso for the desired number of repetitions. Remember to breathe throughout the exercise.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂伸直，平行于地面。收紧核心，双臂以圆周运动摆动，同时旋转躯干。继续做圆周运动，挥动手臂并旋转躯干，达到所需的重复次数。记得在整个练习过程中保持呼吸。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双手握住边缘，手指向前。将臀部从长椅上滑下，用手支撑体重。弯曲肘部，降低身体直到上臂与地面平行。将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your hands next to your hips, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the front of the chair with your legs extended in front of you. Straighten your arms, keeping a little bend in your elbows to keep tension on your triceps and off your elbow joints. Slowly bend your elbows to lower your body toward the floor until your elbows are at about a 90-degree angle. Once you reach the bottom of the movement, press down into the chair to straighten your elbows, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在椅子或长凳的边缘，双手放在臀部旁边，手指向前。将臀部从椅子前方滑开，双腿伸直。伸直手臂，保持肘部微微弯曲，以保持三头肌和肘关节的紧张。慢慢弯曲肘部，将身体降低到地面，直到肘部呈大约90度角。动作结束后，向下压椅子以伸直肘部，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your upper arms close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂伸直，平行于地面。弯曲肘部，身体向下，保持上臂靠近身体两侧。在底部稍作停顿，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand or sit upright with your back straight. Extend one arm overhead, bending it at the elbow. Place your opposite hand on the bent elbow and gently pull it towards your head. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, feeling a gentle stretch in your triceps. Release the stretch and repeat on the other arm.
中文描述: 站立或坐直，背部挺直。一只手臂伸过头顶，肘部弯曲。将另一只手放在弯曲的肘部，轻轻拉向头部。保持拉伸15-30秒，感受肱三头肌的轻柔拉伸。松开拉伸，另一只手臂重复。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest, simultaneously curling your upper body towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulder blades and extend your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，抬起肩胛骨离地，膝盖向胸前，同时将上半身向膝盖弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放下肩胛骨，双腿伸展回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands by your sides for support. Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. While keeping your hips lifted, twist your lower body to the right side, bringing your knees towards the ground. Return to the starting position and repeat the twist to the left side. Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰卧，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面。双手放在身体两侧以提供支撑。收紧臀肌，抬起臀部，从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。保持臀部抬起的同时，将下半身向右侧扭转，膝盖朝地面。回到起始位置，向左侧重复扭转动作。继续交替扭转，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope to a cable machine at a high position. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and bring your hands above your head. Keep your upper arms close to your head and your elbows pointing forward. Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把绳子绑在高处的钢索机上。站立时背对机器，双脚与肩同宽。双手握紧绳索，掌心相对，双手举过头顶。保持上臂靠近头部，肘部向前。慢慢地弯曲肘部，将绳子放到头后。暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level. Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down. Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 将铁匠机杆的高度调到腰部高度。站在铁匠机前，双脚与肩同宽。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。用一只手握住杠铃，采用过顶握法，手掌朝下。保持肘部靠近身体，将杠铃拉向腰部，双肩胛骨紧贴。在动作顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended out to the sides. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Reach down towards your toes with both hands, keeping your legs straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，双臂张开。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。双手伸向脚趾，保持双腿伸直。在底部稍作停留，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Hang from the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在平行杠上。收紧核心，双腿抬起，保持伸直。继续举起，直到双腿与地面平行或稍高。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the incline level on the treadmill to your desired intensity. Stand on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart. Start walking at a comfortable pace, ensuring that you maintain proper form. Engage your core muscles and keep your back straight throughout the exercise. Continue walking on the incline treadmill for the desired duration of your cardio workout. Gradually decrease the incline and speed of the treadmill to cool down before stopping.
中文描述: 调整跑步机的坡度，达到你想要的强度。站在跑步机上，双脚与肩同宽。开始以舒适的步速走路，确保保持正确的姿势。在整个锻炼过程中，激活核心肌肉并保持背部挺直。在有氧训练期间，继续在斜坡跑步机上行走。逐渐降低跑步机的坡度和速度，以冷却后再停止。

英文描述: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a weight in front of your chest with both hands. Shift your weight to one side and lower your body by bending the knee of the side you shifted towards, while keeping the other leg straight. Go as low as you can while maintaining balance and keeping your chest up. Push through the heel of the bent leg to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, alternating between legs.
中文描述: 站立时双脚分开大于肩宽，脚趾略微向外。双手将重物放在胸前。将重心移向一侧，弯曲你向移动侧的膝盖，同时保持另一条腿笔直。尽量蹲低，保持平衡并抬起胸部。用力从弯曲腿的脚跟推回起始位置。在另一侧重复，交替双腿。

英文描述: Lie flat on a decline bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and slowly lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward until your torso is perpendicular to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在下坡凳上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。双手放在头后或胸前。收紧腹部，缓慢抬起上半身，向前弯曲直到躯干与地面垂直。在上半身顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs. Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。保持手臂伸直，呼气，将哑铃举起直到与肩平齐。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，手掌朝外，悬挂在引体向上杆上。收紧核心，双腿抬起，保持伸直。继续举起，直到双腿与地面平行或稍高。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将双腿放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Position yourself face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将自己面朝下放在稳定球上，臀部靠在球上，双脚靠墙以保持稳定。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧核心，缓慢地将上半身从球上抬起，伸展背部直到身体形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height. Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the cable attachment with an underhand grip. Keep your back straight and your elbows tucked in at your sides. Slowly curl the cable attachment up towards your shoulders, squeezing your biceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整拉圈机，使传教士弯举垫与胸前齐高。坐在传教士弯举凳上，将上臂放在垫上，用下手握紧拉索连接件。保持背部挺直，肘部收缩在身体两侧。缓慢将拉索连接件向肩膀方向弯曲，动作顶端收紧肱二头肌。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将拉索连接放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step back with your right foot and place it on the barbell, resting the top of your foot on the bar. Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position, keeping your back straight. Push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将杠铃放在臀部高度的铁匠机上。站在背对器械的背对位置，双脚与肩同宽。右脚后退，将杠铃放在杠铃上，脚背放在杠铃上。弯曲左膝，身体下放进入弓步姿势，保持背部挺直。用左脚跟用力回归起始位置。反侧重复，左脚后退。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a kneeling position with your knees hip-width apart and your back straight. Hold a weight in each hand, with your arms extended straight down in front of you. Engage your core and swing the weights up and overhead, keeping your arms straight. Lower the weights back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时膝盖与臀部同宽，背部挺直。双手各握一个配重，双臂伸直在前方。收紧核心，将哑铃向上挥过头顶，保持手臂伸直。将负重放回起始位置，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms overhead. Engage your abs and slowly curl your torso forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your torso back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲成90度。双手握住哑铃或哑铃，双臂伸展过头顶。收紧腹部，缓慢将躯干向前弯曲，胸部靠近膝盖。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将躯干放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Continue lifting your arms until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。双臂向两侧举起，肘部保持轻微弯曲。继续抬起双臂，直到与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor. Hold a weight or medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your right side. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地板上。双手握住一个哑铃或药球，放在胸前。稍微向后倾斜，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。缓慢地向右扭动躯干，将重物或药球朝向右侧地面。稍作停顿，然后向左扭动躯干，将重物或药球朝向左侧地面。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest. Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles. Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the right side of your body. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the left side of your body. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地板上。双手握住重量，放在胸前。稍微向后倾斜以激活核心肌肉。将躯干向右扭转，将重量带向身体右侧。稍作停顿，然后向左扭动躯干，将重量带向身体左侧。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands close to your chest. Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable. Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the rotation to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲成90度角，坐在稳定球上。双手靠近胸口握住哑铃或哑铃。收紧核心，缓慢将躯干向一侧旋转，保持臀部稳定。旋转结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复旋转到另一侧。继续交替练习，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and flat on the ground. Hold a weight in one hand and place your other hand on your hip. Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the weighted side, keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，平放在地上，坐在稳定球上。一只手握重，另一只手放在臀部。收紧核心，慢慢向负重侧侧弯，保持背部挺直。在底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees at a 90-degree angle. Hold the cable handles at chest height with your palms facing down and your elbows bent. Engage your core and press the cable handles forward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly release the tension and bring the cable handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖呈90度角。将钢索把手保持在胸前高度，手掌朝下，肘部弯曲。收紧核心，将钢索把手向前推，直到双臂完全伸展。稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放紧张，将钢索把手恢复到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on your side with your legs straight. Bend your top leg and grab your ankle or foot with your hand. Gently pull your ankle or foot towards your glutes until you feel a stretch in your quads. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 侧卧，双腿伸直。弯曲上腿，用手抓住脚踝或脚。轻轻将脚踝或脚拉向臀大肌，直到感觉股四头肌有拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒。松开拉伸，另一侧重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. As you come up from the squat, raise your arms overhead and twist your torso to one side. Return to the starting position and repeat the squat, this time twisting your torso to the opposite side. Continue alternating sides with each squat repetition.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。通过弯曲膝盖和向后推臀部，将身体降低到深蹲姿势。从深蹲站起来时，双臂举过头顶，躯干向一侧扭转。回到起始位置，重复深蹲，这次将躯干扭向相反侧。每次深蹲时继续交替进行。

英文描述: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度角，坐在稳定球上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢将上半身向前弯曲，胸部向膝盖方向。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge of the bench, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双手握住长凳边缘，手指向前。将臀部从长凳上滑下，用手支撑体重。弯曲肘部，身体向地面下放，背部紧贴长凳。在底部稍作停顿，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight in each hand. Extend your arms straight in front of you, palms facing each other. Squeeze your hands together as hard as you can, engaging your forearms. Hold the squeeze for a few seconds, then release. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个重物。双臂伸直，手掌相对。双手尽力合拢，前臂收紧。保持握力几秒钟，然后松开。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，身体笔直，将自己置于平行杠之间。通过弯曲肘部，使上臂与地面平行，降低身体。稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight plate in front of your chest with both hands. Keep your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing each other. Press the weight plate straight out in front of you, fully extending your arms. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring the weight plate back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握着一个负重板，放在胸前。保持肘部微微弯曲，手掌相对。将负重板直直按在你前方，双臂完全伸展。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢将负重板拉回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench and supporting your weight with your arms. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳边缘，双手握住边缘，手指向前。双脚向前走，臀部滑离长凳，用手臂支撑体重。弯曲肘部，身体向下，背部贴近长凳。在底部稍作停顿，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips. Slide your butt off the front of the bench with your legs extended in front of you. Keep your back close to the bench and your elbows slightly bent. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳或椅子的边缘，双手握紧靠近臀部的边缘。将臀部从长凳前方滑开，双腿向前伸展。保持背部靠近长凳，肘部微微弯曲。通过弯曲肘部，使身体降低，直到上臂与地面平行。通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your hands gripping the bars and your arms fully extended. Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将自己置于两根平行杠之间，双手握住杆，双臂完全伸展。弯曲肘部，降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。暂停片刻，然后用力撑直手掌，伸直手臂，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground. Hold one end of the band in your hand and step on the other end with your foot on the same side. Lean forward slightly and rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. With your palm facing up, slowly curl your hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hand back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双腿分开，双脚平放在地上。用手握住弹力带的一端，另一端的脚在同一侧踩。身体微微前倾，肘部放在大腿内侧，膝盖上方。手掌朝上，慢慢将手向肩膀弯曲，保持上臂不动。在上方稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a pair of rings with your arms fully extended and your body in a straight line. Spread your legs wide apart, forming a straddle position. Engage your core and slowly lower your body until your arms are parallel to the ground. Hold this position for a few seconds, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先从一对环上挂起，双臂完全伸展，身体保持直线。双腿分开，形成跨坐姿势。收紧核心，慢慢降低身体，直到双臂与地面平行。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your legs straight and a resistance band looped around your feet. Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet together. Slowly rotate your knees outwards, away from each other, while keeping your feet together. Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，双腿伸直，双脚缠绕阻力带。弯曲膝盖，向胸口方向，保持双脚并拢。缓慢地将膝盖向外旋转，远离彼此，同时保持双脚并拢。旋转结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Place a resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees. Keep your knees bent at a 90-degree angle and your feet shoulder-width apart. Engage your glutes and slowly rotate your knees outward, pushing against the resistance of the band. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。在大腿上方、膝盖上方绑上阻力带。保持膝盖弯曲成90度角，双脚与肩同宽。收紧臀部，缓慢地将膝盖向外旋转，抵抗阻力带的阻力。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, with the band placed just above your knees. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, push your hips back and bend your knees to lower into a squat position. Make sure your knees are tracking over your toes and your weight is in your heels. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，弹力带放在膝盖上方。保持胸部抬起并收紧核心，向后推臀部，弯曲膝盖进入深蹲姿势。确保膝盖越过脚趾，重心落在脚跟上。在底部稍作停顿，然后用力用脚跟回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Keeping your back straight and core engaged, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手略宽于肩宽，握杠铃时用过顶握法。让杠铃悬挂在大腿前方，双臂完全伸展。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，呼气，将杠铃直举到下巴方向，肘部先发力。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grab the rope attachment with both hands and step forward, creating tension in the cable. Bend at the hips and lower your upper body until it is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to pull your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在背对拉线机的背对上，双脚与肩同宽。双手抓住绳索连接点，向前迈步，拉紧钢索。臀部弯曲，上半身降低至与地面平行，保持背部挺直。用力臀部和腿后腱，把身体拉回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight in front of you, parallel to the ground. Interlace your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body. Slowly raise your arms overhead, keeping them straight and parallel to each other. As you raise your arms, squeeze your shoulder blades together. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release and repeat.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽。双臂伸直，平行于地面。双手交叉，手掌旋转，远离身体。慢慢地将双臂举过头顶，保持双臂笔直且平行。抬起双臂时，双肩胛骨紧紧收拢。保持拉伸15-30秒，然后松开，重复。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手张开比肩宽宽。保持身体从头到脚保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，将胸部贴近身体两侧，向地面下放。用手掌撑开双臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air. Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，身体悬浮在空中，站在平行杠上。身体微微前倾，弯曲肘部，身体向下，直到胸部刚好高于单木。暂停片刻，然后通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Find an open space or a track to perform the exercise. Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart. Begin running as fast as you can, pumping your arms and driving your knees up. Continue sprinting for a specific distance or time period. Rest and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 找一个开阔的空间或跑道进行练习。先站立，双脚与肩同宽。开始尽可能快地跑步，双臂用力，抬膝盖。继续冲刺指定距离或时间段。休息，重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell slowly towards your neck, keeping your elbows pointed outwards. Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your neck. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴近长凳。用过手握法握杠铃，略宽于肩宽。杠铃缓慢地向颈部放下，保持肘部向外。当杠铃刚好在脖子上方时暂停。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the kettlebells, shoulder-width apart. Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body. Push through your hands explosively, lifting your hands off the kettlebells and extending your arms fully. Land softly back on the kettlebells and immediately lower your chest back down for the next repetition. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手放在壶铃上，肩宽。胸部向下贴近地面，肘部紧贴身体。用力用力推手，双手从壶铃上抬起，双臂完全伸展。轻柔地落回壶铃，立即将胸部放下，准备下一次重复。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell behind your legs, resting it on your upper thighs. Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。将杠铃放在腿后方，放在大腿上部。通过膝盖和臀部弯曲身体，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。暂停片刻，然后用力用脚跟回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃放在上背部。保持胸部抬起并收紧核心，缓慢地弯曲膝盖并向后推臀，身体逐渐降低。继续下降，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support. Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长椅上，上臂放在垫子上，胸部靠在支撑上。用下手握住杠铃，略宽于肩宽。保持上臂静止，呼气，将杠铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in one hand, palm facing up. Rest your opposite hand on your thigh for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握杠铃，手掌朝上。另一只手放在大腿上以提供支撑。保持上臂不动，呼气，将重量向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将重量放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Lie face down on the floor with your legs extended behind you. Place your hands on the floor next to your lower ribs, fingers pointing forward. Press your hands firmly into the floor and straighten your arms, lifting your torso and thighs off the ground. Roll your shoulders back and down, opening your chest and lifting your gaze towards the ceiling. Hold this position for a few breaths, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴在地板上，双腿向后伸展。双手放在下肋骨旁的地板上，手指向前。双手紧按地面，伸直手臂，抬起躯干和大腿离地。肩膀向后滚动，胸部打开，目光望向天花板。保持这个姿势几次，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Start by lying face down on the floor. Place your forearms on the ground, with your elbows directly under your shoulders. Extend your legs straight out behind you, with your toes on the ground. Engage your core and lift your body off the ground, balancing on your forearms and toes. Keep your body in a straight line from your head to your heels. Hold this position for the desired amount of time. Lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，俯卧在地板上。前臂放在地面上，肘部正好放在肩膀下方。双腿伸直，脚趾触地。收紧核心，抬起身体，前臂和脚趾保持平衡。保持身体从头部到脚跟的直线。保持该姿势所需时间。将身体放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Extend your arms straight out in front of you. Make a fist with both hands. Rotate your wrists in a circular motion, keeping your arms still. Continue the wrist circles for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂伸直，向前伸展。双手握拳。手腕以圆周运动旋转，保持手臂静止。继续手腕画圈，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a weight to one end of a rope or bar. Hold the other end of the rope or bar with both hands, palms facing down. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms fully extended in front of you. Slowly roll the weight up towards your hands by flexing your wrists. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将配重固定在绳索或杠铃的一端。双手握住绳索或杠铃的另一端，掌心朝下。双脚与肩同宽，双臂完全伸展在前方。通过屈伸手腕，缓慢将哑铃向手部滚动。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将重量放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body. Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the barbell. Once you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, push your hips forward and stand up straight. Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾朝前。用上握握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。臀部弯曲，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。杠铃向下放，保持靠近身体。当杠铃放下时，感受腿后肌腱的拉伸。一旦感觉到腿后肌腱被拉伸，就将臀部向前推，站直。动作顶端收紧臀肌。将杠铃放回起始位置，重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet lifted off the ground, keeping your legs together. Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles. Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the ground on your right side. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the ground on your left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚离地，双腿并拢。双手握住重量，肘部微微弯曲。稍微向后倾，激活核心肌肉。向右扭动躯干，将重量带向右侧地面。稍作停顿，然后向左扭动躯干，将重量朝向左侧地面。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在斜方肌或后三角肌上。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，同时将臀部往后放下，就像坐在椅子上一样。往下推，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。用脚跟踩地站起，顶端收紧臀肌。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing away from your body. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward by contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双手张开比肩宽，握杠铃时用过手握法。让杠铃悬挂在大腿前的臂长处，手掌朝外。保持上臂静止，呼气并通过收缩肱二头肌向上弯曲杠铃。继续抬起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢开始将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Keeping your core engaged and back straight, exhale as you lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手略宽于肩宽，握杠铃时用过手握法。让杠铃悬挂在大腿前方，双臂完全伸展。保持核心收紧并背部挺直，呼气时将杠铃直举向下巴，肘部先行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and slowly curl the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your wrists straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在最高档位下将一根直杆连接到拉绳机上。站立时双脚与肩同宽，面向器械。用下手握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气，缓慢将杠铃向下弯曲，向大腿方向弯曲，保持手腕笔直。动作结束时暂停片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall. Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat. Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles. Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm.
中文描述: 站在墙上，双脚与肩同宽。一只手臂伸直，手掌贴在墙上。收紧核心，身体前倾，保持手臂伸直，背部平放。慢慢用手掌顶墙，激活背阔肌。保持姿势几秒钟，然后松开，另一只手臂重复。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly flared out. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴近长凳。用宽握力握住杠铃，稍宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起，双臂完全伸展，正好举在胸前。杠铃缓慢地向下放向胸部，肘部略微张开。当杠铃触及胸部时暂停片刻，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body. Once your chest is just above the ground, explosively push yourself up, lifting your hands off the ground. As you push up, quickly move your hands out to the sides and slightly forward, allowing your body to drop down towards the ground. Catch yourself with your hands in the wider position and immediately lower your chest towards the ground again. Repeat the push-up motion, dropping down and catching yourself with your hands in the narrower position. Continue alternating between the wider and narrower hand positions for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚并拢。胸部向下贴近地面，肘部紧贴身体。当胸部刚好离地时，爆发性地向上推，双手离地。向上推时，迅速将双手向两侧并稍微向前移动，让身体向地面下沉。用双手在较宽的位置稳住自己，然后立即将胸部再次放向地面。重复俯卧撑动作，下蹲，双手保持在较窄的位置。继续在宽手和窄手位置之间交替，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips. Slide your butt off the bench and straighten your legs in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳或椅子的边缘，双手握住靠近臀部的边缘。将臀部从长凳上滑下，双腿伸直，脚跟保持着地。弯曲肘部，身体向地面下放，背部紧贴长凳。在底部稍作停顿，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle attachment is at the lowest setting. Lie face down on the bench with your legs straight and the ankle attachment secured to your ankles. Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability. Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings. Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整滑轮机，使脚踝连接点调到最低档位。趴在长凳上，双腿伸直，脚踝连接固定在脚踝上。握紧长凳把手以保持稳定。保持上半身不动，呼气，通过屈膝将双腿向臀部弯曲。动作结束时稍作停顿，收紧腿后肌群。吸气，缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and rest your elbow against the inside of your thigh. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用下手握住拉索把手，肘部靠在大腿内侧。保持上臂不动，呼气并将拉索把手向肩膀弯曲，同时收缩肱二头肌。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将拉索把手放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在一台拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用反手握住拉索连接件，手掌朝上，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并通过收缩肱二头肌将拉索连接件向肩膀弯曲。动作结束时暂停片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将拉索连接放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up a stability ball at an incline angle. Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys of a cable machine. Sit on the stability ball facing away from the machine, with your feet firmly planted on the ground. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward. Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged. With a controlled motion, bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Continue the motion until your arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在斜角设置一个稳定球。将钢索把手连接到滑轮机的高滑轮上。坐在稳定球上，背对机器，双脚稳稳踩地。用过握握住钢索把手，手掌朝前。稍微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。控制性地将手臂向两侧伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。继续动作，直到双臂与地面平行。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope handle with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Keep your elbows slightly bent and pull the rope towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索把手连接到低滑轮机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握住绳柄，手掌相对。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部前倾，保持背部挺直。肘部微弯曲，将绳子拉向胸前，肩胛骨紧贴。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight. Lower your body by bending your knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右脚向前迈一步，保持背部挺直。弯曲膝盖，身体降低，直到右大腿与地面平行。用右脚跟推回起始位置。左腿重复。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，双脚稳固，头部低于臀部。用略宽于肩宽的过握握法握住杠铃。卸下杠铃，缓慢地将杠铃放向胸部，保持肘部收紧。在底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height. Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, with your palms facing down and your elbows fully extended. Grab the cable handles with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整拉绳机，使牧师弯举垫与胸口齐高。坐在牧师弯举凳上，将上臂放在垫子上，手掌朝下，肘部完全伸展。用下手握住拉绳把手，与肩同宽。保持上臂静止，呼气，将把手向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。动作结束时暂停片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将手柄放回起始位置，肘部完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher curl pad. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Slowly curl the cable handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm against the pad. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
中文描述: 调整拉圈机，使牧师弯举垫与胸前齐高。站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住拉绳把手，并将上臂贴在讲道者弯举垫上。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。慢慢将拉绳把手向肩膀弯曲，保持上臂贴着垫子。动作顶端暂停片刻，收紧肱二头肌。慢慢将拉绳把手放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。换臂，重复该动作。

英文描述: Adjust the cable pulldown machine so that the seat is at a comfortable height and the knee pad is secured. Sit on the seat with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly and engage your core. Pull the cable bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整拉绳机，使座椅处于舒适高度，护膝固定好。坐直背部，双脚平放在地上。用上手握住拉绳杆，间距略宽于肩宽。稍微向后倾斜，收紧核心。将拉绳杆向下拉向胸部，同时将肩胛骨紧紧收紧。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and push the bar down until your elbows are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一把直杆连接到高滑轮钢索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖略微弯曲。用过手握把，双手与肩同宽。肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气，将杠铃向下推，直到肘部完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down. Engage your core and keep your back straight as you exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position while inhaling. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一根直杆连接到高滑轮拉索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握法握住杠铃，保持手臂伸直，手掌朝下。呼气时收紧核心，保持背部挺直，并将杠铃向下压向大腿。在底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置，同时吸气。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a handle to a low pulley cable machine and stand facing away from the machine. Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Keeping your elbows stationary, pull the handle back towards your body, squeezing your triceps at the end of the movement. Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将手柄连接到低滑轮机上，背对机器站立。用过手握住手柄，双臂伸直在身前。保持肘部不动，将手柄向身体方向拉，动作结束时收紧三头肌。慢慢将手柄恢复到起始位置，重复到所需次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your arms straight and your elbows close to your sides. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the cable handle towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握住拉索把手，手掌朝下。保持手臂伸直，肘部靠近身体两侧。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将拉索把手拉向身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将拉索把手放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a plank position with your hands on the wheel and your body straight. Engage your core and start rolling the wheel forward by extending your arms. Continue rolling until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead. Reverse the movement by pulling the wheel back towards your body, using your core and arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从平板支撑姿势开始，双手握着轮子，身体挺直。收紧核心，伸展手臂开始向前滚动轮子。继续滚动直到身体完全伸展，双臂举过头顶。反向移动，用核心和手臂将轮子拉回身体方向。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight. Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands. Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground. Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直，背部挺直。将弹力带绕在腰间，双手握住两端。收紧腹部，缓慢将躯干向一侧扭转，保持背部挺直，双脚着地。扭转结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。将扭转动作换到另一侧。继续交替转动，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise. Pull the rope down towards your thighs, squeezing your biceps. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the rope back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳子连接到拉索机，设置到最高档。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握法握住绳索，手掌朝下。整个动作过程中保持背部挺直，核心保持收紧。将绳子向下拉向大腿，收紧肱二头肌。在底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开绳子。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps. Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在拉索机上安装V形杆附件，设置最高档位。站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用过握握法握住V型杆，手掌朝下，双手与肩同宽。整个动作过程中肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。在将V型杆向下推时，收紧肱三头肌并呼气，直到手臂完全伸展。动作结束时暂停片刻，收紧肱三头肌。吸气时缓慢将V型杆恢复到起始位置，保持控制。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall or sturdy object with your feet hip-width apart. Hold the ends of the rope in each hand and place the middle of the rope around the ball of your right foot. Step back with your left foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight. Lean forward, keeping your back straight, and gently pull on the rope to stretch your calf. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the other leg.
中文描述: 站在墙上或坚固物体前，双脚与髋部同宽。双手握住绳索两端，将绳子中间绕在右脚脚掌周围。左脚后退，脚跟保持地面，腿保持伸直。身体前倾，保持背部挺直，轻轻拉绳子以拉伸小腿。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后松开。另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended towards the ceiling. Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, creating a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees. Engage your core and lower back to press your lower back into the ground. Slowly lower your right arm and left leg towards the ground, keeping them straight and hovering just above the floor. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the movement with your left arm and right leg. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双臂朝向天花板伸展。弯曲膝盖，抬起双腿离地，在臀部和膝盖形成90度角。收紧核心和下背部，将下背部压向地面。慢慢将右臂和左腿向地面放下，保持伸直，悬停在地面上方。暂停片刻，然后回到起始位置。用左臂和右腿重复动作。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands close together, forming a diamond shape with your thumbs and index fingers.
