Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core and glutes. Lower your chest towards the diamond shape formed by your hands, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手靠近，拇指和食指形成菱形。保持身体从头到脚保持直线，核心和臀部发力。胸部向下，靠近双手形成的菱形，肘部紧贴身体。在底部稍作停顿，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward. Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在有背部支撑的长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，保持肩膀高度，手掌朝向身体，肘部弯曲。将哑铃向上按压，直到手臂完全伸展，手掌朝前。举起时旋转手腕，使动作顶端手掌朝前。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a lunge position with your right foot forward and your left foot back. Place your hands on the ground on either side of your right foot. Lower your left knee to the ground and extend your right leg, keeping your right foot flat on the ground. Rotate your torso to the right, reaching your right arm up towards the ceiling. Hold this position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position. Switch sides and repeat the stretch with your left foot forward.
中文描述: 从弓步姿势开始，右脚向前，左脚向后。双手分别放在右脚两侧的地面上。左膝跪地，右腿伸直，保持右脚平放在地面。将躯干向右旋转，右臂向上伸展。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始位置。换侧，左脚向前重复拉伸动作。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the highest position. Sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable attachment with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Pull the cable attachment down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the cable back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整滑轮机，使滑轮处于最高位置。坐着面向机器，双脚平放在地面，膝盖微微弯曲。用过握握住钢索连接件，双手略宽于肩宽。稍微向后倾斜，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。将钢索连接拉向胸部，双肩胛骨紧缩。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后缓慢松开钢索回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Let your arms hang straight down towards the floor, with your elbows slightly bent. Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。双臂直垂向地面，肘部微微弯曲。将哑铃拉向胸前，双肩胛骨紧夹。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。保持肘部靠近躯干，上臂保持静止。呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢开始将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells across your body towards your opposite shoulder. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持肘部靠近躯干，上臂保持静止。呼气并收缩肱二头肌，同时将哑铃横跨身体，向对侧肩膀方向移动。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight up over your chest. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement. Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，头部低于臀部。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对，双臂直伸过胸前。将哑铃向两侧放下，形成一个宽弧线，直到你感觉胸部有拉伸感。当你放下哑铃时，扭转手腕，使手掌在动作底部朝前。反向动作，将哑铃收回起始位置，在顶部收紧胸肌。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂不动，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个斜坡长凳摆成45度角。坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。躺在长凳上，将哑铃按到起始位置，正好在胸口上方。将哑铃向两侧放下，形成一个宽弧线，直到你感觉胸部有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后收紧胸肌，将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the incline bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个斜长凳以45度角摆好。坐在健身球上，向前滚动直到上背部靠在斜坡凳上。双手各握一个哑铃，双手掌心相对，双臂伸直在胸前。将哑铃向两侧放下，形成一个宽弧线，直到你感觉胸部有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后收紧胸肌，将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward. Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，一手拿哑铃，双脚平放在地上。慢慢将双脚向前移动，滚动球，直到头部、颈部和上背部都被球支撑。哑铃保持在肩膀高度，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down facing up on a mat. Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your thighs towards your chest. While keeping your upper body stable, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the mat. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将钢索连接到低滑轮，俯卧在垫子上。双手握住钢索，双臂直伸向天花板。弯曲膝盖，抬起双腿，将大腿靠近胸前。保持上半身稳定的同时，将骨盆向胸部弯曲，抬起臀部离开垫子。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your chest facing down and your arms extended straight down, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Rotate your palms so they are facing up. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you rotate your palms to face down. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，胸部朝下，双臂伸直，双手各握一个哑铃。旋转手掌朝上。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时将手掌旋转至向下。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders by contracting your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂不动，通过收缩前臂将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms extended straight up over your chest. Slowly lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴着长凳。双手各握一个哑铃，保持中性握法（手掌相对），双臂直伸过胸前。慢慢将哑铃向下放向胸部，肘部靠近身体。在底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握着哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。将右肘抬向身体侧面，保持90度弯曲。右臂向后伸直，动作顶端收紧肱三头肌。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down. Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着哑铃，手掌朝向身体。整个动作过程中保持背部挺直，核心发力。将哑铃抬向一侧，保持手臂伸直，掌心朝下。继续举起，直到手臂与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. As you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upward, jumping off the ground. While in the air, quickly switch the position of your feet, landing with your opposite foot forward. Immediately lower your body back into a squat position and repeat the jump, switching your feet again. Continue alternating the position of your feet with each jump for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，分布在身侧。通过弯曲膝盖并向后推臀部，将身体降低到深蹲姿势。当你到达深蹲底部时，向地面爆发，跳起。在空中时，迅速改变双脚位置，落地时另一只脚向前。立刻将身体放回深蹲姿势，重复跳跃，同时换脚。每次跳跃时，继续交替调整脚的位置，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and dumbbells in each hand, resting on your thighs. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball until your lower back is supported on the ball and your knees are at a 90-degree angle. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握哑铃，哑铃放在大腿上。慢慢将双脚向前移动，滚动健身球，直到下背部支撑在球上，膝盖呈90度角。将哑铃举到肩膀高度，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline. Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将长凳调整为45度倾斜。趴在长凳上，胸口和腹部靠着长凳。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝下，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续加重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a barbell with a close grip. Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to press the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，头部低于脚，紧握杠铃。弯曲肘部，保持上臂静止，将杠铃向下放向额头。稍作停顿，然后伸展双臂将杠铃按回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心发力。双臂向两侧举起，直到与地面平行，肘部保持轻微弯曲。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一根直杆连接到低滑轮拉索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用下手握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。整个动作过程中肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气，将杠铃向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing towards your feet. Extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Slowly lower the dumbbells towards your chest, allowing your elbows to flare out to the sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲。双手各握一个哑铃，双手握持，手掌朝向脚部。双臂直伸向天花板，肘部保持轻微弯曲。慢慢将哑铃向下放向胸部，使肘部向两侧张开。在底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip. Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, fully extended. Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。坐在长椅上，胸贴靠背，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，采用下手握法。身体前倾，双臂直直垂下，完全伸展。把哑铃拉向胸口，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards, and raise them to shoulder height. Press one dumbbell up overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height. Lower the raised dumbbell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other dumbbell up overhead. Continue alternating between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，背挺直，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内，抬起至肩膀高度。将一个哑铃举过头顶，另一个哑铃保持在肩膀高度。将举起的哑铃降回肩高，同时将另一只哑铃举过头顶。继续在手臂之间交替，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs. Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge. Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle. Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地上，哑铃放在大腿上。将一只脚放在高起的表面上，比如台阶或木块，脚跟悬在边缘。用锤握握法握哑铃，也就是双手相对，手指环绕着手柄。保持核心收紧，背部挺直，慢慢通过脚掌球部将脚跟抬高到最高。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到想要的重复次数，然后换到另一条腿。

英文描述: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, keeping your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell in your top hand, with your arm extended straight down towards the ground. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your heels. While maintaining the side plank position, lift the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 先侧卧，双腿伸展并叠放在一层。将前臂放在肩膀正下方的地面上，肘部保持90度弯曲。用上手握住哑铃，手臂直伸向地面。收紧核心，抬起臀部，从头部到脚跟形成一条直线。保持侧平板支撑姿势的同时，将哑铃抬向天花板，双肩胛骨紧紧挤压。将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Stand on the edge of a step or platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on a wall or railing for support. Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down below the step. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
中文描述: 站在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空，脚趾踩在台阶上。一只手拿哑铃，另一只手放在墙上或栏杆上支撑。将脚跟抬得尽可能高，将身体抬起，踮起脚尖。在踏板顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回台阶下方。重复到想要的重复次数，然后换到另一条腿。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Engage your triceps and slowly push the bar down until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在最高档位下，把一根直杆连接到钢索机上。站在有线电视机前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住杠铃，手掌朝上，双手与肩同宽。整个动作过程中，肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。收紧肱三头肌，慢慢将杠铃向下推，直到手臂完全伸展。在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand. Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot slightly off the ground. Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips and lower the dumbbell towards the ground. At the same time, extend your right leg straight behind you, maintaining a slight bend in your left knee. Lower the dumbbell until your torso and right leg are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，右手握哑铃。将重心转移到左腿上，右脚略微抬离地面。保持背部挺直，髋部向前折叠，哑铃向下放下。同时，右腿伸直向身后，保持左膝轻微弯曲。将哑铃放低，直到躯干和右腿与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后收紧臀肌和腿后腱，恢复起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground. Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body. Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一只手握着哑铃。腰部前倾，保持背部笔直并与地面平行。手臂向后伸直，肘部靠近身体。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face towards you at the bottom of the movement. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then reverse the movement by pressing the dumbbells back up to the starting position. As you press the dumbbells up, twist your wrists back to the starting position with palms facing away from you. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部贴着长凳。双手各握一个哑铃，双手上握，手掌朝外。双臂直伸过胸前，肘部保持轻微弯曲。将哑铃向下放向胸部，肘部靠近身体。放下哑铃时，扭转手腕，使手掌朝向动作的底部。在底部暂停片刻，然后反转动作，将哑铃按回起始位置。按哑铃向上时，将手腕扭回起始位置，手掌朝向背向。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips. Slide your hips forward off the bench and straighten your legs, keeping your heels on the ground. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子的边缘，双手紧握臀部旁的边缘。从长凳上向前滑动臀部，伸直双腿，保持脚跟着地。弯曲肘部，身体向地面下放，背部紧贴长凳。在底部稍作停顿，然后用手撑直手臂，将身体抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides. Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Repeat the movement with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌向内，双臂向下伸展。收紧核心，慢慢抬起一只手臂朝肩膀方向，肘部保持微微弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。用另一只手重复同样的动作。继续交替挥臂，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall. Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing forward. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides. Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 背靠墙站立，在下背部和墙之间放置一个健身球。双脚与肩同宽，脚趾朝前。双手各握一个哑铃，双臂伸展到身体两侧。抬起脚跟，将身体重量抬起到脚掌上。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet. Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，头部低于脚。握紧EZ杠铃，双手相对。双臂直伸至胸前，肘部靠近身体。弯曲肘部，将杠铃向下放向额头。暂停片刻，然后将杠铃重新按回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the ez barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴着长凳。用过手握法握住eZ杠铃，稍宽于肩宽。将杠铃放到胸前，肘部紧贴身体。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down. Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住拉绳把手，手掌朝下。保持肘部靠近身体侧面，慢慢将前臂向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your fingers towards your palms, squeezing the barbell tightly. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly release your fingers back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，双手握杠铃，手掌朝上。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬在杠铃边缘。慢慢将手指向掌心弯曲，紧握杠铃。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢松开手指回到起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable machine to the low pulley. Attach a rope handle to the cable machine and sit on the incline bench facing the machine. Grab the rope handle with an overhand grip and lean forward, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms fully, pulling the rope towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement. Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 以45度角架设一个斜坡，并将拉索机连接到低滑轮上。在拉索机上连接绳索把手，坐在面向机器的斜坡凳上。用过手握住绳索把手，身体前倾，保持背部挺直。双臂完全伸展，将绳索拉向上胸部，同时保持肘部靠近身体。动作结束时将肩胛骨紧紧收紧。慢慢释放紧张，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back straight. As you lower your body, lift your feet off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest. Hold this position for a few seconds, then extend your legs back out and push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，双脚并拢。弯曲肘部，身体向下，保持背部挺直。身体下放时，抬起双脚离地，膝盖向胸前。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后双腿伸展，推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. Keeping your body straight, lift your legs up until they are parallel to the ground. Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for 10-20 seconds. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用过手握法悬挂在引体向上杠上，手掌朝向背对。收紧核心，向下拉肩胛骨并向后拉。保持身体挺直，抬起双腿直到与地面平行。尽可能长时间保持这个姿势，目标是10-20秒。慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe. Engage your core and glutes to maintain a stable position. Rotate your torso to the right, lifting your right arm and extending it towards the ceiling. Keep your hips and legs stable as you twist. Hold for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the twist on the left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手直接放在肩膀下方，身体从头到脚保持直线。用力锻炼核心和臀大肌，保持稳定的姿势。将躯干向右旋转，抬起右臂并向天花板伸展。扭转时保持臀部和腿部稳定。保持片刻，然后回到起始位置。左侧重复扭转动作。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to an appropriate weight. Stand on the sled machine with one foot, keeping the other foot off the ground. Hold onto the handles for stability. Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up on the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch legs and repeat the exercise.
中文描述: 将雪橇机调整到合适的重量。一只脚站在雪橇机上，另一只脚保持离地。握紧把手以保持稳定。将脚跟抬得尽可能高，用脚掌掌托起身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。换腿重复动作。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 悬挂在引体向上杆上，双臂完全伸展，手掌朝向背对自己。收紧核心，抬膝向胸前，同时将躯干向一侧扭转。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢把双腿放回起始位置。反过来重复，将躯干向相反方向扭转。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Allow the kettlebell to hang down between your legs, with your arm fully extended. In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while pulling the kettlebell up towards your shoulder. As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist so that the bottom of the kettlebell is facing up. Catch the kettlebell at shoulder height with your elbow bent and your palm facing up. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握壶铃，采用上握。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直，胸部挺直。让壶铃悬挂在双腿之间，手臂完全伸展。在一个流畅的动作中，爆发性地伸展你的臀部和膝盖，同时将壶铃拉向肩膀。当壶铃达到肩高时，旋转手腕，使壶铃底部朝上。在肩膀高度接住壶铃，肘部弯曲，手掌朝上。通过反转动作将壶铃降回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your glutes back. Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。把杠铃横跨上背部，放在斜方肌上。保持背部挺直，臀部向前折叠，臀部向后推。将躯干降低至与地面平行，感受腿后肌腱的拉伸。用力臀部和腿筋，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将哑铃举至肩高，肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展过头顶。将哑铃降回肩高。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell close to your chest with both hands. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将壶铃靠近胸口。保持胸部抬起并收紧核心，通过弯曲膝盖和臀部，身体下放到深蹲姿势。继续降低，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands. Lift your left foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground. Slowly lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your right foot flat on the ground and your left leg extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将壶铃放在胸前。左脚离地并向前伸直，保持与地面平行。慢慢将身体放下进入深蹲姿势，右脚平放在地面，左腿伸直。深蹲到最低点暂停片刻，然后用右脚跟用力回归起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Adjust the seat and foot platform of the leverage machine to your desired position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the foot platform. Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability. Push one foot against the foot platform, extending your leg until it is almost fully straight. Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your leg and return to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整杠杆机的座椅和脚踏板，调整到你想要的位置。坐在机器上，背靠靠背，双脚放在脚踏平台上。双手放在机器的把手或侧面以保持稳定。一只脚踩在脚踏板上，伸直腿直到几乎完全伸直。稍作停顿，然后缓慢弯曲腿，回到起始位置。另一条腿重复。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine. Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Pull the v-bar towards your abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the weight back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，面向机器。用过手握住V形杆，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。将V形杆拉向腹部，双肩胛骨紧贴。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将重量放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine. Place your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your chest is pressed against it. Grasp the handles with a hammer grip (palms facing each other). Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，并将自己放在杠杆机上。将上臂放在讲道垫上，确保胸部紧贴着它。用锤握（手掌相对）握住把手。保持上臂静止，呼气并将把手向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将把手放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle. Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead. Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索连接到高滑轮上，并将斜坡调整到舒适的角度。站立时背对滑轮，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握法抓住绳索，双臂伸直过头顶。整个练习过程中肘部靠近头部，上臂保持静止。通过弯曲肘部，将绳子放到头后，直到前臂接触肱二头肌。暂停片刻，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest. Place your legs on the lever pad, just above your ankles. Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support. Keeping your upper body still, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整机器以适应你的身体，然后靠着靠背坐下。把双腿放在杠杆垫上，刚好在脚踝上方。抓住机器两侧的把手以提供支撑。保持上半身静止，呼气，双腿向臀部弯曲。在顶部稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height so that your feet are flat on the ground and your knees are at a 90-degree angle. Grasp the handles of the leverage machine with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended. Slowly lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，使双脚平放在地面，膝盖呈90度角。握紧杠杆机的手柄，手掌朝下，双臂完全伸展。慢慢弯曲肘部，使身体下垂，直到上臂与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂，将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight in front of you. Keeping your arms straight, slowly raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，面向电缆机，双脚平放在地上。用过手握住钢索把手，双臂伸直在身前。保持手臂伸直，慢慢向两侧抬起，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent. Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，将自己放在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚平放在地板上。握把时保持平行，手掌相对，手臂微微弯曲。呼气，双手紧拢肩胛骨，将把手向后并向外拉开，远离身体。在收缩峰值停顿片刻，然后吸气，慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整杠杆机的座椅高度和靠背，使其舒适。坐在机器上，背靠靠背，双脚平放在地板上。用过手握把，稍宽于肩宽。把手柄向上和向前推，直到手臂完全伸展但不锁住。在顶部稍作停留，然后慢慢将手柄放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level. Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest. Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将药球放在胸前。向前伸出双臂，将药球从胸前推开。停顿片刻，然后慢慢将药球收回胸前。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level. Step forward with your right foot and simultaneously push the medicine ball forward, extending your arms fully. As you push the ball forward, release it and let it roll forward. Quickly run forward and catch the ball before it hits the ground. Once you catch the ball, bring it back to your chest and repeat the movement with your left foot forward. Continue alternating legs and repeating the exercise for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，胸部高度握着药球。右脚向前迈步，同时将药球向前推，双臂完全伸展。当你向前推球时，放开它，让它向前滚动。迅速向前跑，在球落地前接住。接球后，将球带回胸前，左脚向前重复动作。继续交替双腿，重复练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed. Tilt your head to one side, bringing your ear towards your shoulder. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Repeat on the other side. Perform 2-4 sets on each side.
中文描述: 站直或坐直，肩膀放松。把头倾向一侧，耳朵靠近肩膀。保持拉伸15-30秒。反复一遍。每侧各做2-4组。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your buttocks back as if you were trying to touch the wall behind you with your glutes. Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by squeezing your glutes and pushing your hips forward. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃放在上背部。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，臀部向前扭转，臀部向后推，就像用臀肌触碰身后的墙壁一样。将躯干降低至与地面平行，感受腿后肌腱的拉伸。稍作停顿，然后通过收紧臀部并向前推臀部回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows. Pull the cable ropes towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用上手握住钢索绳，双手相对。保持背部挺直，身体微微前倾，肘部保持轻微弯曲。把钢索拉向身体，把肩胛骨挤在一起。在动作高潮处暂停片刻，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it behind your head. Engage your abs and slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在钢索机上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲。双手握住钢索把手，并将其放在头后。收紧腹部，缓慢将上半身向前弯曲，胸部向膝盖收紧。在顶部稍作停留，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Extend your arm fully, allowing the towel to hang in front of you. Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲，单手握着毛巾。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。把手臂完全伸直，让毛巾垂在你面前。把毛巾拉向胸前，把肩胛骨挤在一起。在顶部稍作停留，然后慢慢将毛巾放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold an Olympic barbell with an overhand grip. Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing your body. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，手持奥林匹克杠铃，采用过手握法。杠铃悬挂在大腿前方的臂长处，手掌朝向身体。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢地将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your arms by your sides. Take a step back with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot. Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position. As you lower into the lunge, simultaneously reach your arms overhead. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then return to the starting position by pushing through your left heel and bringing your right foot forward. Repeat the movement on the other side, stepping back with your left foot and bending your right knee. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽，双臂放在身侧。右脚后退一步，着地用脚掌。弯曲左膝，身体降低进入弓步姿势。在弓步下降时，同时将双臂举过头顶。弓步底部暂停片刻，然后通过左脚跟用力推回起始位置，右脚向前移动。在另一侧重复动作，左脚后退，右膝弯曲。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands. Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the tension on the rope and relax your foot. Repeat the stretch on the other leg.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直在前。把绳子绕在脚掌上，用手握住绳子的末端。轻轻拉绳子向你，屈曲脚部并拉伸小腿肌肉。保持拉伸20-30秒。放松绳索上的紧张，放松脚部。另一条腿重复拉伸。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. From the push-up position, pull your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，身体保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持身体直线，将胸部向下压向地面。用手掌推开手臂，然后回到起始位置。从俯卧撑姿势开始，弯曲肘部，保持身体挺直，将胸部拉向地面。用手掌推开手臂，然后回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes. Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将稳定球放在地上，身体俯卧，双手按在球上，肩宽分开。双腿伸直，脚尖站立。通过弯曲肘部，保持身体直线，收紧核心，将胸部向下贴近球。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子的边缘，双手握住边缘，手指指向前方。把屁股从长凳上滑下来，用手支撑体重。通过弯曲肘部，使上臂与地面平行，降低身体。通过伸直手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，膝盖放在垫子下方，双脚平放在地面上。用下手握把，间距略宽于肩宽。坐直，胸部挺直，肩膀后挺，保持下背部轻微拱起。把手柄往胸口方向拉，把肩胛骨挤压在一起。在动作底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing each other, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips. Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles. Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在钢索机上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖微微弯曲。用过握握法握住V型杆连接件，双手相对，双手与肩同宽。保持背部挺直，臀部稍微前倾。通过收回肩胛骨并收紧背部肌肉，将V形杆拉向躯干。在宫缩高峰时暂停片刻，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart. Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support. Slowly lean forward, shifting your weight onto your hands and extending your legs behind you. Keep your back straight and engage your glutes as you push your hips back and up towards the ceiling. Hold this position for a few seconds, feeling a stretch in your glutes. Slowly return to the starting position by bending your knees and lowering your hips back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先跪在地上，膝盖与臀部同宽。把手放在你面前的地面上支撑。慢慢向前倾，将重心转移到手上，双腿向后伸展。保持背部挺直，同时用力用臀大肌，同时将臀部向后推向天花板。保持这个姿势几秒钟，感受臀部的拉伸。慢慢地通过弯曲膝盖并放下臀部，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the roller with both hands in front of your body. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms forward and roll the roller down towards your feet, feeling a stretch in your lats. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly roll the roller back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住滚筒，举在身体前方。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。双臂向前伸直，将滚轮向脚部滚动，感受背阔肌的拉伸感。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后慢慢将滚筒滚回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed. Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet. Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance. Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.
中文描述: 先站直，双脚与髋部同宽。收紧核心，保持上半身放松。开始原地慢跑，抬膝向胸前，轻柔地落地。保持稳定的配速，并持续慢跑达到所需的时间或距离。记得在整个锻炼过程中深呼吸并保持良好姿势。

英文描述: Sit on a flat bench with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground. Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support. Keeping your legs straight, slowly raise them up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在平坦的长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。双手放在长凳两侧以提供支撑。保持双腿伸直，慢慢抬起双腿，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放下至起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in a wide angle. Flex your feet and engage your quadriceps. Place your hands on the ground behind you for support. Keeping your back straight, lean forward from your hips. Continue leaning forward until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Hold this position for a few breaths. Slowly release the stretch and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿大角度伸展。屈伸双脚并收紧股四头肌。双手放在身后地面以提供支撑。保持背部挺直，臀部向前倾。继续前倾，直到感觉腿后肌腱被拉伸。保持这个姿势几次呼吸。慢慢松开拉伸，回到起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on a leg curl machine with your legs extended and your ankles hooked under the padded lever. Place your hands on the side handles of the machine for support. Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs upward as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings. Slowly lower your legs back to the starting position while inhaling. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴在腿弯举机上，双腿伸展，脚踝勾在带软垫的杠杆下。双手放在机器侧面的把手上以获得支撑。保持上半身不动，呼气并尽可能将双腿向上弯曲。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧腿后肌群。慢慢将双腿放回起始位置，同时吸气。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips. Shift your weight to one leg and lift the opposite leg out to the side, keeping it straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手放在臀部。将重心转移到一条腿上，另一条腿向侧面抬起，保持伸直。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将腿放回起始位置。反复重复。继续左右交替，重复次数达到所需。

英文描述: Attach a rope to a cable machine and set it to the lowest position. Lie on the floor facing up, with your head towards the cable machine. Hold the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Keep your upper arms stationary and slowly lower the rope towards your forehead, bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳子连接到拉索机上，并将其放到最低的位置。躺在地上，面向上方，头朝向拉索机。双手握住绳索，手掌相对，双臂直伸向天花板。保持上臂不动，缓慢将绳子放向额头，肘部弯曲。稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on your side with your legs straight and your bottom arm extended straight overhead. Bend your top knee and place your foot on the ground in front of your bottom leg. Reach your top arm over your head and grab onto something stable, like a wall or a piece of furniture. Slowly lift your bottom leg off the ground, keeping it straight, until you feel a stretch in your side. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down. Repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 侧躺，双腿伸直，下臂伸直过头顶。弯曲上膝，脚放在下腿前方的地面上。将上臂举过头顶，抓住稳定的东西，比如墙壁或家具。慢慢抬起下腿，保持伸直，直到感觉侧腹有拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后慢慢放下腿。另一侧重复。

英文描述: Sit on a bench facing a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and knees slightly bent. Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your arm fully extended in front of you. Pull the handle towards your body, retracting your shoulder blade and keeping your elbow close to your side. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your back muscles. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，面向一台拉绳机，双脚平放在地上，膝盖微微弯曲。单手握住手柄，手臂完全伸展在身前。将手柄拉向身体，收回肩胛骨，保持肘部靠近身体侧面。动作结束时稍作停顿，收紧背部肌肉。慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。另一只手臂重复。交替双臂重复，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold a weight plate or dumbbell on your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your shoulder blades are off the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。胸前放一个哑铃或哑铃。用力收紧腹肌，抬起上半身，向前蜷曲直到肩胛骨离地。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用上手握法抓住引体向上杠铃，间距略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在杠铃上。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，肘部紧贴身体。继续拉直到下巴高于杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a weight in front of your chest or on your shoulders. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Push through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾略微向外。将重物放在胸前或肩膀上。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，同时将臀部向下和向后，就像坐在椅子上一样。往下推，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。用脚跟撑起身，在顶部收紧臀部。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Kneel on the floor and place the wheel roller in front of you. Place your hands on the handles of the wheel roller and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Engage your core muscles and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your abs tight. Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees, maintaining control and keeping your abs engaged. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 跪在地上，将轮子滚筒放在你面前。双手放在轮子滚筒的把手上，双臂伸直在身前。激活核心肌群，缓慢地将轮子向前滚动，保持背部挺直，腹部紧绷。继续向前滚动，直到身体完全伸展，双臂举过头顶。暂停片刻，然后缓慢将轮子向膝盖方向滚动，保持控制并保持腹肌发力。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level. Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将铁匠机杆的高度调整到腰部高度。站在铁匠机前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气，将杠铃向上弯曲，向肩膀方向弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。动作顶端暂停，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复直到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Bring your right knee towards your right elbow, keeping it off the ground. As you bring your right knee back, simultaneously lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows. Push back up to the starting position and repeat with your left knee towards your left elbow. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚并拢。将右膝向右肘方向，保持离地。当你将右膝向后收起时，同时弯曲肘部，身体向下降低。再推回起始位置，重复左膝向左肘方向。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and your back straight. Hold a cable handle with one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while exhaling. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position while inhaling. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一只手握住钢索把手，肘部放在大腿内侧，膝盖上方。保持上臂不动，呼气时将钢索把手向肩膀弯曲。动作结束时停顿片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气时慢慢将钢索把手放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bosu ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended down by your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在bosu球上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展到身体两侧。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height, parallel to the ground. Rotate your torso to the right, keeping your arms extended and your back straight. As you rotate, extend your right arm forward and your left arm back, mimicking the motion of drawing a bowstring. Hold the position for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the motion, this time rotating your torso to the left and extending your left arm forward and your right arm back. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂伸直，肩高，平行于地面。将躯干向右旋转，保持手臂伸展，背部挺直。旋转时，右臂向前伸展，左臂向后伸展，模仿拉弓弦的动作。保持姿势片刻，然后回到起始位置。重复这个动作，这次将躯干向左旋转，左臂向前伸展，右臂向后伸展。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides. Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，面向拉索机，双脚平放在地面。用下手握住拉索连接件，手掌朝上，双手与肩同宽。保持上臂不动，肘部靠近身体两侧。呼气，将拉索连接向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。动作结束时暂停片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将拉索连接放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position to ensure proper alignment. Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available. Start pedaling at a comfortable pace. Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance as desired. Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and proper posture. Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your workout. Gradually decrease the resistance and slow down before coming to a complete stop. Stretch your legs and cool down after the workout.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和位置，确保正确对齐。将脚放在踏板上，如果有绑带，将其固定好。开始以舒适的节奏踩踏。保持稳定节奏，并根据需要增加阻力。激活核心肌肉以保持稳定和正确姿势。在锻炼所需的时间内继续踩踏。逐渐降低阻力并放慢速度，然后再完全停止。锻炼后伸展双腿并放松。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Engage your abs and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them straight. As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards your opposite shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸直，双臂垂在身侧。双手放在臀肌下方以提供支撑。收紧腹部，双腿离地，保持伸直。抬腿时，将臀部向一侧扭转，双腿朝向对侧肩膀。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放下至起始位置。重复动作，这次将臀部扭向另一侧。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the stepmill machine to a comfortable level. Step onto the machine and place your hands on the handrails for support. Start walking by placing one foot on a step and then the other, alternating between legs. Maintain an upright posture and engage your core muscles. Continue walking for the desired duration or distance. Gradually increase the intensity or speed as you become more comfortable with the exercise. Remember to cool down and stretch after completing the exercise.
中文描述: 将步进磨机调整到舒适的水平。踏上机器，双手放在扶手上以提供支撑。开始行走时，先把一只脚放在台阶上，再把另一只脚放在两腿之间交替。保持直立姿势，激活核心肌肉。继续走到所需的时间或距离。随着你对锻炼的熟悉度提升，逐渐增加强度或速度。记得完成练习后要放松身体并进行拉伸。

英文描述: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders. Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward. Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off. Hold onto the bar for support. Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将铁匠机杆调整到肩膀下方的高度。站在杠铃上，双脚与臀部同宽，脚趾朝前。脚掌放在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空。握紧杠杆以提供支撑。将脚跟尽可能抬高，身体踮起脚尖。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight in front of you. Keeping your core engaged, slowly rotate your torso to one side, pulling the cable across your body. Pause for a moment at the end of the range of motion, then slowly rotate back to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在钢丝机上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖微微弯曲。双手握住钢索把手，双臂伸直在身前。保持核心收紧，缓慢将躯干向一侧旋转，拉动钢索横跨身体。在动作范围结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢旋转回起始位置。反复一遍。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Next, raise your arms in front of you until they are parallel to the ground, again keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心肌群发力。将双臂向两侧举起，直到与地面平行，肘部保持轻微弯曲。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。接着，将双臂举到与地面平行，肘部保持轻微弯曲。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on your side on a flat bench with your upper arm against your side and your elbow bent 90 degrees. Hold a dumbbell in your hand with your palm facing down. Keeping your upper arm against your side, slowly rotate your forearm upward as far as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 侧卧在平坦的长凳上，上臂贴近身体两侧，肘部弯曲90度。手握哑铃，手掌朝下。保持上臂贴近身体侧面，慢慢将前臂尽可能向上旋转。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝上，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Lower the dumbbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body. Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the dumbbell upwards in a straight line. As the dumbbell reaches shoulder height, quickly rotate your hand and punch it overhead, fully extending your arm. Catch the dumbbell overhead with a slight bend in your knees and hips. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握哑铃，采用过顶握法。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直，胸部挺直。将哑铃放向地面，保持靠近身体。爆发性地伸展你的臀部、膝盖和脚踝，将哑铃沿直线向上推。当哑铃达到肩高时，迅速旋转手掌，在头顶击打，手臂完全伸展。膝盖和臀部微微弯曲，在头顶接住哑铃。将哑铃以控制的方式放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you. Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support. Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body. Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor. Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable. Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position. Repeat the rotation with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴在稳定球上，臀部靠在球上，双腿伸直。把手放在你面前的地面上支撑。锻炼臀肌和核心肌群，以稳定身体。慢慢抬起一条腿，保持与地面平行。将腿向外旋转，远离身体，同时保持臀部和上半身稳定。旋转结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢将腿恢复到起始位置。用另一条腿重复旋转。继续交替做足，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart. Place your hands on the wall for support. Engage your core and lift your right knee up towards your chest, while keeping your left foot on the ground. Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee up towards your chest and lowering your right foot back down. Continue alternating legs in a running motion, bringing your knees up as high as possible. Maintain a fast pace and keep your upper body stable throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在墙上，双脚与臀部同宽。把手放在墙上支撑。收紧核心，将右膝抬向胸口，同时左脚保持地面。快速换腿，左膝抬向胸口，右脚再放下。继续交替双腿，保持跑步动作，膝盖尽可能抬高。保持快速节奏，保持上半身稳定。重复到所需的时长或重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart. Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you. Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe. Pause for a moment, then walk your hands back towards your feet, keeping your legs as straight as possible. Once your hands reach your feet, stand back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时站立，双脚与臀部同宽。腰部前倾，双手放在前方地面上。双手向前移动，直到你处于高平板支撑姿势，身体从头到脚保持直线。停顿片刻，然后把手移回脚边，尽量保持双腿笔直。当你的手碰到脚时，站回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground. Engaging your abs, lift your shoulders off the ground and reach your right hand towards your right heel. Return to the starting position and repeat on the left side, reaching your left hand towards your left heel. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双臂伸直，向两侧伸直，与地面平行。用力腹部，抬起肩膀，右手伸向右脚跟。回到起始位置，左侧重复，左手伸向左脚跟。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place one end of the band under your foot. Hold the other end of the band with your arm fully extended overhead, palm facing forward. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl your forearm towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，并将弹力带的一端放在脚下。握住弹力带的另一端，手臂完全伸直举过头顶，手掌朝前。保持上臂不动，前臂向肩膀弯曲，收紧肱二头肌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart. Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height. Step your right foot back, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight. Bend your left knee and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight and your heel on the ground. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
中文描述: 站在墙上，双脚与臀部同宽。双手放在墙上，肩膀高度。右脚向后退，脚跟着地，腿伸直。左膝弯曲，身体前倾，后腿保持伸直，脚跟着地。保持拉伸20-30秒。换腿重复拉伸动作。

英文描述: Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, with your body forming a straight line from head to heels. Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将双手放在一个高处，比如长凳或台阶，间距略大于肩宽。双腿向后伸展，脚掌着地，身体从头到脚跟形成一条直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，将胸部向下靠近高处。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. As you lunge forward, pass the kettlebell under your right thigh and transfer it to your left hand. Push off with your right foot to return to the starting position, while simultaneously passing the kettlebell back to your right hand. Repeat the lunge on the opposite side, passing the kettlebell under your left thigh. Continue alternating lunges and passing the kettlebell between hands for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将壶铃放在胸前。右脚向前迈步，身体降低进入弓步姿势。向前冲刺时，将壶铃从右大腿下方传递到左手。右脚蹬地回到起始位置，同时将壶铃传回右手。在相反侧重复弓步动作，壶铃从左大腿下方传递。继续交替弓步，壶铃在双手之间传递，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a vertical bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. As you pull yourself up, lean back slightly and bring your elbows towards your sides. Continue pulling until your chest reaches the bar and your elbows are fully bent. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先从悬挂在垂直杠上，手掌朝向背向，双臂完全伸展。收紧核心，将身体拉向杠铃，胸部先行。拉起身体时，稍微向后倾斜，肘部向身体两侧收起。继续拉，直到胸部触及杠铃，肘部完全弯曲。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢降回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your feet flexed. Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees. Place your hands on your hips or extend them out in front of you for balance. Engage your glutes and core muscles. Push your hips forward and squeeze your glutes as you lift your knees off the ground, extending your hips until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先跪在地上，膝盖与臀部同宽，双脚弯曲。将阻力带绕在大腿上，刚好在膝盖上方。双手放在臀部或伸直到前方以保持平衡。用力你的臀大肌和核心肌肉。将臀部向前推，收紧臀肌，抬起膝盖离地，伸展髋部直到大腿与地面平行。保持这个姿势片刻，然后慢慢将膝盖放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with one foot on a platform or slide board. Bend your knee slightly and slide the foot on the platform backward, extending your leg. Keep your core engaged and maintain a straight posture throughout the movement. Slowly return to the starting position by sliding your foot back to the initial position. Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 先用一只脚站在平台或滑板上。稍微弯曲膝盖，将脚在平台上向后滑动，伸直腿部。保持核心收紧，整个动作保持挺直的姿势。慢慢地通过将脚滑回初始位置回到起始位置。重复动作到指定次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the trap bar on the ground in front of you. Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the handles of the trap bar with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and chest up as you begin to lift the trap bar off the ground by extending your hips and knees. As you lift, focus on driving through your heels and squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement. Lower the trap bar back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，斜方杆放在你面前的地上。臀部和膝盖弯曲，降低身体，用上手握住斜方弯杆的把手。当你开始抬起斜方杆时，保持背部挺直，胸部挺直，伸展臀部和膝盖。举重时，专注于用脚跟驱动力，并在动作顶端收紧臀部。通过弯曲臀部和膝盖，将斜方杆放回地面，在整个动作过程中保持背部挺直。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing inwards. Keep your arms straight and lift them up and out to the sides, forming a 'Y' shape with your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手掌心朝内，将弹力带放在大腿前方。保持手臂伸直，抬起并向两侧伸展，形成一个“Y”字形。动作顶端将肩胛骨紧紧收紧。慢慢把手臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by sitting on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your hands on the sides of the stability ball for support. Engage your abs and slowly roll your hips forward, bringing your knees towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。将双手放在稳定球的两侧以获得支撑。收紧腹肌，缓慢地向前滚动臀部，将膝盖向胸前收起。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up a barbell on a squat rack at chest height. Stand facing away from the rack, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and step back, ensuring your feet are still shoulder-width apart. Lower your body down into a squat, keeping your knees in line with your toes. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在深蹲架上设置一个杠铃，位置与胸高齐。站立时背对架子，双脚与肩同宽。弯曲膝盖，身体下蹲，保持背部挺直，胸部挺直。用过手握法握杠铃，间距略大于肩宽。把杠铃从架子上抬起，后退一步，确保双脚仍然与肩同宽。将身体下蹲，保持膝盖与脚趾保持一致。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟蹬地回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie face down on the bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。趴在长凳上，胸口贴着垫子，双脚平放在地上。用过手握法握杠铃，间距略大于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心发力。将杠铃拉向胸口，将肩胛骨挤压在一起。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾略微向外。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在斜方肌或后三角肌上。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，缓慢弯曲膝盖并向后推臀部。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握紧钢索把手。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。慢慢在腰部侧弯，将钢索把手放向膝盖。稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。另一侧重复。交替进行所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet spread wide apart. Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders over your hands. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，双脚分开。收紧核心，缓慢将重心向前移，肩膀压在双手上方。弯曲肘部，身体向下贴地，肘部保持靠近身体两侧。在底部稍作停顿，然后用手撑直手臂，将身体抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you. Continue pulling yourself up until your chest reaches the bar, then pause for a moment. Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先挂在引体向上杠铃上，手掌朝向背对，双手略宽于肩宽。收紧核心，将身体拉向杠铃，胸部先行。达到动作顶点时，调整握法，使手掌朝向自己。继续拉自己直到胸部触及杠铃，然后稍作停顿。慢慢降回起始位置，保持控制。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a medicine ball with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and let your arms hang down by your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the medicine ball up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the medicine ball back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。用下手握法握住药球，手掌朝上，双臂垂在身侧。保持上臂静止，呼气，将药球向肩膀弯曲。在球顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将药球放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the barbell upwards. As the barbell reaches chest level, pull it upwards with your arm, keeping it close to your body. Rotate your elbow under the barbell and extend your arm fully overhead, locking out your elbow. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾略微向外。用上握握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。弯曲膝盖，降低臀部进入深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。爆发性地伸展臀部、膝盖和脚踝，将杠铃向上推。当杠铃达到胸口水平时，用手臂向上拉，保持杠铃靠近身体。将肘部旋转到杠铃下方，手臂完全伸展过头顶，锁定肘部。以控制的方式将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your thighs. Engage your core and slowly roll the barbell down towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your arms extended. Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your hands are directly above your head. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your thighs, maintaining control and keeping your core engaged. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双手握杠铃，放在大腿前方。收紧核心，慢慢将杠铃向下滚动，保持背部挺直，双臂伸展。继续将杠铃向前滚动，直到身体完全伸展，双手正好在头顶上方。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃向大腿方向滚动，保持控制并保持核心发力。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell at shoulder height with an overhand grip. Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the barbell overhead. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height as you lower back into the squat position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽，用过手握法将杠铃放在肩膀高度。通过弯曲膝盖并向后推臀部，降低到深蹲姿势。当你到达深蹲底部时，爆发力用脚跟支撑起身，同时将杠铃压过头顶。在你重新进入深蹲姿势时，将杠铃降回肩膀高度。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Position yourself under a bar or a sturdy horizontal surface that is at chest height. Grab the bar or surface with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Pull your chest towards the bar or surface by squeezing your shoulder blades together and bending your elbows. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar or surface. Lower yourself back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将自己置于一根横杆或与胸前齐平的坚固水平表面下。用过顶握法抓住杠铃或表面，间距略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，身体挺直。通过收紧肩胛骨并弯曲肘部，将胸部拉向杠铃或地面。继续拉，直到下巴高出杠杆或表面。控制着自己，重新回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by placing your hands on a raised surface, such as a bench or parallel bars, with your palms facing down and fingers pointing forward.
