Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides, until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，将双手放在高起的物体上，如长凳或平行杠，手掌朝下，手指向前。双腿向前伸展，脚跟着地，身体保持笔直。弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，直到上臂与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后用手掌撑直手臂，将身体抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet. Hold this position for the desired amount of time. Lower your hips back down to the ground and repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 先侧卧，双腿伸展并叠放。将前臂放在肩膀正下方的地面上，肘部弯曲成90度角。收紧核心，抬起臀部，形成一条从头到脚的直线。保持该姿势所需的时间。将臀部放回地面，另一侧重复此动作。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding onto a sturdy object or suspension trainer with your arms extended. Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and your knees behind your toes. From the squat position, pull your body up towards the object or suspension trainer, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂伸直握住结实的物体或支架。将身体降低到深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，膝盖置于脚趾后方。从深蹲姿势开始，将身体拉向物体或支架，双肩胛骨紧紧收拢。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a cable handle in one hand. Place the other hand on your hip. Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the hand holding the cable, keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着钢索把手。另一只手放在臀部。收紧核心，慢慢向握钢索的手侧倾，保持背部挺直。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you. Lean back slightly and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. Simultaneously, lift your upper body off the ground and reach your arms towards your legs. Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地板上，双腿伸直在前。稍微向后倾斜，抬起双腿，保持伸直。同时，抬起上半身离地，双臂伸向双腿。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将上半身和双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Extend your arms straight in front of you, gripping the bar or handles with a close grip. Pull the bar or handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。双臂伸直，紧握杠铃或把手。将杠铃或把手拉向身体，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢松开，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand in front of a box or platform with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and jump onto the box, landing softly with one foot on the box and the other foot hanging off the edge. Stabilize yourself on the box with the foot that is on it, while keeping the other foot off the ground. Hold this position for a few seconds, engaging your calf muscles to maintain balance. Slowly step down with the foot that is on the box, returning to the starting position. Repeat the exercise with the other leg.
中文描述: 站在箱子或平台前，双脚与肩同宽。弯曲膝盖，跳上箱子，一脚踩在箱子上，另一脚悬在边缘，轻柔落地。用站在箱子上的脚稳住身体，另一只脚保持离地。保持这个姿势几秒钟，用小腿肌肉保持平衡。慢慢用站在箱子上的脚往下踏，回到起始位置。用另一条腿重复动作。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Engage your core and lift your right foot off the ground, bringing your right knee towards your left elbow. Return your right foot to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left foot towards your right elbow. Continue alternating sides, moving at a controlled pace. Keep your hips level and avoid lifting your hips too high or sagging them too low. Maintain a steady breathing pattern throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手直接放在肩膀下方，身体保持直线。收紧核心，抬起右脚离地，右膝向左肘方向。右脚回到起始位置，左脚向右肘方向重复动作。继续交替移动，保持控制节奏。保持臀部水平，避免抬得太高或下垂过低。在整个动作过程中保持稳定的呼吸模式。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you. Bend your knees and bring the soles of your feet together, allowing your knees to fall out to the sides. Hold onto your ankles or feet with your hands. Sit up tall and lengthen your spine. Gently press your knees down towards the floor, feeling a stretch in your inner thighs. Hold this position for a few breaths. To release, slowly bring your knees back up and extend your legs.
中文描述: 坐在地板上，双腿向前伸展。弯曲膝盖，将脚底并拢，让膝盖向两侧下垂。用手抓住脚踝或脚。坐直身体，拉长脊柱。轻轻将膝盖压向地面，感受内侧大腿的拉伸感。保持这个姿势几次呼吸。释放时，缓慢地将膝盖抬起并伸展双腿。

英文描述: Sit on the decline bench facing the cable machine with your feet securely placed on the footrests. Grasp the cable attachment with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the cable towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在下坡长凳上，面向拉索机，双脚稳稳地放在脚踏板上。用宽大的过手握把握住拉索连接件，手掌朝下。稍微向后倾斜，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将拉索向下胸部，双肩胛骨紧贴。在收缩高潮时暂停片刻，然后慢慢将拉索放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the floor with your legs extended and your back straight. Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and position the cable machine behind you. Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted. Pull the handle towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地板上，双腿伸直，背部挺直。将拉索把手连接到低滑轮上，将拉索机放在身后。用宽大的上手握把，手掌朝下。稍微向后倾，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。将拉把手向腰部，双肩胛骨紧贴。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢松开把手回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles. Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将拉绳机调整到较低位置，并安装把手。坐在斜坡长凳上，背部贴着垫子，双脚平放在地板上。用上手握把手，双臂伸直。保持肘部微微弯曲，双臂向两侧展开，动作有控制。在完全伸展的位置暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down. Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body. As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally. Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder. Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center. Repeat the movement on the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在有线电视机前，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住拉绳柄，手掌朝下，胸部与胸部齐平。收紧核心，向右旋转躯干，拉动钢索横跨身体。旋转时，后脚旋转，让臀部自然旋转。双臂完全伸展，最后把拉绳把手翻过肩膀完成动作。通过反向动作，将躯干旋转回中心，回到起始位置。在相反一侧重复同样动作。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand sideways to the machine. Grasp the handle with the hand furthest from the machine and place your other hand on your hip. Keep your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. With your abs engaged, bend sideways at the waist, bringing your elbow down towards your hip. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 将钢索把手连接到低滑轮，并侧身站在机器旁。用离机器最远的手握住手柄，另一只手放在臀部。保持双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。腹肌收紧时，腰部侧身弯曲，肘部向下压向臀部。在底部稍作停留，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Sit on the lat pulldown machine with your knees positioned under the pads. Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在背阔肌下拉机上，膝盖放在垫子下方。用过手握把，宽度略大于肩宽。稍微向后仰，保持胸部挺起，保持下背部轻微拱起。将杠铃向下拉向上胸部，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。在动作底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar towards your chest by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把一根直杆连接到低滑轮钢索机上。趴在平坦的长凳上，双脚平放在地上。用下手握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。双臂完全伸展，肘部靠近身体两侧。保持上臂不动，收缩肱二头肌，将杠铃向胸前弯曲。在顶端停顿片刻，捏紧肱二头肌。慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet. Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again. Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用手握住跳绳的把手，掌心朝内。双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。将绳子摆过头顶，随着绳子向你脚边飞来时跳过去。轻柔地用脚掌着地，绳子绕过时重复跳跃。继续跳跃，达到所需的时长或重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and set the bench to a decline angle. Lie down on the bench with your head towards the machine and grab the handle with your right hand. Extend your arm straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. With a controlled motion, lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder. Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and bring your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to your left arm and repeat the exercise.
中文描述: 将D型手柄连接到低滑轮钢索机上，并将工作台调整为下斜角度。躺在工作台上，头朝向机器，右手抓住手柄。手臂直伸至胸前，肘部保持轻微弯曲。控制动作时，将手臂向侧放，直到手与肩膀保持对齐。暂停片刻，然后反向动作，将手臂回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到左臂重复动作。

英文描述: Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Step back to create tension on the cable, keeping your back straight and knees slightly bent. Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your palms to face upwards as you do so. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在腰部高度为拉索机安装一个手柄。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握把，手掌朝下。后退一步以增加钢索张力，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。将手柄拉向身体，同时将手掌旋转朝上。动作结束时将肩胛骨紧紧挤在一起。慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Using your triceps, push the bar down until your arms are fully extended and your triceps are contracted. Pause for a moment, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一把直杠连接到高滑轮拉索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住杠铃，手掌朝上，双手与肩同宽。整个动作过程中，肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。用肱三头肌将杠铃向下压，直到手臂完全伸展，肱三头肌收缩。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the elevated seat facing the cable machine. Grab the cable rope handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees. Pull the cable towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles. Pause for a moment at the fully contracted position. Slowly release the tension and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在面向拉索机的高架座椅上。用上手握住拉索绳把手，手掌相对。保持背部挺直，微微向后倾，保持膝盖微微弯曲。通过收回肩胛骨并收紧背部肌肉，将拉索向身体。在完全收缩的姿势处暂停片刻。慢慢释放紧张，双臂恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Twist your torso to the right, bringing the cable handle towards your right hip. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the cable handle towards your left hip. Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手握住钢索把手，双臂伸直在身前。稍微向后倾斜，同时保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将躯干向右扭转，将钢索把手向右臀部方向移动。稍作停顿，然后向左扭动躯干，将钢索把手向左臀部方向移动。继续交替扭转，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles. Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在拉力机前，双脚与肩同宽。抓住拉力机的把手，或者在脚踝上系上拉力带。脚踝尽可能高地抬起脚跟。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping your elbows close to your torso. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双手握杠铃，手掌朝上。将上臂贴向手臂爆能枪，肘部靠近躯干。保持上臂静止，呼气并举起哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢地将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie back on the bench and grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一个倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。躺在长凳上，反向握法握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。卸下杠铃，向下放向上胸部，肘部收紧。在底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在钢索机上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。用下手握住钢索连接件，手掌朝上，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气，将钢索连接向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。动作顶端暂停，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将钢索连接放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground. Hold the cable handle with your arm extended straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back and down. Slowly rotate your arm inward, bringing the cable handle towards the center of your body. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长凳或椅子上，面向拉索机，双脚平放在地面上。手臂伸直，平行于地面，握住拉绳把手。保持肘部微微弯曲，肩胛骨向后向下拉。慢慢将手臂向内旋转，将拉索把手拉向身体中央。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the handles are at shoulder height. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them up to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and pointing outwards. Press the handles upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整拉力机，使手柄与肩膀齐高。站立时背对机器，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握把手，将手柄举到肩膀高度，肘部弯曲并向外伸出。向上按把直到双臂完全伸展过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手柄放回肩膀高度。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope to a cable machine at waist height. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, with your hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Keep your elbows close to your body and continue pulling until your hands reach your chest. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the rope and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索连接到腰部高度的拉绳机上。站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。弯曲膝盖，身体蹲下，保持背部挺直，胸部挺直。用上手握法握住绳索，双手与肩同宽。收紧核心，将绳索拉向身体，双肩胛骨紧贴。保持肘部靠近身体，继续拉直到双手触及胸部。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢松开绳索，双臂恢复到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine. Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将钢索把手连接到高滑轮上，背对机器站立。双手握住把手，将其放在头后，肘部弯曲。双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。保持腹部收紧，呼气，将躯干向膝盖方向弯曲，肘部向大腿方向。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head. Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with a wide overhand grip. Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lean back slightly. Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整拉绳机，使下拉杆高出你的头顶。坐在座位上，用宽大的上手握把抓住下拉杆。保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，同时稍微向后倾斜。将杠铃向下拉向上胸部，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。在动作底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the dip bars to a height that allows you to comfortably grip them. Stand between the bars and place your hands on each bar, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Jump up and straighten your arms, supporting your body weight on the bars. Bend your knees and cross your ankles behind you. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your chest up and your shoulders down. Continue lowering until your shoulders are below your elbows or until you feel a stretch in your chest. Push through your palms and extend your elbows to raise your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把双杠调整到一个你能舒适握持的高度。站在两把杆之间，双手放在每根杆上，略宽于肩宽。跳起来，伸直手臂，支撑身体重量在单杠上。弯曲膝盖，双脚踝交叉在身后。通过弯曲肘部，保持胸部抬起，肩膀下垂，身体降低。继续下蹲，直到肩膀低于肘部，或感觉胸部有拉伸感。用手掌撑开，伸展肘部，将身体抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地面，头放在长凳末端。用过手握法握杠铃，双手与肩同宽，双臂直伸过胸前。保持上臂静止，慢慢弯曲肘部，将杠铃放到头后。暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手握住健身球，双臂伸直在身前。慢慢将健身球靠近胸部，感受胸部肌肉的拉伸。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height. Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward. Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise. Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在拉力机两侧肩高处装上一个D型手柄。站在拉力机中央，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握把手，双臂向两侧伸展，手掌朝前。保持肘部微微弯曲，整个动作保持背部挺直。拉动拉把手向身体前方时，收紧肩部肌肉，紧拢肩胛骨。动作达到顶点时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step diagonally behind and across your body with your right foot, crossing it behind your left leg. Bend both knees as if you were curtsying, lowering your body towards the ground. Keep your torso upright and your weight on your front foot. Push through your front foot to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping diagonally behind and across your body with your left foot.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右脚斜向身体后方并横跨一步，右叉放在左腿后方。双膝弯曲，像行屈膝礼一样，身体向下。保持躯干直立，重心放在前脚上。用前脚用力回归起始位置。另一侧重复，左脚斜向身后跨步。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward. Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms end up facing forward at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在有背部支撑的长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，保持在肩膀高度，手掌朝向身体，肘部弯曲。将哑铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展，手掌朝前。举起时旋转手腕，使动作顶端手掌朝前。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward. Take a step forward with your right foot, bending your right knee and lowering your body into a lunge position. As you lunge forward, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body. At the bottom of the lunge, rotate your torso to the right, as if you were bowling a ball. Reverse the motion, stepping back with your right foot and returning to the starting position while lowering the dumbbells back down. Repeat the lunge and curl motion, this time rotating your torso to the left. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。右脚向前迈一步，弯曲右膝，身体下垂进入弓步姿势。向前冲刺时，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，肘部紧贴身体。弓步底部，将躯干向右旋转，就像投球一样。反向移动，右脚后退，回到起始位置，同时将哑铃放下。重复弓步和弯举动作，这次将躯干向左旋转。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart and a dumbbell in each hand. Lower your body into a squat position, placing the dumbbells on the ground in front of you. Kick your feet back into a push-up position, keeping your body in a straight line. Perform a push-up, bending your elbows and lowering your chest towards the ground. Jump your feet back towards your hands, landing in a squat position. Stand up explosively, lifting the dumbbells off the ground and bringing them to your shoulders. Press the dumbbells overhead, fully extending your arms. Lower the dumbbells back to your shoulders and repeat the entire sequence for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从站立姿势开始，双脚与肩同宽，双手各握一个哑铃。身体降低到深蹲姿势，哑铃放在你面前的地面上。脚向后踢成俯卧撑姿势，保持身体直线。做俯卧撑，弯曲肘部，胸部向下贴地。双脚跳回双手方向，落地为深蹲姿势。爆发力站起，将哑铃从地面抬起并带到肩膀上。将哑铃压过头顶，双臂完全伸展。将哑铃放回肩膀，重复完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down. Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended. Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward. Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，双手掌心朝下。保持核心收紧，背部挺直，哑铃直按上方，直到双臂完全伸展。旋转手腕，使手掌朝前。将哑铃降回肩高，手腕旋转回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，双脚稳固，头部低于臀部。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对，双臂伸展于胸前。将哑铃放到胸侧，肘部微微弯曲。将哑铃按回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a cable to a low pulley and stand facing away from the machine. Place the cable around your ankle and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise. Slowly extend your leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat with the other leg.
中文描述: 将钢索连接到低滑轮，背对机器站立。将钢索绕在脚踝上，双脚与肩同宽站立。在整个动作过程中保持核心收紧，背部挺直。缓慢地将腿伸直，在动作顶端收紧臀肌。稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。重复到所需的次数。换侧，用另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported by the ball. Extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other. Bend your elbows slightly and lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and squeeze your chest muscles as you bring the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双手各握一个哑铃。双脚向前走，身体向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部被哑铃支撑。双臂直伸至胸前，掌心相对。肘部微微弯曲，双臂向两侧展开，形成一个宽弧线，直到感觉胸口有拉伸感。暂停片刻，然后反向收紧胸肌，将哑铃带回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell vertically against your chest with both hands. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手垂直握住哑铃贴胸口。保持胸部挺胸、核心发力，通过向后推臀部和弯曲膝盖，将身体下沉进入深蹲姿势。继续放下，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟蹬地回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position. Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干。保持肘部靠近躯干，旋转手掌直到朝前。这就是你的起始姿势。现在保持上臂不动，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至推荐次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position. Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干。保持肘部靠近躯干，旋转手掌直到朝前。这就是你的起始姿势。现在保持上臂不动，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至推荐次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended. Keep your back against the bench and your feet flat on the floor. While keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在斜凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干，双臂完全伸展。背部贴着长凳，双脚平放在地板上。保持上臂静止的同时呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢开始将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Cross your arms over your chest. Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双臂交叉放在胸前。用力腹部，将上半身抬离地面，向膝盖方向。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine. Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将长凳调整到史密斯机上舒适的位置。双脚平放在地上躺下。用宽握力握住杠铃，略宽于肩宽。卸下杠铃，缓慢地向胸部放下，肘部向两侧张开。当杠铃触及胸部时暂停片刻。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to stand with your feet flat on the ground and your shoulders under the bar. Position yourself under the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Place your hands on the bar for stability. Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整史密斯机杠铃的高度，让你能双脚平放在地上，肩膀在杠铃下方。双脚与肩同宽，脚趾朝前，站在杠铃下方。双手放在杠铃上以保持稳定。收紧小腿，缓慢抬起脚跟，踮起脚尖。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在一台滑索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住拉索把手，手掌朝上。保持肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气，将拉索把手向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。动作结束时暂停片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将拉索手柄放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Lean back on the bench and use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward. Once at shoulder height, rotate your wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward. Push the dumbbells up with your chest and shoulders, extending your arms fully. Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
中文描述: 坐在斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，双手放在大腿上。向后靠在长凳上，用大腿帮助将哑铃抬到肩膀高度，手掌朝前。达到肩高后，旋转手腕，使手掌朝前。用胸部和肩膀将哑铃向上推，双臂完全伸展。将哑铃放回起始位置，保持肘部微微弯曲。重复至所需次数，交替双臂。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Rest your upper arms on the bench, allowing your elbows to hang down and your palms to face forward. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在斜凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。将上臂放在长凳上，肘部下垂，手掌朝前。保持上臂不动，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest, with your arms extended. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. As you lower the dumbbells, rotate your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement. Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles together at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个倾斜的长凳摆成45度角，双手各握一个哑铃，双手相对坐下。躺在长凳上，将哑铃按到起始位置，正好在胸口上方，双臂伸展。将哑铃向两侧放下，形成一个宽弧线，直到你感觉胸口有拉伸感。放下哑铃时，旋转手腕，使动作结束时手掌朝前。反向动作，将哑铃收回起始位置，胸部肌肉在顶部收紧。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Bring your upper arms close to your sides, with your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。将上臂靠近身体两侧，肘部弯曲成90度角。双臂向后伸直，动作顶端收紧三头肌。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Your right knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle and your left knee should be hovering just above the ground. As you lunge forward, simultaneously curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position, lowering the dumbbells back down to your sides. Repeat the lunge and bicep curl on the opposite side, stepping forward with your left foot. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。你的右膝应弯曲成90度角，左膝应悬浮在地面上方。向前冲刺时，同时将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，肘部紧贴身体。在弓步底部暂停片刻，然后用右脚跟推回起始位置，哑铃放回身体两侧。在相反侧重复弓步和肱二头肌弯举，左脚向前迈步。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up. Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对，双臂直伸。将哑铃放到胸部两侧，保持肘部呈90度角。将哑铃按回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Place your hands on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your body. Engage your core and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight. Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your spine. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直在前。双手放在身后地面上，手指指向身体。收紧核心，慢慢向后倾斜，保持背部挺直。继续向后靠，直到感觉脊柱被拉伸。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee. Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the left side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。弯曲膝盖，双脚平放在地上，与臀部同宽。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。收紧腹肌，缓慢将躯干向右扭转，右肘朝左膝方向。扭转结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复左侧扭转，左肘向右膝盖方向。继续交替，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold onto the cable machine for support. Lift one leg off the ground and balance on the other leg. Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 站在一台有线电视机前，双脚与肩同宽。扶着电缆机支撑。抬起一条腿，另一条腿保持平衡。慢慢抬起脚跟，抬起身体踮起脚尖。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Lie face down on the floor with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms up and out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 面朝下躺在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。双臂伸直，肘部保持轻微弯曲。用力肩部肌肉，抬起双臂向两侧伸展，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Engaging your back muscles, lift the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 面朝下躺在平坦的长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内。双臂直伸向地面，肘部保持轻微弯曲。调动背部肌肉，将哑铃抬向胸前，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Let the dumbbell hang straight down towards the floor, with your arm fully extended. Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着哑铃，手掌朝向身体。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。让哑铃直悬向地面，手臂完全伸展。将哑铃拉向胸口，肘部靠近身体，肩胛骨紧贴。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body. Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down. Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着哑铃，手掌朝向身体。将另一只手放在稳定的表面上，比如长凳或墙壁，作为支撑。保持背部挺直，核心肌群发力。将哑铃向一侧抬起，保持手臂伸直，手掌朝下。继续抬起，直到手臂与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward. Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着哑铃，肩平，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到手臂完全伸展过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher curl bench and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip. Rest your upper arm on the preacher bench pad, allowing your arm to fully extend. Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. At the top of the curl, rotate your wrist so that your palm faces up. Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position, rotating your wrist back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在牧师弯举凳上，一只手握着哑铃，反手握法。将上臂放在讲道者长凳垫上，让手臂完全伸展。将哑铃向肩膀方向弯曲，保持上臂静止。在弯举顶端，旋转手腕，使手掌朝上。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时将手腕旋转回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm extended over the bench, palm facing up. Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your wrist in a neutral position. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，一只手拿着哑铃，手臂伸过长凳，手掌朝上。保持上臂不动，哑铃向肩膀弯曲，手腕保持中立位置。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down. Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge. Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝下。前臂放在长凳上，手腕悬在边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将哑铃靠近前臂。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, with a slight bend in your elbows. Raise the dumbbells out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。双臂伸直向地面，肘部略微弯曲。将哑铃向两侧抬起，双肩胛骨紧贴。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢开始将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground. Extend one arm straight back, keeping it close to your body, until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直且与地面平行。一只手臂向后伸直，保持靠近身体，直到手臂完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。另一只手臂重复。继续交替双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your head up. Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your head. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，头抬起。双臂向后伸直，肘部靠近头部。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended straight down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干，双臂直伸向下。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上。将上臂放在大腿上，让哑铃垂下。保持上臂不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩膀方向弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing inwards. Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，双手掌心朝内，肩膀齐平。保持核心收紧，背部挺直，将哑铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Place your upper arms against the preacher bench and keep your elbows slightly bent. Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary. At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing downward. Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as well. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将上臂靠在讲道者长椅上，肘部略微弯曲。将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，同时保持上臂静止。动作结束时，旋转手腕，使手掌朝下。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时将手腕旋转回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，采用过顶握法。让哑铃悬挂在大腿前方，双臂完全伸展，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，呼气，将哑铃直举至下巴方向，肘部先发力。继续举起哑铃直到达到肩高，肘部朝外侧。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。双臂向两侧举起，直到与地面平行，肘部略微弯曲。双臂向外旋转，将哑铃抬向头部，同时保持肘部保持原位。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability. Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将稳定球放在地上，脸朝下躺在球上，臀部靠在球上，双脚靠墙以保持稳定。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧核心，缓慢抬起上半身离开球，伸展背部，直到身体从头部到脚跟形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your upper arms on the pad, allowing your forearms to hang down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长椅上，胸部贴着杠铃垫，双脚平放在地板上。用下手握住EZ杠铃，双手与肩同宽。将上臂放在垫子上，让前臂垂下。保持上臂静止，呼气，将杠铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握持EZ杠铃，手掌朝上。将上臂放在牧师凳或稳定球上，肘部下垂。保持上臂静止，呼气，将杠铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by gripping a vertical pole with both hands, palms facing each other, and arms fully extended. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. Using your core and upper body strength, raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground. Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双手握住一根竖杆，手掌相对，双臂完全伸展。收紧核心，抬起双腿，保持伸直。利用核心和上半身力量，抬起双腿直到与地面平行。尽可能长时间保持这个姿势，保持身体线条直线。慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your body with straight arms. Keeping your back straight, lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂伸直，将杠铃放在身体前方。保持背部挺直，膝盖和臀部弯曲身体，像坐回椅子一样。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。暂停片刻，然后用力用脚跟回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands. Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground. Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position. Maintain a straight line from your head to your heels throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽。收紧核心，身体向下压，肘部靠近身体两侧。降低身体时，身体前倾，双脚离地，双手保持平衡。继续降低身体，直到胸部刚好离地。用力撑手，伸展双臂，将身体抬回起始位置。整个动作保持从头部到脚跟的直线。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step forward with your right foot and shift your weight onto your right leg. Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the hips, reaching towards your right foot with both hands. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右脚向前迈步，重心转移到右腿。保持背部挺直，慢慢向髋部前倾，双手伸向右脚。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后回到起始位置。另一侧重复。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, bringing them towards your chest. As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your knees towards your opposite shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸直，双臂垂在身侧。弯曲膝盖，抬起双腿，向胸前靠近。抬腿时，将臀部向一侧扭转，膝盖向对侧肩膀靠近。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢把双腿放回起始位置。重复这个动作，这次将臀部扭向另一侧。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand on a raised platform with your toes on the edge and your heels hanging off. Hold onto a stable object for support. Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在一个高台上，脚趾踩在边缘，脚跟悬空。抓紧一个稳定的物体作为支撑。通过伸展脚踝，尽可能抬高脚跟。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it at waist height. Engage your core and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise. Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the cable handle up towards your opposite shoulder, rotating your torso. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 站在有线电视机前，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住钢索把手，并将其置于腰部高度。锻炼过程中要收紧核心，保持背部挺直。保持双臂伸直，呼气，将钢索把手抬向对侧肩膀，旋转躯干。在顶部稍作停顿，然后深吸一口气，慢慢将钢索手柄放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Find a wall and face away from it, standing a few feet away. Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart and kick your feet up against the wall, coming into a handstand position. Bend your elbows and lower your head towards the ground, keeping your body in a straight line. Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 找一面墙，背对着墙，站在几英尺外。双手与肩同宽放在地上，双脚踢向墙壁，进入倒立姿势。弯曲肘部，将头部低向地面，保持身体直线。用力用手撑开，伸展双臂回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down. Engage your core and glutes, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在身体两侧，掌心朝下。收紧核心和臀部，然后抬起臀部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your upper thighs are resting on the pad and your feet are secured. Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head. Lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整过度伸展卧推，使大腿上部放在垫子上，双脚稳固。双臂交叉抱胸，或双手放在头后。上半身向下倾向地面，同时保持背部挺直。在底部暂停片刻，然后抬起上半身，直到与双腿对齐。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up a bench at a height that allows your body to hang freely underneath it. Lie face up on the ground with your head towards the bench. Reach up and grab the bench with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your arms are fully extended. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull your chest up towards the bench. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在一个高度设置一个能让你的身体自由悬挂在下面。仰面躺在地上，头朝向长椅。伸手用过手抓握，稍宽于肩宽。身体姿势让脚跟着地，双臂完全伸展。收紧核心，将肩胛骨收紧，同时将胸部拉向长凳。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees fully. Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately lower your body back into a squat position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。通过弯曲膝盖并向后推臀部，将身体降低到深蹲姿势。爆发式跳跃，完全伸展臀部和膝盖。轻柔地着地，立刻将身体重新蹲下。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet. Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight. Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 先仰躺在地板上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。一只手握壶铃，手掌朝向脚部。手臂直伸向天花板，保持肘部锁定，手腕保持笔直。慢慢将壶铃放回起始位置，保持整个动作的控制。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise the kettlebell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body. Extend your arm fully overhead, straightening your elbow. Lower the kettlebell back down to shoulder height, then return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握壶铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。将壶铃抬到肩膀高度，肘部保持靠近身体。将手臂完全伸过头顶，肘部伸直。将壶铃降回肩高，然后回到起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the strap with both hands and place it around the ball of your foot. Keep your leg straight and slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight. Feel the stretch in your hamstring and calf muscles. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat with the other leg. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住带子，并把它放在脚掌上。保持腿部伸直，从臀部慢慢前倾，保持背部挺直。感受腿后肌和小腿肌肉的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒。松开拉伸，另一条腿重复。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. As you pull yourself up, bend one arm and bring your elbow towards your side, while keeping the other arm straight. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar and your bent arm is fully flexed. Lower yourself back down with control, straightening the bent arm and repeating the movement on the other side. Alternate sides with each repetition.
中文描述: 先用上握法悬挂在引体向上杆上，稍宽于肩宽。收紧核心，将肩胛骨向下拉后。拉起身体时，弯曲一只手臂，肘部向身体侧面收起，另一只手臂保持伸直。继续拉，直到下巴高出杠铃，弯曲的手臂完全弯曲。控制着自己，伸直弯曲的手臂，并在另一侧重复动作。每次重复时交替使用侧面。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height. Press one kettlebell overhead while keeping the other kettlebell at shoulder height. Lower the pressed kettlebell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other kettlebell overhead. Continue alternating the pressing motion, creating a seesaw-like movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个壶铃，肩高。将一个壶铃举过头顶，同时保持另一个壶铃与肩高。将按压的壶铃降回肩高，同时将另一只壶铃压过头顶。继续交替按压，形成跷跷板般的运动。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs with both hands, palms facing towards you. Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground. Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to pull the kettlebell up towards your shoulders. As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbows tucked in and the kettlebell resting on the back of your forearm. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将壶铃放在大腿前方，手掌朝向自己。膝盖微微弯曲，髋部铰接，壶铃向下放下。爆发性地伸展你的臀部和膝盖，利用惯性将壶铃拉向肩膀。当壶铃达到肩高时，旋转手腕，将壶铃置于架位，肘部收紧，壶铃放在前臂后侧。将壶铃放回起始位置，重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by kneeling on the ground with your feet hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders. Engage your core and glutes, then explosively jump up into the air, extending your hips and knees. As you jump, push through your toes and fully extend your ankles, knees, and hips. Land softly back on the ground, bending your knees to absorb the impact. Immediately go into the next repetition, repeating the jump squat motion.
中文描述: 先跪在地上，双脚与臀部同宽，脚趾朝前。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在肩膀上。激活核心和臀部，然后爆发性地跳起，伸展臀部和膝盖。跳跃时，用脚趾全力撑开脚踝、膝盖和臀部。轻轻落地，弯曲膝盖吸收冲击。立即进入下一个动作，重复跳跃深蹲动作。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Keep your left hand up to protect your face and your right hand by your chin. Rotate your hips and pivot on your left foot as you extend your left arm forward in a punching motion. Twist your torso and engage your core muscles to generate power in the punch. Snap your arm back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。左手举起保护脸部，右手贴着下巴。旋转臀部，左脚旋转，同时左臂向前伸展，做出出拳动作。扭转躯干，调动核心肌肉，产生出拳的力量。把手臂弹回起始位置，重复到想要的次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and keep your elbows close to your sides. Exhale and curl the handles upward, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部贴着垫子坐好。用下手握把，手掌朝上，肘部靠近身体两侧。呼气，把手向上弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。动作结束时停顿片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将手柄放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and foot platform to your desired position. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform. Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and push through your heels to lift the weight up. Keep your back straight and avoid rounding your shoulders. Extend your hips fully at the top of the movement, squeezing your glutes. Lower the weight back down in a controlled manner, keeping tension on your glutes and hamstrings. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和脚部平台到你想要的位置。坐在机器上，背部贴着垫子，双脚平放在脚踏板上。握住座椅的把手或侧面以保持稳定。用力臀部和腿后肌，用脚跟用力抬起重量。保持背部挺直，避免肩膀弯曲。动作顶端完全伸展臀部，收紧臀部。控制性地将重量放回，保持臀部和腿后肌的紧张。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整杠杆机的座椅和靠背，使其舒适。坐在机器上，背部靠背，双脚平放在地板上。用上手握把，双手略宽于肩宽。将手柄向前推远，直到手臂完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后慢慢弯曲肘部，将手柄向胸前放下。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine. Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your back straight. Pull the handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side. Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，面向机器。单手握住手柄，保持背部挺直。将手柄拉向身体，肘部靠近身体侧面。动作顶端收紧背部肌肉。慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Hold the cable rope attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing each other, and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the cable rope attachment until your biceps are fully contracted and the rope is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the cable rope attachment back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖略微弯曲。用下手握住绳索连接点，手掌相对，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起绳索连接点，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，绳索与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢地将绳索连接点放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing the cable machine. Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and bring your hands to the sides of your head. Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Extend your forearms by contracting your triceps until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by bending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索把手连接到高滑轮上，跪下面向拉索机。用中立握法（手掌相对）握住绳索，双手放在头两侧。整个动作过程中肘部靠近头部，上臂保持静止。通过收缩肱三头肌伸展前臂，直到手臂完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后慢慢弯曲肘部回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the leverage machine to fit your body and secure your feet in the foot pads. Lie face down on the machine with your upper body hanging off the edge and your hips resting on the pad. Cross your arms over your chest or place them behind your head. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your legs upward until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整杠杆机以适应身体，并将脚固定在脚垫上。俯卧在器械上，上半身悬挂在床边，臀部靠在垫子上。双臂交叉放在胸前或放在头后。用力臀部和腿后肌，将双腿抬起直到与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and chest pad position according to your comfort. Sit on the machine with your back against the chest pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles or side bars for stability. Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the chest pad to move with you. Pause for a moment at the maximum contraction, feeling the tension in your abs. Slowly return to the starting position by contracting your abs and pulling yourself back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 根据你的舒适度调整座椅高度和胸垫位置。坐在机器上，背部贴着胸垫，双脚平放在地板上。握住把手或侧杆以保持稳定。收紧腹肌，慢慢向后倾斜，让胸垫随着你移动。在最大收缩处暂停片刻，感受腹肌的紧张。通过收缩腹肌并拉起身体，慢慢回到起始姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests. Place your hands on the side handles for stability. Engage your abductors and slowly push your legs apart, away from the midline of your body. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your legs back together to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，使膝盖呈90度角。坐在机器上，背部靠靠背，双脚放在脚踏板上。双手放在侧边把手上以保持稳定。收紧外展肌，缓慢将双腿分开，远离身体中线。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢将双腿收回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at shoulder level. Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部靠在靠背上，将自己放在机器上。用过手握把，双手保持在肩部水平。将手柄向上推，直到手臂完全伸展，但不要锁死肘部。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手柄放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball with both hands above your head. Engage your core and keep your back straight. Bend your knees slightly and forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground in front of you. As you slam the ball down, use your entire body to generate power, including your shoulders and core. Catch the ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手举过头顶。核心发力，保持背部挺直。膝盖微微弯曲，用力将药球重重砸向前方地面。重击球时，用全身力量，包括肩膀和核心。弹跳时接住球，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable attachment with both hands, palms facing each other, and step back to create tension in the cable. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the cable towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住拉索连接器，手掌相对，然后后退一步以增加拉索的张力。保持背部挺直，核心绷紧。将拉索向身体，双肩胛骨紧贴。在动作达到高潮时暂停片刻，然后慢慢将拉索放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, forming an inverted V shape with your body. Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. As you lower down, shift your weight forward and transition into a cobra pose by straightening your arms and lifting your chest up. Reverse the movement by bending your elbows and lowering your chest back down towards the ground. Push through your hands to return to the inverted V position. Continue the movement by lowering your hips back down towards the ground, returning to the starting push-up position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始做俯卧撑姿势，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚并拢。收紧核心，抬起臀部朝天花板方向，与身体形成倒V形。通过弯曲肘部，将上半身向下降低，保持靠近身体。下蹲时，将重心向前转移，通过伸直手臂和抬起胸部进入眼镜蛇式。反向弯曲肘部，将胸部向下压向地面。用手推回倒V字姿势。继续将臀部向下放向地面，回到起始俯卧撑姿势。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. As you push back up, lift one leg off the ground and kick it out to the side, keeping it straight. Lower your leg back down and repeat the push-up, then switch to the other leg. Continue alternating leg kicks with each push-up repetition.
中文描述: 开始做俯卧撑姿势，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚并拢。通过弯曲肘部，保持背部挺直，核心收紧，身体向下降低。向上推时，抬起一条腿，向侧面踢出，保持伸直。将腿放下，重复俯卧撑，然后换到另一条腿。每次俯卧撑重复时交替进行腿踢。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged. Push back up to the starting position. Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling. Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position. Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，身体保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持核心收紧，身体向下降低。推回起始位置。将重心转移到左手，身体向右旋转，右臂朝向天花板抬起。保持侧平板支撑姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始位置。在相反侧重复俯卧撑和侧平板支撑。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level. Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。双手握住阻力带，手掌朝前，将其举到肩膀高度。将弹力带压在头顶，双臂完全伸展。在弹头顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将弹带放回肩部水平。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the floor with your legs extended and loop the resistance band around your feet. Hold the ends of the resistance band with your hands, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, engaging your core. Pull the resistance band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地板上，双腿伸直，将阻力带绕在脚上。用手掌相对握住阻力带的两端。保持背部挺直，微微向后倾斜，激活核心肌群。将阻力带拉向胸部，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a plank position with your forearms on the roller and your body in a straight line. Engage your core and slowly roll the roller forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control. Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the roller back towards your starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从平板支撑姿势开始，前臂放在滚轮上，身体保持直线。收紧核心，缓慢地向前滚动滚筒，尽量伸展身体，同时保持控制。在最远点暂停片刻，然后慢慢将滚筒滚回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing the rope with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grab the rope with both hands, palms facing towards you. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Begin pulling yourself up the rope by alternating hand-over-hand movements. Use your legs to assist in the upward movement. Continue climbing until you reach the desired height or the top of the rope. To descend, reverse the hand-over-hand movement while controlling your descent. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在绳索面前，双脚与肩同宽。双手抓住绳子，手掌朝向自己。膝盖微微弯曲，收紧核心。开始通过交替的手掌动作拉自己上绳索。用腿辅助向上移动。继续攀爬，直到达到目标高度或绳索顶端。下落时，在控制下坡的同时反向手掌移动。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows and retracting your shoulder blades, as if you are trying to squeeze a pencil between them. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to extend your elbows and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽，双臂伸直。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。通过弯曲肘部并收回肩胛骨，像是在试图夹紧铅笔一样，降低身体。在底部暂停片刻，然后用手撑开肘部，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and extend your arm overhead, keeping your elbow close to your head. Keep your upper arm stationary and slowly lower the cable handle behind your head by bending your elbow. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 站在背对拉线机的背对上，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住钢索把手，手臂伸过头顶，肘部靠近头部。保持上臂不动，慢慢弯曲肘部，将拉绳柄放到头后。在底部暂停片刻，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other. Place your bottom arm under your head for support. Engage your adductors and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 侧躺，双腿伸直叠放在一侧。把下臂放在头下支撑。收紧内收肌，尽量抬高上腿，但不旋转臀部或向后倾斜。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将腿放下回到起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability. Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position. Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards your body, controlling the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅，使膝盖呈45度角。坐在雪橇机上，背部靠背，双脚与肩同宽，放在脚踏板上。握紧座椅两侧的把手以保持稳定。通过伸展双腿，将脚踏板从身体推开，保持脚跟放在脚踏板上。在完全伸展的姿势处暂停片刻。慢慢弯曲膝盖，将脚踏板向身体方向放下，控制动作。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level. Lie flat on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground. Grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the bar and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment when the bar touches your chest. Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将铁匠机杆的高度调整到胸部高度。平躺在长凳上，双脚牢牢踩地。用略宽于肩宽的上握握法握住杠铃。松开杠杆，将杠铃放向胸前，保持肘部内收。当杠铃碰到胸部时，暂停片刻。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Bend at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight and chest up, and grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and lift the bar by extending your hips and knees, keeping the bar close to your body. Stand up straight, fully extending your hips and knees. Lower the bar back down by bending at the hips and knees, maintaining control and keeping your back straight. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将铁匠机架设，杠铃位于臀部高度。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾略微向外。臀部和膝盖弯曲，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，并用略宽于肩宽的上手握把。通过伸展髋部和膝盖，保持杠铃靠近身体，从而激活核心并抬起杠铃。站直，完全伸展髋部和膝盖。通过弯曲髋部和膝盖，将杠铃放下，保持控制并保持背部挺直。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline. Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将卧推器调整为30-45度的倾斜角度。坐在长凳上，背部贴近垫子，双脚稳稳着地。用略宽于肩宽的上手握法握住杠铃。松开杠铃，缓慢地将杠铃放下，靠近上胸部，保持肘部微微收紧。在底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand in front of the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place one foot behind you on a bench or step, with your toes pointing forward. Hold onto the smith machine bar for stability. Bend your front knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 站在史密斯机前，双脚与肩同宽。一只脚放在凳子或台阶上，脚趾朝前。握住史密斯机杆以保持稳定。弯曲前膝，身体下沉进入弓步姿势，保持背部挺直。在底部稍作停顿，然后用前脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at an appropriate height for your squat. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders. Grip the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and unrack the barbell, stepping back to clear the rack. Keeping your chest up and back straight, initiate the squat by bending at the hips and knees.
