Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将杠铃机架设在适合深蹲的高度。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾微微外翻。将身体置于杠铃下方，将杠铃放在上方斜方肌和肩膀上。握杠铃时握得较宽，略宽于肩宽。收紧核心，松开杠铃，后退以清理杠铃架。保持胸部挺直，背部挺直，开始深蹲时弯曲臀部和膝盖。身体降低，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟踩回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过握握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。将杠铃拉向胸前，双肩胛骨紧贴。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height. Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards. Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper back and shoulders. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将杠铃架设在髋部高度。站立时双脚比肩宽宽，脚趾朝外。将身体定位在杠铃下方，杠铃放在上背部和肩膀上。收紧核心，保持胸部挺起，身体下蹲，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。降低身体直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back. Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot. Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg.
中文描述: 开始时，双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃放在上背部。右脚向后迈步，着地时脚掌掌。双膝弯曲，身体降低，直到左大腿与地面平行。用左脚跟用力，回到起始位置。另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the v-bar towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用过握握住V型杆连接件，手掌朝下。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将V型杆拉向身体，双肩胛骨紧贴。动作达到顶点时稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start with the barbell resting on your shoulders, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your knees tracking over your toes. As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your legs and push the barbell overhead. As the barbell reaches its peak, quickly drop into a split position, with one foot forward and one foot back. Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your back knee slightly touching the ground. Stand up from the split position, bringing your feet back together. Lower the barbell back to your shoulders and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 杠铃先放在肩膀上，双脚与肩同宽。身体下放进入深蹲姿势，保持胸部抬起，膝盖与脚趾相邻。当深蹲达到最低点时，爆发性地用腿部冲刺，将杠铃推过头顶。杠铃达到顶点时，迅速进入劈腿姿势，一脚向前，一脚向后。双臂完全伸展，后膝略微触地，在头顶接住杠铃。从劈腿姿势站起，双脚重新合拢。将杠铃放回肩膀，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall or sturdy object, about an arm's length away. Place your hands on the wall or object at shoulder height. Step back with one foot, keeping your heel flat on the ground. Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight. You should feel a stretch in your calf muscle. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Repeat on the other leg.
中文描述: 站在墙上或坚固物体，距离大约一臂长。双手放在墙上或物体，保持肩膀高度。一只脚后退，脚跟保持平放在地上。前膝稍微弯曲，身体前倾，保持后腿伸直。你应该感觉到小腿肌肉有拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒。另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. As you lower your body, simultaneously lift your right arm and left leg off the ground, extending them straight out. Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your arm and leg back down while pushing yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time lifting your left arm and right leg. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚并拢。收紧核心，身体向下，肘部靠近身体两侧。降低身体时，同时抬起右臂和左腿，伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后放下手臂和腿，同时推自己回到起始位置。重复动作，这次抬起左臂和右腿。继续交替练习，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the tire. Bend your knees and hinge at the hips, lowering into a squat position. Reach down and grab the bottom edge of the tire with both hands, fingers facing towards you. Engage your glutes and leg muscles, and explosively drive through your legs to lift the tire off the ground. As the tire flips over, use your upper body strength to guide it and maintain control. Once the tire is fully flipped, quickly step back and reset your stance. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向轮胎。弯曲膝盖，臀部铰链，蹲下身。双手抓住轮胎底部，手指朝向自己。用臀部和腿部肌肉，爆发性地用腿部力量将轮胎抬离地面。轮胎翻转时，用上半身力量引导并保持控制。轮胎完全翻转后，迅速后退并调整站姿。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up a barbell on a rack at knee height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards. Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees, pulling your shoulders back and squeezing your glutes at the top. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by bending at the hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在膝盖高度架上架起一个杠铃。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾略微向外。臀部和膝盖弯曲，降低身体，双手与肩同宽握杠铃，双手与肩同宽。通过伸展臀部和膝盖，拉肩并收紧臀部，收紧臀肌来收紧核心，抬起杠铃。通过弯曲臀部和膝盖，将杠铃降回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子的边缘，双手握住边缘，手指指向前方。将臀部从长椅上滑下，用手支撑体重。弯曲肘部，身体向地面下放，背部紧贴长凳。在底部稍作停顿，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back. Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot. Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，并用杠铃横跨上背部。右脚向后迈步，着地时脚掌掌。双膝弯曲，身体向下，直到左大腿与地面平行。用左脚跟用力回归起始位置。另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲。用过手握法握杠铃，手掌朝下，双手与肩同宽。前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬在边缘。保持前臂不动，呼气并尽量将手腕向上弯曲。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with both hands, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise. Slowly bend your torso to the right side, lowering the barbell towards your right knee. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the movement on the left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃，手掌朝下。整个动作过程中保持背部挺直，核心发力。缓慢将躯干向右弯曲，杠铃向下放向右膝。稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。重复左侧动作。继续交替练习，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the barbell upward, contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, keeping your upper arms stationary. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双脚握杠铃，手掌朝下。保持上臂不动，呼气时将杠铃向上弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，保持上臂静止。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand in the middle of a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the handles of the cables with your palms facing down and your arms extended straight out to the sides. Keeping your arms straight, bring your hands together in front of your body, crossing them over each other. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position, keeping your arms extended. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在拉索机中间，双脚与肩同宽。手掌朝下，双臂伸直，握住拉索把手。保持手臂伸直，双手在身体前交叉。稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置，保持手臂伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with your right leg, lowering your body into a lunge position. Keep your torso upright and your front knee aligned with your ankle. Push off with your right foot and bring your left foot forward, stepping into a lunge position with your left leg. Continue alternating legs and walking forward, maintaining a controlled and steady pace. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右腿向前迈步，身体降低进入弓步姿势。保持躯干直立，前膝与脚踝对齐。右脚蹬地，左脚向前，左腿进入弓步姿势。继续交替双腿并向前走，保持受控且稳定的节奏。重复到所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight in each hand. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. As you lunge forward, swing the weights forward and upward, keeping your arms straight. Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position, swinging the weights back down. Repeat with your left foot and continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。右脚向前迈一步，身体降低进入弓步姿势。向前冲刺时，将哑铃向前和向上摆动，保持手臂伸直。用右脚蹬地，回到起始位置，将哑铃摆回原位。左脚重复，继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. Bend your elbows and pull your chest towards the bar, keeping your body straight. Once your chest reaches the bar, push down with your hands and drive your elbows back, lifting your body above the bar. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双手朝向背向自己，双手略宽于肩宽，悬挂在引体向上杠铃上。收紧核心，将肩胛骨向下并向后拉。弯曲肘部，将胸部拉向杠铃，保持身体直线。胸部触及杠铃后，用手向下压，肘部向后推动，身体抬高于杠铃。动作顶端暂停，然后慢慢降回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, bringing them as close to your elbows as possible. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，膝盖弯曲成90度，悬挂在引体向上杆上。收紧核心，抬膝向胸口，尽量靠近肘部。慢慢将双腿放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor. Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过握握法握杠铃，手掌朝下，双手略宽于肩宽。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，直到躯干几乎与地面平行。将杠铃拉向下胸部，双肩胛骨紧贴。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench facing the backrest with your chest against it. Grab the barbell with a reverse grip (palms facing down) and hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Pull the barbell towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一个倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。坐在凳子上，面向靠背，胸部贴着它。用反向握法（手掌朝下）握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将杠铃拉向上腹部，双肩胛骨紧缩。动作结束时稍作停顿。慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the barbell with a reverse grip, palms facing towards your face, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows in and your wrists straight. Slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部贴在凳子末端。用反向握法握杠铃，手掌朝向脸部，双手与肩同宽。双臂直伸越过胸前，肘部收紧，手腕保持笔直。慢慢将杠铃向下放向额头，肘部弯曲，保持上臂静止。在底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower one dumbbell down towards your head, bending at the elbow, while keeping the other arm extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。双臂直伸过胸前，肘部保持轻微弯曲。将一只哑铃向下放向头部，肘部弯曲，另一只手臂保持伸直。在底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。另一只手臂重复，左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height with your palm facing inwards. Engage your core and keep your back straight. Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着哑铃，手掌朝内。收紧核心，保持背部挺直。将哑铃向上按压，直到手臂完全伸展。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at chest height, elbow bent. Place your other hand on your hip for stability. Press the cable handle forward, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一只手握住拉索把手，手臂保持在胸前高度，肘部弯曲。另一只手放在臀部以保持稳定。将拉索把手向前推，手臂完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to the high pulley of a cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down. Engage your lats and pull the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight throughout the movement. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一根直杆连接到拉索机的高滑轮上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握法握住杠铃，保持手臂伸直，手掌朝下。收紧背阔肌，将杠铃向下拉向大腿，整个动作过程中手臂保持伸直。在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地上。用反握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。卸下杠铃，慢慢将杠铃放向胸口，肘部收紧。当杠铃碰到你的胸口时，请稍作停顿。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting. Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet. Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability. Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把拉圈机调到最低档。趴在长凳上，双腿伸直，脚踝绑带固定在脚上。握紧长凳的把手以保持稳定。弯曲膝盖，双腿向臀部弯曲，收紧腿后肌群。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长椅上，胸贴着垫子，双臂直伸，用过手握法握住杠铃。保持上臂静止，呼气并向上弯曲杠铃，同时收紧肱二头肌。继续抬起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部水平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，手持杠铃，手掌朝下。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬挂在边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将杠铃拉向身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Kneel on the floor and hold a barbell with both hands, shoulder-width apart. Roll the barbell forward, extending your arms and keeping your core engaged. Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your knees, maintaining control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 跪在地上，双手双手握住杠铃，肩宽。将杠铃向前滚动，伸展双臂并保持核心收紧。继续向前滚动，直到身体完全伸展，双臂举过头顶。停顿片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃向膝盖方向滚动，保持控制。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, behind your head. Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。用过手握法握杠铃，间距略大于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起，放到肩膀高度，放在头后方。将杠铃向上压，直到手臂完全伸展。将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and pointing forward. Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。用上手握法握杠铃，略宽于肩宽。将杠铃举到肩膀高度，肘部微微弯曲并向前指。将杠铃压过头顶，双臂完全伸展。将杠铃放回肩膀高度，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips. Pull the cable handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在拉索划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握住拉索把手，手掌朝下。保持背部挺直，臀部稍微前倾。将拉索把手向身体靠近，双肩胛骨紧贴。动作达到高潮时暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开拉把回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench. Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将D型手柄连接到低滑轮机上，面朝下躺在平坦的长凳上。双手握住D型手柄，手掌朝下，双臂伸直。保持手臂伸直，向两侧举起，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper back, crossing it in front of your chest. Hold the ends of the band with your hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides. Engage your abs and twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带绕在上背部，交叉在胸前。用手握住弹力带的两端，肘部弯曲并靠近身体两侧。收紧腹部，将躯干向一侧扭转，肘部朝向对侧膝盖。稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。在另一侧重复。继续交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your upper arms against your inner thighs, just above your knees, and let the barbell hang down in front of you. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，双手与肩同宽握持杠铃。将上臂放在膝盖上方的大腿内侧，让杠铃悬挂在身体前方。保持上臂不动，呼气，将杠铃向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad. Place your toes on the lower portion of the platform and position your knees under the lever pad. Grasp the handles on the sides of the seat for stability. Press the lever pad down by extending your ankles, lifting your heels as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整机器座椅，使肩膀与杠杆垫对齐。将脚趾放在平台下部，膝盖置于杠杆垫下方。握住座椅侧面的把手以保持稳定。通过伸展脚踝，尽可能抬高脚跟，压下杠杆垫。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a barbell resting on your upper back. Keep your back straight and your chest up. Slowly hinge forward at the hips, lowering your torso towards the ground. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，杠铃放在上背部。保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。慢慢在臀部向前倾斜，躯干向下贴地。在底部暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。用过手握法握杠铃，间距略大于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起，保持到肩膀高度，肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。双臂完全伸展，将杠铃压在头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回肩部水平。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and raise it overhead. Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your head. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to raise the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。用过手握法握杠铃，双手与肩同宽，然后举过头顶。通过弯曲肘部，将杠铃放到头后，保持上臂靠近头部。稍作停顿，然后伸展双臂，将杠铃抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing down. Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise. Slowly twist your torso to the right, pivoting on your feet and hips, while keeping your lower body stable. Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the left side. Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将杠铃放在胸前，手掌朝下。锻炼过程中收紧核心，保持背部挺直。缓慢地将躯干向右扭转，脚和臀部旋转，同时保持下半身稳定。扭转结束时稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。向左侧重复扭转动作。继续交替扭转，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent. Engage your core and twist your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling the contraction in your abs and obliques. Slowly return to the starting position, resisting the cable's pull. Repeat the movement to the left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向拉索机。双手握住拉索把手，双手放在胸前，手臂微微弯曲。收紧核心，向右扭动躯干，拉拉过身体。动作结束时暂停片刻，感受腹肌和腹斜肌的收缩。慢慢回到起始位置，抵抗拉扯。向左重复动作。继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent. Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable. Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the rotation to the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向有线器。双手握住钢索把手，双手在胸前，手臂微微弯曲。收紧核心，缓慢将躯干向一侧旋转，保持臀部和双腿稳定。旋转结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复旋转到相反的一侧。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold a barbell with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Engage your core and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly rotate back to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在平坦的长凳上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲。双手举杠铃，放在胸前，肘部微微弯曲。收紧核心，慢慢将躯干向一侧扭转，保持背部挺直。扭转结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢旋转回起始位置。把扭转动作重复到另一侧。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of you with an overhand grip. Keep your arms straight and your back straight throughout the exercise. Lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible, squeezing your traps at the top. Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，用过手握法将杠铃举在前方。在整个练习过程中，保持手臂伸直，背部挺直。尽量抬起肩膀，靠近耳朵，在上方收紧斜方肌。保持一会儿，然后慢慢把肩膀放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the cable handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders while contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在斜坡长凳上，背靠着垫子，双脚平放在地上。用下手握住钢索把手，手掌朝上，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并将把手向肩膀弯曲，同时收缩肱二头肌。动作结束时停顿片刻，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将手柄放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended in front of you. Lift your right foot off the ground and extend it forward. Slowly lower your body down by bending your left knee and pushing your hips back. Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower yourself down. Lower until your left thigh is parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，双臂伸直。抬起右脚并向前伸直。通过弯曲左膝并向后推臀部，慢慢降低身体。下蹲时保持胸膛挺直，背部挺直。往下放，直到左大腿与地面平行，或者尽可能低。在底部暂停片刻，然后用左脚跟推回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards. Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders. Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted. Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your back straight. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping out with your left foot. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚分开比肩宽，脚趾略微向外。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在肩膀上。右脚向侧迈出大步，保持左脚稳固。弯曲右膝，身体下蹲，保持胸部抬起，背部挺直。用右脚跟用力回归起始位置。另一侧重复，左脚向外迈步。继续交替走到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs. Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support. Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping it parallel to the ground. Lower the leg back down and repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，背部挺直，双腿间握杠铃。双手放在长凳两侧以提供支撑。保持双腿伸直，尽量将一条腿抬高，同时保持与地面平行。将一条腿放下，另一条腿重复此动作。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Simultaneously lift the barbell up towards your shoulders while jumping slightly off the ground. As you reach the top of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双脚双臂握持杠铃，放在大腿前方，采用上握。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。同时将杠铃抬向肩膀，同时略微离地跳跃。到达动作顶点时，迅速反转动作，将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand facing the machine. Grasp the handle with your left hand and step away from the machine, extending your arm fully. Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your knees slightly bent. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your torso to the right as you do so. Squeeze your back muscles at the end of the movement. Slowly return to the starting position, keeping tension on the cable. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your right hand.
中文描述: 将钢索把手连接到低滑轮上，面向机器站立。左手握住把手，离开机器，手臂完全伸展。双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。整个练习过程中背部挺直，核心发力。将手柄拉向身体，同时向右旋转躯干。动作结束时收紧背部肌肉。慢慢回到起始位置，保持钢索的张力。重复到所需次数，然后换侧，用右手进行动作。

英文描述: Grab the pull-up bar with a wide overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用宽大的过手握法抓住引体向上杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在杠铃上。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，胸部先行。继续拉，直到下巴高于杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾朝前。用上手握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。臀部弯曲，将杠铃向下放下，保持背部挺直，膝盖微弯曲。放下杠铃直到感觉腿后肌有拉伸感。收紧腿后肌和臀肌，将杠铃抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand overhead. Rotate your left foot outwards about 45 degrees and keep your right foot pointing forward. Bend your torso to the left side, keeping your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell. Lower your torso as far as you can while keeping your right arm straight and your left arm extended to the side. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by pushing through your right foot and engaging your obliques. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手举壶铃举过头顶。左脚向外旋转约45度，右脚保持向前。躯干向左弯曲，右臂伸出头顶，眼睛盯着壶铃。尽量降低躯干，同时保持右臂伸直，左臂向侧伸。稍作停顿，然后通过右脚推力并收回腹斜肌，回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手略宽于肩宽，握杠铃时用过手握法。让杠铃悬挂在大腿前方，双臂完全伸展。保持背部挺直，呼气，将杠铃直举至下巴方向，肘部先行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend your arms out to the sides, perpendicular to your body. Keeping your knees together, slowly lower them to one side, aiming to touch the ground with your knees. Pause for a moment, then engage your core and slowly lift your knees back to the starting position. Repeat the movement to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双臂向两侧伸展，垂直于身体。膝盖并拢，慢慢将膝盖放到一侧，目标是膝盖触地。暂停片刻，然后收紧核心，缓慢将膝盖抬回起始位置。将动作重复到另一侧。继续交替移动，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Let the dumbbell hang straight down in front of you, with your arm fully extended. Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲，一只手握着哑铃。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。哑铃直挂在前方，手臂完全伸展。将哑铃拉向胸前，肘部靠近身体。动作顶端将肩胛骨紧紧收紧。将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet off the ground. Engaging your abs, lift your hips off the ground, bringing your knees towards your head. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸直，双臂垂在身侧。弯曲膝盖，向胸口方向，保持双脚离地。用力腹部，抬起臀部离地，膝盖向头部。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，身体保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，将胸部贴近身体，向地面下放。用手掌撑开双臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the cable handle with your right hand and place your elbow on the inside of your right knee. Extend your arm fully, keeping your elbow stationary and close to your knee. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。右手握住钢索把手，肘部放在右膝内侧。手臂完全伸展，肘部保持静止且靠近膝盖。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle. Keeping your upper arms stationary, extend your forearms backwards until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双手握住拉绳柄，手掌向内，双臂弯曲成90度角。保持上臂不动，前臂向后伸展直到手臂完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form. Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward. Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement. Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板，确保正确姿势。坐在机器上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用狭窄握把，手掌相对。保持背部挺直，身体微微前倾。将手柄拉向躯干，双肩胛骨紧贴。在动作达到顶点时暂停片刻。慢慢松开手柄，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your arms fully extended in front of you. Keeping your arms straight, raise the cable handle up to shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过握握住钢索把手，手掌朝下，双臂完全伸直在前。保持手臂伸直，将钢索把手抬到肩膀高度。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将钢索把手放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up. Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用反手握住拉索把手，手掌朝上。肘部靠近身体侧面，慢慢将前臂向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing a cable machine. Grasp the handle with one hand and step back to create tension on the cable. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with a slight bend in your elbow. Slowly bring your arm back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向拉索机。单手握住手柄，后退以施加拉力。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。手臂向侧伸，平行于地面，肘部略微弯曲。慢慢将手臂收回起始位置，保持控制。重复至所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height. Kneel down facing the cable machine and grab the handle with one hand. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the handle towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.
中文描述: 在腰部高度给电缆机装一个手柄。跪下面对钢索机，一只手抓住把手。保持背部挺直，核心发力。把手柄拉向胸前，将肩胛骨紧紧夹合。在乐章顶端稍作停顿。慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。换边，用另一只手重复这个动作。

英文描述: Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley on a cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Exhale and push the rope downward by extending your elbows until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position by allowing your elbows to flex. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在钢索机上的高滑轮上连接绳索。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握法握住绳索，双手相对。整个动作过程中，肘部靠近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气，伸展肘部，将绳子向下推，直到手臂完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后吸气，然后慢慢恢复起始姿势，让肘部屈曲。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the cable ropes towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用上手握住钢索绳，双手相对。稍微向后倾斜，保持背部挺直，核心发力。把钢索拉向胸口，把肩胛骨挤在一起。在动作高潮处暂停片刻，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and cable handles to a comfortable position. Sit on the bench with your back straight and feet flat on the floor. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip at shoulder height. Push the handles forward and away from your body, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和拉线把手，使其舒适。坐在长椅上，背挺直，双脚平放在地上。用肩膀高度的上手握住钢索把手。将把手向前推离身体，双臂完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将手柄拉回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and let your arms hang down in front of you. Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握住拉线把手，双臂垂在身前。保持手臂伸直，肩膀耸向耳朵方向。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down on a mat facing up. Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest. Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest. At the same time, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将钢索连接到低滑轮上，朝上躺在垫子上。双手握住钢索，双臂直伸至胸前。弯曲膝盖，抬起双腿，将膝盖拉向胸前。同时，将骨盆向胸部弯曲，抬起臀部离地。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿和臀部放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head. Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and lean back slightly. Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整拉绳机，使下拉杆高度高于头顶。坐在座位上，用下握握住下拉杆，双手略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，微微向后倾斜。将拉杆向下拉向胸部，双肩胛骨紧缩。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight down. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground. Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双臂完全伸展，双腿笔直垂挂在引体向上杆上。收紧核心，双腿抬起至与地面平行。在顶端保持片刻，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a single handle to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arm fully. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the handle down towards your side while keeping your elbow close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your lat muscle. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.
中文描述: 将一个手柄连接到高滑轮钢索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握住手柄，手臂完全伸展。保持背部挺直，核心发力。将手柄向下拉向身体两侧，同时保持肘部靠近身体。动作结束时稍作停顿，收紧背阔肌。慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。换边，用另一只手重复这个动作。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on a bench or pad, with your wrists hanging off the edge. Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把一根直杆连接到低滑轮钢索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住杠铃，手掌朝上，双手与肩同宽。将前臂放在长凳或垫子上，手腕悬挂在边缘。保持前臂静止，呼气并尽量将手腕向上弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后深吸一口气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground. Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your quadriceps. Hold this position for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
中文描述: 坐在椅子边缘，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。一条腿伸直，保持脚跟着地。稍微前倾，感受股四头肌的拉伸。保持这个姿势20-30秒。换腿重复拉伸动作。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，头在一端，双脚稳稳着地。双手握哑铃，双臂伸直至胸前。保持双臂伸直，缓慢将哑铃以弧形动作放到头后。在底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your palms facing forward and your arms extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Pause for a moment, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴着长凳。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂伸展在胸前。慢慢将哑铃放到胸口两侧，保持肘部呈90度角。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving through your heels to jump off the ground. As you jump, shrug your shoulders and pull the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping them close to your body. Catch the dumbbells at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up. Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，采用上手握法。弯曲膝盖，降低臀部进入深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，胸部挺直。爆发性地伸展臀部和膝盖，用脚跟推动跳跃。跳跃时耸肩，将哑铃拉向肩膀，保持靠近身体。在肩高接住哑铃，肘部向前，手掌朝上。通过反向将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body, arms extended downwards. Bend at your hips and knees, lowering the dumbbells towards the ground while keeping your back straight. Push through your heels and extend your hips and knees, lifting the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾朝前。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体，双臂向下伸展。臀部和膝盖弯曲，哑铃向下放，同时保持背部挺直。用脚跟支撑，伸展臀部和膝盖，将哑铃抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh. Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso. Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward. As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest. Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 躺在下坡长椅上，一手拿着哑铃，放在大腿上。用大腿帮助抬起哑铃，将哑铃抬到肩膀宽度，手掌朝向躯干。旋转手腕，使手掌朝前。吸气时，慢慢将哑铃放到一边，直到感觉胸口有拉伸感。呼气，用胸肌将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the bar towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement. Slowly release the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在胸部高度将一根直杆连接到拉线机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握法握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心发力。将杠铃拉向上胸部，将肩胛骨紧紧夹合。在乐章顶端稍作停顿。慢慢松开杠铃回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Keep your back straight and your chest up. Extend your arms straight overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears. Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms to return to the starting position. Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。保持背部挺直，胸膛挺直。双臂直伸过头顶，肘部靠近耳朵。通过弯曲肘部，将哑铃放到头后。停顿片刻，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。重复该动作直到所需次数，然后换腿重复。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height. Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，背部紧贴长凳。双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前，抬起至肩膀高度。慢慢将哑铃放到胸侧，保持肘部呈90度角。将哑铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides. Press the dumbbells upward, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双手各拿一个哑铃，手掌朝前。慢慢地将双脚向前移动，身体向球滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部都被球支撑。哑铃保持在肩膀高度，肘部弯曲并指向两侧。将哑铃向上按压，双臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌向内，手臂弯曲成90度角。双臂向后伸直，动作顶端收紧三头肌。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Kneel on the floor with an exercise ball in front of you. Place your elbows on top of the exercise ball, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 跪在地上，面前放着一个健身球。将肘部放在健身球上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收紧肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, hanging towards the floor. Keep your arm straight and lift the dumbbell out to the side, away from your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 脸朝下躺在平坦的长凳上，一只手拿着哑铃，哑铃垂向地面。保持手臂伸直，并将哑铃抬向一侧，远离身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest. Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back pressed against the bench. Extend your arm and push the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, fully extending your elbow. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 躺在下坡长椅上，一只手拿着哑铃，放在胸口。双脚平放在地上，背部贴近长凳。伸出手臂，将哑铃顶向天花板，肘部完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and position it at shoulder height, with your elbow bent and palm facing forward. Slowly press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended, while keeping your core engaged and maintaining balance on the exercise ball. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。一只手握着哑铃，将其置于肩膀高度，肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。慢慢将哑铃向上推，直到手臂完全伸展，同时保持核心收紧并保持在健身球上的平衡。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down. Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge. Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝下。前臂放在长凳上，手腕悬在边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将哑铃靠近前臂。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold the cable attachment with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Pull the cable attachment straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲，用过手握住钢索连接件。在整个练习过程中保持背部挺直，核心保持集中。将钢索连接件直拉向下巴，肘部先行。在顶端停顿片刻，双肩胛骨紧贴。慢慢把线缆连接放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms straight down towards the ground, palms facing each other. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lift your arms out to the sides and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。双臂伸直，掌心相对。保持肘部微微弯曲，双臂向两侧抬起，双肩胛骨紧紧夹合。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up. Place your free hand on your thigh for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，一只手握着哑铃，掌心朝上。空着的手放在大腿上以提供支撑。保持上臂不动，呼气，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in. Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。保持上臂靠近身体，肘部内收。慢慢将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，保持手腕笔直。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your hands on the ball beside your hips, fingers pointing forward. Engage your triceps and push through your hands to lift your body off the ball, straightening your arms. Lower your body back down by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手放在球上，手指指向前方。用力三头肌，用手推身体离开球，手臂伸直。弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，将身体放下。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands on the floor and your shins resting on the stability ball. Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, rolling the ball towards your hands. Keep your legs straight and your body in a pike position, forming an inverted V shape. Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the floor, keeping your head in line with your hands. Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手撑地，胫骨靠在稳定球上。收紧核心，抬起臀部向天花板，将球滚向双手。保持双腿伸直，身体呈斜撑姿势，形成倒V形。弯曲肘部，上半身向下贴地，保持头部与双手保持一致。用力推手，伸展双臂回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. At the same time, lift your legs off the ground, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰卧，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。收紧腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。同时抬起双腿，弯曲膝盖，向胸前方向。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身和大腿放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a high bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your lats and biceps to pull your chest up towards the bar, leading with your sternum. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在高杠上，双脚与肩同宽。伸手用过手握把，略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在杠铃上。用力拉背阔肌和肱二头肌，将胸部拉向杠铃，胸骨先行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢降回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and handlebar position to a comfortable level. Sit on the ergometer with your back straight and feet on the pedals. Grasp the handles with your hands and position your arms at a 90-degree angle. Start pedaling with your hands, pushing and pulling the handles in a controlled motion. Continue pedaling for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度和把手位置至舒适的水平。坐在测力计上，背部挺直，双脚踩在踏板上。用手握住手柄，双臂呈90度角。开始用手踩踏，控制地推拉把手。继续踩踏所需的时间或次数。

英文描述: Set up a barbell on the floor and lie face down on a bench with your chest just off the edge. Reach down and grab the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. With your legs straight and feet on the ground, lift the barbell off the floor by extending your arms. Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在地板上架好杠铃，俯卧在长凳上，胸部刚好贴在边缘。伸手用上手握法抓住杠铃，间距略宽于肩宽。双腿伸直，双脚着地，伸展双臂将杠铃从地面抬起。将杠铃拉向胸口，双肩胛骨紧紧挤压。将杠铃放回起始位置，重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Set up a bar at waist height and lie underneath it. Grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your body is straight. Pull your chest up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在腰部高度架起一把杠铃，躺在杠铃下面。用过手握法抓住杠铃，宽度略大于肩宽。身体摆位，让脚跟着地，身体保持挺直。通过挤压肩胛骨，将胸部拉向杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up a suspension trainer or straps at chest height. Stand facing the anchor point and grab the handles with an overhand grip. Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at an angle. Keep your body straight and engage your core. Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在胸前高度设置一个避震训练器或绑带。站在锚点面前，用过手握住把手。双脚向前走，身体向后倾斜，直到身体呈一定角度。保持身体挺直，核心肌群发力。把胸部拉向把手，肩胛骨紧贴。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height. Press one kettlebell overhead, fully extending your arm. Lower the kettlebell back to shoulder height. Repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个壶铃，肩高。将一个壶铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。将壶铃降回肩高。另一只手重复。继续交替挥臂，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold a kettlebell in each hand, with your palms facing towards your feet and your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling. Lower one kettlebell down towards your shoulder while keeping the other kettlebell extended straight up. Press the lowered kettlebell back up to the starting position while simultaneously lowering the other kettlebell down towards your shoulder. Continue alternating the press motion with each kettlebell for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先仰躺在地板上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个壶铃，手掌朝向脚，双臂直伸向天花板。将一个壶铃向下放向肩膀，同时保持另一只壶铃直伸向上。将放下的壶铃按回起始位置，同时将另一只壶铃向下放向肩膀。继续用壶铃交替进行按键动作，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Pass the kettlebell between your legs, switching hands as it reaches the back of your legs. As the kettlebell comes forward, pass it to the other hand between your legs. Continue passing the kettlebell between your legs in a figure 8 motion. Maintain a steady pace and engage your core throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握壶铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。壶铃在两腿之间传递，壶铃到达后侧时换手。壶铃向前时，把壶铃传给另一只手，放在双腿之间。继续用壶铃在两腿之间做8字形动作。保持稳定的节奏，在整个动作过程中都激活核心力量。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended. Bend one knee and bring it towards your chest, holding onto your thigh or shin. Straighten your leg as much as possible while keeping it elevated. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Repeat with the other leg.
中文描述: 仰躺，双腿伸直。弯曲一只膝盖，将膝盖向胸前，抓住大腿或小腿。尽量伸直腿部，同时保持抬高。保持拉伸20-30秒。另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the leverage machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad. Place your toes on the lever pad, with your heels hanging off the edge. Grasp the handles or side supports for stability. Push the lever pad down by extending your ankles, contracting your calf muscles. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement. Slowly return to the starting position by allowing your heels to rise back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整杠杆机的座椅，使你的肩膀与杠杆垫对齐。脚趾放在杠杆垫上，脚跟悬在边缘。握住把手或侧面支撑以保持稳定。通过伸展脚踝、收缩小腿肌肉来压下杠杆垫。在乐章底部稍作停顿。慢慢回到起始位置，让脚跟抬起。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement. Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部贴近垫子，坐在机器上。用过手握把手，肘部呈90度角。将手柄向前推，直到手臂完全伸展，动作中呼气。动作结束时短暂停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置，同时吸气。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees resting on the pads and your upper body facing forward. Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability. Keeping your core engaged, twist your torso to one side as far as comfortably possible. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，将自己放在机器上，膝盖放在垫子上，上半身朝前。抓住机器的把手或侧面以获得稳定性。保持核心收紧，将躯干尽可能舒适地向一侧扭转。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。反一遍扭转。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the captain's chair with your back against the backrest and your forearms resting on the arm pads. Keep your upper body stable and your back straight. Engage your abs and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在船长椅上，背靠靠背，前臂搭在护臂上。保持上半身稳定，背部挺直。收紧腹部，抬起双腿，保持伸直。继续举起，直到双腿与地面平行或尽可能高。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢把双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and fully extend your arm, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pull the handle down and across your body towards your opposite hip, squeezing your lat muscle at the bottom of the movement. Slowly return the handle to the starting position, fully extending your arm. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，将自己放在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚平放在地板上。用上手握住手柄，手臂完全伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。将手柄向下拉过身体，向对侧臀部方向，动作结束时收紧背阔肌。慢慢将手柄恢复到起始位置，手臂完全伸展。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and footplate position on the leverage machine. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整杠杆机上的座椅高度和脚板位置。坐在机器上，胸部贴着垫子，双脚平放在脚板上。用上手握把，略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，收紧核心。将手柄拉向胸部，双肩胛骨紧贴。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢松开并伸展双臂回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest. Place your feet on the footrests and grasp the handles for stability. Engage your adductor muscles and slowly bring your legs together, squeezing your inner thighs. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部靠在靠背上，将自己放在机器上。将双脚放在脚踏板上，握紧把手以保持稳定。收紧内收肌，缓慢地将双腿并拢，夹紧大腿内侧。在收缩峰值处暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back on a bench with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the medicine ball with both hands, extending your arms straight up above your chest. Lower the medicine ball towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Explosively push the medicine ball upwards, extending your arms fully and throwing the ball as high as possible. Catch the medicine ball and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手握住药球，双臂直伸至胸前。将药球向下放向胸口，肘部紧贴身体。爆发力向上推药球，双臂完全伸展，将球尽可能高地抛出。接住药球，重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the ground, rotating your torso to one side. Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧腹肌，抬起肩胛骨，将躯干旋转到一侧。稍作停顿，然后将肩胛骨放回起始位置。另一侧重复。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand or sit upright with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend one arm overhead, bending at the elbow so that your hand reaches towards the opposite shoulder blade. With your other hand, gently pull the elbow of the extended arm towards the opposite side of your head, feeling a stretch in your triceps. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 站立或坐直，双脚与肩同宽。一只手臂伸过头顶，肘部弯曲，使手伸向对侧肩胛骨。另一只手轻轻拉起伸出手臂的肘部，向头部另一侧拉，感受肱三头肌的拉伸。保持拉伸15-30秒，然后松开。另一侧重复。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down. Engage your glutes and core muscles. Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground. Hold the bridge position for a few seconds. Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双臂放在身体两侧，手掌朝下。用力臀部和核心肌群。抬起骨盆，抬起臀部离地。保持桥式姿势几秒钟。慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if sitting on a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，像坐在椅子上一样向后推臀，降低身体。保持胸膛挺直，背部挺直。降低身体直到大腿与地面平行。用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by kneeling on the ground with the roller positioned under your hips. Place your hands on the roller for support. Slowly roll the roller forward, extending your hips and stretching your glutes. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then roll back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时跪在地上，滚轮放在臀部下方。双手放在滚轮上以提供支撑。慢慢将滚轮向前滚动，伸展臀部并拉伸臀部。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后滚回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Grab the parallel bars with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended. Bend your knees and cross your ankles. Lower your body by bending your arms until your shoulders are below your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双手掌朝下，双臂完全伸展时抓住双杠。弯曲膝盖，交叉脚踝。弯曲手臂，直到肩膀低于肘部，身体下放。通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with a narrow parallel grip, palms facing towards you. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用窄平行握法悬挂在引体向上杠铃上，手掌朝向自己。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，肘部紧贴身体。继续拉直到下巴高于杠铃。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart. Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted. Bend your right knee and lower your body down, keeping your left leg straight. Place your hands on your right thigh for support. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立。右脚向前迈一步，左脚保持稳固。弯曲右膝，身体下放，左腿保持伸直。双手放在右大腿上以提供支撑。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后换侧重复。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body. As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手直接放在肩膀下方，身体保持直线。将胸部向下贴近地面，肘部保持靠近身体。下蹲时，将肩胛骨挤压，胸部向前推。在底部稍作停留，然后推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back on a mat or bench with your legs extended. Place your hands by your sides or under your glutes for support. Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在垫子或长凳上，双腿伸直。将双手放在身体两侧或臀大肌下方以获得支撑。弯曲膝盖，抬起双脚，将大腿靠近胸前。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to raise your torso back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽，脚趾朝前。将杠铃横放在上背部，放在斜方肌上。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。将躯干降低至与地面平行，感受腿后肌腱的拉伸。用力臀部和腿后腱，将躯干抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability. Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position. Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整铁匠机的座椅和脚踏板，使其舒适。坐在机器上，背靠靠背，双脚与肩同宽，放在脚踏板上。抓住机器的把手或侧面以获得稳定性。通过伸展双腿，背部贴在靠背上，将脚踏板推开。在完全伸展的姿势前停顿片刻。慢慢弯曲膝盖，将脚踏板向你方向放下，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height. Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把铁匠机架好，把杠铃放在髋部高度。站在吧台前，双脚与肩同宽。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。用下手握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。将杠铃拉向下胸部，将肩胛骨挤压在一起。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level. Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back and position yourself with a slight bend in your knees. Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the exercise. Lower the bar towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将铁匠机杆的高度调整到胸部高度。站在吧台前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握法握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。后退一步，膝盖微微弯曲。在整个练习过程中保持胸部抬起和核心肌群。将杠铃降低到胸部，肘部收紧。在底部暂停片刻，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows pointed outwards. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将下坡凳调整到所需角度。躺在凳上，双脚被脚垫固定。用宽握力握住杠铃，略宽于肩宽。松开杠铃，缓慢地将杠铃放向胸部，保持肘部向外。杠铃触及胸部时暂停片刻。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴近长凳。紧握杠铃，略窄于肩宽。松开杠铃，缓慢地将杠铃放向胸部，肘部紧贴身体。当杠铃触及胸部时暂停片刻。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip. Keep your arms straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双脚在大腿前方用过手握法握住杠铃。保持双臂伸直，将杠铃向前向上抬起，直到达到肩部水平。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the smith machine. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the barbell up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向铁匠机。用过手握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将杠铃拉向下巴，肘部先行。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar. Lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 悬挂在引体向上杆上，手掌朝向背对，双手张开比肩宽宽。收紧核心，双肩胛骨紧拢。将身体拉向杠铃，直到下巴高出杠铃。控制着身体回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips. Bend your knees slightly and lift your heels off the ground, balancing on the balls of your feet. Keeping your knees bent, rotate your knees in a circular motion, first clockwise and then counterclockwise. Perform the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手放在臀部。膝盖微微弯曲，脚跟抬离地面，脚掌保持平衡。保持膝盖弯曲，先顺时针旋转膝盖，然后逆时针旋转。完成该动作，重复次数达到所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged. Push through your palms explosively to propel your body off the ground. While in mid-air, clap your hands together before landing back in the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽。通过弯曲肘部，保持核心收紧，身体向地面下放。用手掌爆发力推动身体离地。在空中时，拍手后再回到起始姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height. Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you. Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged. Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一个悬挂训练器连接到高锚点，并将绑带调整到腰部高度。背对锚点站立，双臂伸直握住把手。腰部前倾，保持身体挺直，核心收紧。尽量降低身体，同时保持腹部的控制和紧张。在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing away from a suspension trainer with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend one leg forward and place the top of your foot in the foot cradle of the suspension trainer. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your chest up and your knee in line with your toes. Push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 站立时背对悬挂训练器，双脚与肩同宽。一条腿向前伸，脚背放在悬挂训练器的脚托上。弯曲站立腿，身体下放进入弓步姿势，保持胸部抬起，膝盖与脚趾保持对齐。用脚跟推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench, and straighten your arms. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅边缘，双手握着边缘，手指指向前方。双脚向前走，臀部从长椅上滑开，手臂伸直。弯曲肘部，身体向地面下放，背部紧贴长凳。用手掌撑直手臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。
