英文描述: Stand in front of the dip cage and grab the parallel bars with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended, feet off the ground, and body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars, then pause for a moment. Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在臂弯笼前，双手与肩同宽握住双杠。双臂完全伸展，双脚离地，身体挺直悬挂在单杠上。收紧背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，肘部靠近身体两侧。继续拉直到下巴高出把手，然后暂停片刻。慢慢将身体放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the cable machine with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly and pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在拉索机上，背挺直，双脚平放在地上。用过手握把，略宽于肩宽。微微向后倾斜，把手柄拉向胸口，双肩胛骨紧贴。在动作高潮处暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend your arms overhead, keeping them straight. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is upright. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。把手臂伸过头顶，保持伸直。收紧腹部，缓慢地将上半身抬离地面，向前蜷曲直到躯干直立。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by kneeling on the floor with a barbell placed on a bench in front of you. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly roll the barbell forward, extending your arms in front of you. Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your body, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先跪在地上，把杠铃放在你面前的长凳上。用过手握法握杠铃，间距略大于肩宽。保持核心收紧，背部挺直，缓慢地将杠铃向前滚动，双臂向前伸展。继续将杠铃向前滚动，直到身体完全伸展，双臂举过头顶。在完全伸展的姿势暂停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃向身体方向滚动，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor. Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight. Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，使大腿与地面平行，双脚平放在地板上。用过手握法握住背阔杠，间距略宽于肩宽。坐下，稍微向后靠，保持胸膛挺直，背部挺直。把杠铃往胸前拉，双肩胛骨紧贴。在动作底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a stirrup handle to a low cable pulley and stand facing the machine. Grasp the handle with your left hand and take a step back with your right foot, positioning your body at a slight angle. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. With your left arm extended and your palm facing down, pull the handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blade. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your shoulder blade. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your right arm.
中文描述: 将马镫手柄连接到低矮的钢索滑轮上，站立面向机器。左手握住把手，右脚后退一步，身体略微倾斜。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。左臂伸直，手掌朝下，通过收回肩胛骨将手柄拉向胸口。动作结束时停顿片刻，捏紧肩胛骨。慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置，重复到所需的次数。换边，用右臂重复动作。

英文描述: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用上握握法抓住引体向上杠，间距略宽于肩膀。手臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在杆上。通过弯曲肘部和收紧背部肌肉，收紧核心肌群，将身体拉向杠铃。继续拉直到下巴高出横杆。控制着身体回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights up to shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。肘部靠近躯干，呼气时将哑铃举到肩膀高度。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended to the sides. Keeping your legs straight, bend forward at the waist and reach down towards your toes with your right hand. As you reach down, simultaneously lift your left leg straight up behind you, maintaining balance. Return to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left hand reaching towards your toes and your right leg lifting up behind you. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向两侧伸展。保持双腿伸直，腰部前倾，右手向下伸向脚趾。下蹲时，同时将左腿直举到身后，保持平衡。回到起始位置，左手伸向脚趾重复动作，右腿抬起。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Grasp the cable handle with one hand, palm facing inward, and extend your arm fully. Pull the cable handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side, until your hand reaches your lower chest. Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。单手握住拉索把手，手掌朝内，手臂完全伸展。拉，肘部靠近身体侧面，直到手触及下胸。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在拉绳划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握住把手，保持背部挺直，肩膀放松。将把手拉向身体，双肩胛骨紧贴。在动作达到高潮时暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开把手回到起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Start by sitting on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Place your hands behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet, and lift your hips off the ground. Extend one leg straight out in front of you while simultaneously reaching your opposite hand towards your toes. Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上坐下。双手放在身后，手指指向脚部，抬起臀部离地。一条腿伸直向前，同时另一只手伸向脚趾。回到起始位置，在另一侧重复。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Grab the pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 握住引体向上杠铃时，双手朝向自己，双手与肩同宽。双臂完全伸展，双脚离地悬挂在杠铃上。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，肘部保持靠近身体。继续拉，直到下巴高于杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head. Lower the dumbbells slowly behind your head, bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，头比脚低，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。双臂完全伸展，肘部靠近头部。哑铃慢慢放到头后，弯曲肘部。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Let your arms hang straight down, palms facing your body. Engage your core and pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. As you pull the dumbbells up, rotate your palms so they face away from your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your palms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，采用过顶握法。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂直垂，手掌朝向身体。收紧核心，将哑铃拉向胸前，肘部保持靠近身体。拉起哑铃时，旋转手掌使其背离身体。动作顶端将肩胛骨紧紧收拢。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，手掌旋转回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the sledge hammer with both hands. Engage your core and keep your back straight. Swing the sledge hammer down towards the ground, using your core and upper body strength. As you swing down, pivot your hips and transfer the force to the hammer. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住大锤。收紧核心，保持背部挺直。用核心和上半身力量将大锤向下挥击。挥杆时旋转臀部，将力量传递给锤子。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Start by getting on your hands and knees, with your hands shoulder-width apart and your knees hip-width apart. Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground. Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双手双膝着地，双手与肩同宽，膝盖与臀部同宽。通过弯曲肘部，将上半身向下压向地面，保持靠近身体两侧。当胸部刚好离地面时，暂停片刻。用手掌撑直手臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend your arms straight above your head. Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双臂伸直过头顶。收紧腹部，抬起上半身，向膝盖前倾。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground and twist to bring your right elbow towards your left knee. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，抬起上半身离地，扭转右肘向左膝盖方向。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始姿势。反侧重复，左肘向右膝盖方向。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball down your back until your lower back is resting on the ball. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, allowing your lower back to stretch over the ball. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。慢慢地将双脚向前移动，将球顺着背部滚动，直到下背部贴在球上。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧核心，慢慢将上半身向下压向地面，让下背部在球上伸展。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer. Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground. Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在腰部高度设置一个杠铃，或者使用悬挂训练器。站在车把或悬挂训练台前，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握把握把，间距略宽于肩宽。身体向后靠，保持身体挺直，脚跟着地。将胸部拉向杠铃或把手，双肩胛骨紧贴。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you. Place your hands on the floor beside your hips, fingers pointing forward. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. Try to bring your legs parallel to the floor, forming an 'L' shape with your body. Hold this position for as long as you can. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直在前。双手放在臀部旁的地板上，手指指向前方。收紧核心，抬起双腿，保持伸直。试着让双腿与地面平行，身体形成“L”形。尽可能长时间地保持这个位置。慢慢把双腿放下，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement. Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，背部贴近垫子，坐在机器上。用过手握把手，肘部呈90度角。将手柄向前推，直到手臂完全伸展，动作中呼气。动作结束时短暂停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置，同时吸气。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your stomach with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling your back upwards. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴平，双腿伸直，双臂垂在身侧。收紧臀肌和腿后肌，慢慢抬起上半身，背部向上弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Lift one leg off the ground and rotate your ankle in a circular motion. Perform the desired number of circles in one direction, then switch to the other direction. Repeat with the other leg.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直在前。抬起一条腿离地，然后用脚踝做圆周旋转。先在一个方向做所需数量的圆，然后切换到另一个方向。另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the floor in front of you. Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Drive through your heels and extend your hips and knees to lift the barbell off the floor, keeping it close to your body. As the barbell reaches your thighs, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the barbell up towards your chest. As the barbell reaches chest height, quickly drop under it and catch it at shoulder level, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up. From the catch position, press the barbell overhead by extending your arms and pushing the barbell straight up. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃放在你面前的地板上。弯曲膝盖，臀部铰接，降低杠铃，用上手握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。用脚跟踩地，伸展臀部和膝盖，将杠铃从地面抬起，保持靠近身体。当杠铃到达大腿时，爆发性地伸展臀部，耸肩，将杠铃拉向胸前。当杠铃达到胸前高度时，迅速从杠铃下方接住，保持在肩部水平，肘部向前，手掌朝上。从接球位置，伸展双臂，将杠铃直上顶顶。将杠铃放回起始位置，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso forward. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。仰躺在球上，直到下背部得到支撑，上半身与地面平行。双手放在头后或胸前。收紧腹肌，将上半身抬向膝盖，躯干向前弯曲。动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Engage your lats and pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在高锚点上，如引体向上杆或坚固的横梁。站立面向锚点，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住弹力带，双手略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展过头顶，肘部微微弯曲。收紧背阔肌，将弹力带向下拉向胸部，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a cable to a low pulley and sit on a bench facing the cable machine. Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge. Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将钢索连接到低滑轮，坐在面向钢索机的长凳上。用过手握住钢索把手，手掌朝下。前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬挂在边缘。保持前臂静止，呼气并尽量将手腕向上弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将手腕放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，双脚与肩宽分开，站在史密斯机上。用略宽于肩宽的握法握住杠铃。将杠铃从架子上抬起，放在肩膀高度，肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。将杠铃向上推，直到双臂完全伸直。在杆顶稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回肩部水平。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the resistance band with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms extended down by your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the resistance band up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the resistance band back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。用反手握住阻力带，手掌朝上，双臂向下伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气，将阻力带向上弯曲向肩膀方向。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将阻力带放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Find a suspension trainer and adjust it to an appropriate height. Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with an overhand grip. Walk your feet forward, leaning your body forward until your weight is supported by the suspension trainer. Keep your body straight from head to heels, engage your core, and lower your chest towards the handles. Push through your chest and arms to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 找个悬挂教练，调整到合适的高度。背对锚点站立，用上手握把。双脚向前走，身体前倾，直到悬挂训练器支撑你的体重。保持身体从头到脚跟笔直，核心发力，胸部向下靠近把手。用力用胸和手臂回归起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, keeping your legs together. Once your knees are at chest level, explosively throw your legs down towards the ground, extending them fully. Allow your legs to swing back up and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 悬挂在引体向上杆上，双臂完全伸展，手掌朝向背对自己。收紧核心，抬膝向胸前，保持双腿并拢。当膝盖与胸部齐平时，猛地将双腿向地面猛地放下，完全伸展。让双腿重新摆动，重复该动作达到所需的次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, with your elbows pointing forward. Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, as if you are sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower down, making sure your knees do not go past your toes. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽，杠铃放在上胸，肘部朝前。通过弯曲膝盖并向后推臀部，像坐在椅子上一样降低身体。下蹲时保持胸部挺直，背部挺直，确保膝盖不要超过脚趾。继续放下，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟支撑站起，伸展臀部和膝盖。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured. Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, feeling a stretch in your chest and shoulders. Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the motion. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，头部低于臀部，双脚稳固。用内翻握法（手掌朝外）握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。双臂伸展到胸前，肘部保持轻微弯曲。将杠铃以弧形动作放下，感受胸部和肩膀的拉伸。暂停片刻，然后反向将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted. Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your left leg straight. Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping with your left foot.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃放在上背部。右脚向侧面迈出大步，左脚保持稳稳。弯曲右膝，身体下垂进入弓步姿势，保持左腿伸直。用右脚蹬地，回到起始位置。在另一侧重复，左脚踩步。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your palm facing your body. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with the opposite arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气，将一个哑铃向上弯曲向肩膀，同时手掌朝向身体。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。用另一只手臂重复同样的动作。继续交替挥臂，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the weight accordingly. Stand facing away from the pulley machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down, and bring your hands above your head. Keep your upper arms close to your head and perpendicular to the floor. Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索连接到高滑轮，并相应调整重量。站在背对滑轮机的背对上，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索，掌心朝下，双手举过头顶。保持上臂靠近头部，且垂直于地面。慢慢地弯曲肘部，将绳子放到头后。暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身离地，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Slowly raise the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。坐在长椅上，背靠着垫子，双脚平放在地上。用过手握法握杠铃，杆宽略大于肩宽。将杠铃抬到肩膀高度，肘部保持微微弯曲。慢慢将杠铃举过头顶，双臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃降回肩高。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Once you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upwards by jumping off the ground. As you jump, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, pushing through your toes. Land softly back into the squat position and immediately repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽，将杠铃横跨上背部。通过弯曲膝盖并向后推臀部，将身体降低到深蹲姿势。一旦深蹲到底部，就从地面跳起来爆发向上。跳跃时，伸展臀部、膝盖和脚踝，用脚趾支撑。轻柔地落地回到深蹲姿势，立即重复该动作，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，双脚稳固，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手放在头后或胸前。收紧腹肌，将上半身抬向膝盖，弯曲躯干。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it. Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。趴在长凳上，胸口和腹部靠着长凳。用下手握法握杠铃，与肩同宽。双臂完全伸展，让杠铃垂向地面。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, bending at the knees and hips. As you lower, push your knees out to the sides and keep your weight on your heels. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚分开比肩宽，脚趾略微向外。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在斜方肌上。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，身体下蹲，膝盖和臀部弯曲。下蹲时，将膝盖向两侧撑起，体重保持脚跟着地。降低至大腿与地面平行，然后用脚跟回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip. Shift your weight onto your left foot and lift your right foot slightly off the ground. Hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your right leg extended behind you for balance. Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body and your left leg slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，双腿前方用上握握法将杠铃放在大腿前方。将重心转移到左脚，右脚略微抬离地面。臀部向前倾斜，保持背部挺直，右腿向后伸展以保持平衡。将杠铃向下放下，保持靠近身体，左腿微微弯曲。在底部稍作停顿，然后用力臀部和腿筋，将躯干抬回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Attach a D-handle to each low pulley cable and stand in the middle of the cable crossover machine. Grasp the handles with a pronated grip (palms facing down) and take a step forward, positioning your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and lean forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged. With your arms extended out to the sides and slightly bent at the elbows, exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the cables back and upward in a reverse fly motion. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在每根低滑轮上装一个D型手柄，站在交叉钢索机的中间。用旋内握法（手掌朝下）握住把手，向前迈一步，双脚与肩同宽。膝盖微微弯曲，腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，腹部收紧。双臂向两侧伸展，肘部微弯曲，呼气并紧握肩胛骨，同时以反向飞翔动作将钢索向后和向上拉。在收缩峰值处暂停片刻，然后吸气，慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight. Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Maintaining control, slowly bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion, crossing them in front of your body. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, feeling the stretch in your chest muscles. Reverse the motion and slowly return your arms to the starting position, keeping tension on your chest muscles throughout. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将手柄连接到拉索机的低滑轮上，选择合适的重量。站在机器中央，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过握握把手，双臂向两侧伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。保持控制，缓慢地将手臂向前摆动，交叉置于身体前方。在动作达到顶点时暂停片刻，感受胸肌的拉伸。反向动作，缓慢将手臂恢复到起始位置，始终保持胸肌紧张。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the cycle cross trainer. Place your feet on the pedals and grip the handlebars. Start pedaling in a smooth and controlled motion. Maintain a steady pace and increase the resistance if desired. Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，并调整到自行车交叉训练台上。把脚放在踏板上，握紧车把。开始以平滑且受控的动作踩踏。保持稳定的节奏，如果需要可以增加阻力。在有氧训练的目标时间内继续踩踏。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable handle to the low pulley. Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms fully in front of you. Lean forward from your hips while keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the cable handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows. Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一个倾斜的长凳，呈45度角，并在低滑轮上连接钢索手柄。坐在长椅上，面向滑轮机，双脚平放在地上，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握住钢索把手，双臂完全伸直在身前。从臀部前倾，同时保持背部挺直，核心收紧。通过收回肩胛骨并弯曲肘部，将钢索把手拉向胸部。在动作顶端收紧背部肌肉，然后慢慢将手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a cable handle in one hand and extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow slightly bent and your palm facing forward. Slowly bring your arm across your body, squeezing your chest muscles. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一只手握住钢索把手，手臂向侧面伸出，平行于地面。保持肘部微微弯曲，手掌朝前。慢慢地将手臂横跨身体，挤压胸肌。在动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arm extended over the edge of the bench, holding a dumbbell with an underhand grip. Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended. Curl the dumbbell back up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长椅上，胸贴着垫子，手臂伸出长凳边缘，用下手握持哑铃。慢慢放下哑铃，直到手臂完全伸展。将哑铃重新卷向肩膀方向，保持上臂不动。动作顶端收紧肱二头肌，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在牧师式的弯举凳上，上臂搭在垫子上，胸膛贴着它。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your toes on an elevated surface, such as a step or block. Place your hands on a stable support, such as a wall or railing, for balance. Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 脚尖站在高处，如台阶或滑块。双手放在稳定的支撑物上，如墙壁或栏杆，以保持平衡。脚跟尽可能抬高，将身体重量抬到脚掌上。在脚掌顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body. Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground. Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽。胸部向下贴近地面，肘部紧贴身体。胸部刚好离地面时，迅速将膝盖放下。伸展双臂将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat and footplate of the sled machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability. Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate. Continue pushing until your legs are almost fully extended, but without locking your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the footplate back towards your body by bending your knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅和脚踏板，使其舒适。坐在雪橇机上，背部靠背，双脚与肩同宽，放在踏板上。握紧座椅两侧的把手以保持稳定。通过伸展双腿，将脚踏板推离身体，保持脚跟贴在脚踏板上。继续推直到双腿几乎完全伸展，但不锁死膝盖。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后通过弯曲膝盖慢慢将脚踏板向身体方向放下。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight down by your sides. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend your torso to one side, lowering your hand towards your knee. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂直伸至两侧。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，缓慢将躯干向一侧弯曲，手向下靠近膝盖。在底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。另一侧重复。继续交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended. Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长椅上，双手各拿一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，举重时呼气，同时收紧肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到推荐的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a cable handle to the lowest setting on a cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended. Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and knees behind your toes. As you squat down, curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the top of the curl, squeezing your biceps. Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把钢缆手柄接到钢丝机的最低档位。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住钢索把手，手掌朝上，手臂完全伸展。将身体降低到深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，膝盖放在脚趾后方。蹲下时，将钢索把手向肩膀弯曲，肘部靠近身体两侧。在卷发顶端停顿片刻，捏紧你的肱二头肌。慢慢将钢索把手放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a kettlebell in your right hand, with your arm extended overhead and your palm facing forward. Rotate your left foot slightly to the right, and shift your weight onto your left leg. Bend your left knee and hinge at the hip, lowering your torso towards the left side. Keep your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell. As you lower your torso, allow your right leg to straighten and your right foot to pivot slightly. Lower your torso until you feel a stretch in your left hamstring and your right arm is pointing towards the ground. Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 站立时双脚比肩宽宽还宽，脚趾稍微向外。右手握壶铃，手臂伸过头顶，手掌朝前。左脚稍微向右转动，并将重心转移到左腿上。弯曲左膝，髋部铰接，将躯干向下倾向左侧。右臂伸直，眼睛盯着壶铃。当你降低躯干时，让右腿伸直，右脚稍微转动。降低躯干，直到感觉左腿后腱拉伸，右臂朝向地面。暂停片刻，然后收紧核心，用左脚跟推回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side. Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center. Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side. Continue alternating sides with each repetition.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手直接放在肩膀下方，身体保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，身体向下。下蹲时，向左旋转身体，左臂伸直向侧面。向后推回起始位置，同时身体旋转到中心。重复俯卧撑，这次身体向右旋转，右臂向侧伸展。每次重复时继续交替换侧。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，交替双臂。

英文描述: Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels. Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将双手放在一个高处，比如长凳或台阶，间距略大于肩宽。双腿向后伸展，脚掌掌部支撑，从头到脚跟形成一条直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持身体直线，将胸部向下靠近高处。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Bend your knees and quickly drop into a partial squat. Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving the kettlebells overhead. Lock out your arms and catch the kettlebells overhead with your knees slightly bent. Stand up straight and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个壶铃，肩高。膝盖微微弯曲，收紧核心。将壶铃按在头顶，双臂完全伸展。弯曲膝盖，迅速进入部分深蹲。爆发性地伸展髋部和膝盖，将壶铃推向头顶。双臂锁定，膝盖微弯时在上方接住壶铃。站直，回到起始位置。重复直到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee. Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 仰躺，双腿伸直。弯曲右膝，将右脚踝放在左大腿上，刚好在膝盖上方。双手握住左大腿，轻轻拉向胸口。保持拉伸20-30秒。松开拉伸，另一侧重复。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your back straight. Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the curl with your left hand. After completing the curl with your left hand, exhale and press the dumbbell in your right hand overhead. Extend your arm fully and hold for a moment at the top. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the press with your left hand. Continue alternating between curls and presses for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持肘部靠近躯干，背部挺直。呼气，右手将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，保持上臂静止。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。用左手重复弯举动作。左手完成弯举后，呼气，右手哑铃按压头顶。手臂完全伸展，保持顶部片刻。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。用左手重复按压。继续交替做弯举和按压，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Slowly curl the rope handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the rope handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 把绳子把手连接到低滑轮钢索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用下手握住绳柄，手掌朝上。将上臂贴在讲道者长椅垫上，肘部微微弯曲。在整个练习过程中保持背部挺直，核心保持集中。慢慢将绳柄向肩膀弯曲，保持上臂不动。动作顶端收紧肱二头肌，然后慢慢将绳柄放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Start by lying face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet firmly planted on the ground. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable. Return to the center and repeat the rotation to the other side. Lower your upper body back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，俯卧在稳定球上，臀部靠在球上，双脚稳稳踩地。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。激活核心，缓慢地将上半身从球上抬起，伸展背部，直到身体从头部到脚跟形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将躯干向一侧旋转，保持臀部和双腿稳定。回到中心，重复旋转到另一侧。将上半身放回起始位置，重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your hands placed behind your head. Lift your legs off the ground and bend your knees at a 90-degree angle. Bring your right elbow towards your left knee while simultaneously straightening your right leg. Return to the starting position and repeat the movement on the opposite side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee while straightening your left leg. Continue alternating sides in a pedaling motion for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双手放在头后。抬起双腿离地，膝盖弯曲成90度角。右肘靠近左膝盖，同时伸直右腿。回到起始位置，在相反侧重复动作，左肘靠近右膝，同时伸直左腿。继续交替踩踏，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Slowly roll the ball forward, walking your feet out until your upper back is resting on the ball and your legs are extended straight in front of you. Place your hands on your hips for support. Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted. Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, and hold the position for 20-30 seconds. Slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your heels and using your hamstrings to pull yourself back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。慢慢将球向前滚动，双脚向外走，直到上背部靠在球上，双腿伸直。双手放在臀部支撑。收紧核心，缓慢地将上半身向下放向地面，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。感觉腿后肌腱拉伸时停下来，保持姿势20-30秒。慢慢地通过脚跟用力推地，用腿后肌拉自己站起来，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. Raise your legs until they are perpendicular to the ground. Lower your legs back down to the starting position. Simultaneously, throw your legs down towards the ground, keeping them straight. Raise your legs back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸直，双臂垂在身侧。把手放在臀肌下方支撑。收紧核心，抬起双腿，保持伸直。抬起双腿，直到与地面垂直。把腿放回起始位置。同时，双腿向地面下放，保持伸直。把腿抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips. Pull the handle towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在拉索划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用宽大的过手握法握住手柄，手掌朝下。保持背部挺直，臀部稍微前倾。将手柄拉向下胸部，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在宫缩达到顶峰时稍作停顿。慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and the kettlebell held in your right hand, arm fully extended above your shoulder. Bend your right knee and place your right foot flat on the ground, keeping your left leg extended. Pressing through your right foot, lift your hips off the ground, coming into a bridge position. Slide your left leg underneath your body, bending your left knee and placing your left foot flat on the ground. Rotate your torso to the left, bringing your left hand to the ground for support. Pressing through your right foot and left hand, lift your torso off the ground, coming into a kneeling position. From the kneeling position, stand up, keeping the kettlebell extended overhead. Reverse the movement to return to the starting position. Repeat the exercise on the other side, starting with the kettlebell in your left hand.
中文描述: 开始时仰卧，双腿伸直，右手握壶铃，手臂完全伸展在肩膀上方。弯曲右膝，右脚平放在地上，左腿保持伸展。用右脚用力，抬起臀部，进入桥式。左腿滑到身体下方，左膝弯曲，左脚平放在地上。躯干向左旋转，左手撑地以支撑。右脚和左手用力，抬起躯干，进入跪姿。从跪姿站起，壶铃保持伸直。反向动作回到起始位置。反向重复动作，左手握壶铃。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended down. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso. Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with your left arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向躯干，双臂向下伸展。保持背部挺直，肘部靠近躯干。呼气，右手将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，保持上臂不动。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。用左臂重复动作。继续交替双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Sit upright with your chest lifted and your shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Engage your lats and pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，将自己放在器械上，膝盖放在垫子下方，双脚平放在地上。用过手握把手，略宽于肩宽。坐直，抬起胸部，肩膀向后，保持下背部轻微拱起。收紧背阔肌，将把手向下拉向胸部，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后慢慢松开把手回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability. Push the footplate away from your body by extending your leg, keeping your back against the backrest. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your leg to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 调整机器座椅，使双脚放在脚踏板上时膝盖呈90度角。坐在机器上，背部靠背，双脚与肩同宽。双手放在机器的把手或侧面以保持稳定。通过伸直腿将脚踏板推离身体，保持背部贴在靠背上。在完全伸展的姿势处暂停片刻，然后慢慢弯曲腿回到起始位置。重复到所需的次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height. Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height. Lower the pressed dumbbell back to shoulder height while pressing the other dumbbell overhead. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，位于肩高。将一个哑铃压在头顶，另一个哑铃保持在肩膀高度。将按压的哑铃降回肩膀高度，同时将另一只哑铃压过头顶。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Place an exercise ball behind you and position one foot on top of it, keeping your balance. With your arms fully extended and elbows close to your sides, curl one dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将一个健身球放在身后，一只脚放在上面，保持平衡。双臂完全伸展，肘部靠近身体两侧，将一个哑铃向肩膀弯曲，同时保持上臂不动。将哑铃放回起始位置，另一只手臂重复。继续交替双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the curl with the other arm. Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲一只哑铃，同时旋转前臂，直到手掌朝向肩膀。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。用另一只手臂重复弯举动作。继续交替做弯举，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight. Lie face down on the machine with your legs straight and your heels against the padded lever. Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability. Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting your hips off the pad. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings. Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整机器以适应你的身体，并选择所需的重量。趴在机器上，双腿伸直，脚跟贴着带垫的杠杆。握住机器的把手或侧面以保持稳定。保持上半身不动，呼气并尽量将双腿卷起，但臀部不离垫子。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧腿后肌群。吸气，缓慢将杠杆放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Lean back and position the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，哑铃放在大腿上。向后倾斜，将哑铃放在胸口两侧，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Pull the handles down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，将自己放在机器上，膝盖放在垫子下方，双脚平放在地面上。用过手握把，稍宽于肩宽。坐直，胸部外展，肩膀向后，保持下背部轻微拱起。将手柄向下拉向胸部，肘部先行，肩胛骨紧贴。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开手柄回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level. Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，双脚平放在机器上。用上手握把，双手保持胸部高度。将手柄向前推，直到手臂完全伸展，肘部微微弯曲。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手柄向胸前拉，保持控制。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Hold the medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest. Lean back slightly, engaging your abs and keeping your back straight. Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the medicine ball towards the right side of your body. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the medicine ball towards the left side of your body. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地板上。双手握住药球，放在胸前。微微向后倾斜，收紧腹部并保持背部挺直。缓慢地将躯干向右扭转，将药球朝身体右侧移动。稍作停顿，然后向左扭动躯干，将药球朝身体左侧方向移动。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Pull the barbell towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。用上手握法握杠铃，稍宽于肩宽。将杠铃拉向上腹部，双肩胛骨紧贴。将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start with the barbell on the ground in front of you, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and chest up as you lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees. As the barbell reaches your mid-thigh, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides. As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, rotating your elbows around and catching the barbell on your shoulders in a front squat position. Stand up with the barbell, fully extending your hips and knees. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position, keeping control of the weight throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 杠铃放在你面前的地面上，双脚与肩同宽。弯腰握杠铃，略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，抬起杠铃，伸展臀部和膝盖。杠铃到达大腿中部时，猛地向上拉，耸肩，肘部高高向两侧。杠铃达到最高点时，迅速下蹲，旋转肘部，将杠铃用肩膀前蹲姿势接住。举杠铃站起，完全伸展臀部和膝盖。将杠铃放回起始位置，保持重量控制。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up. Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball. Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将bosu球放在地上，平坦的一面朝上。将自己摆成俯卧撑姿势，双手放在bosu球的外缘。收紧核心，弯曲肘部，身体向下压向bosu球。通过伸展手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Once your chest is just above the ground, push through your hands to extend your arms and lift your upper body up. At the top of the movement, protract your shoulder blades by pushing your upper back towards the ceiling. Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement by retracting your shoulder blades and lowering your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，身体从头到脚跟保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，身体向下。当胸部刚好离地面时，用手撑开双臂，抬起上半身。动作达到顶点时，通过将上背部向天花板方向推，将肩胛骨伸出。暂停片刻，然后通过收回肩胛骨，将身体放回起始位置，反向移动。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Place a dumbbell on the ground in front of a bench. Stand facing away from the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend at the knees and hips to lower yourself down towards the bench, keeping your chest up and back straight. Once your glutes touch the bench, push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把哑铃放在长椅前的地上。站立时背对长凳，双脚与肩同宽。膝盖和臀部弯曲，将身体往长凳方向下沉，保持胸部抬起，背部挺直。臀肌触碰长凳后，用脚跟支撑站回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate. Sit on the sled machine with your back flat against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability. Push against the footplate to extend your legs, straightening them completely. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees to lower the footplate back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整雪橇机座，使双脚踩在脚踏板上时膝盖呈90度角。坐在雪橇机上，背部贴着靠背，双脚与肩同宽，放在脚踏板上。握紧座椅两侧的把手以保持稳定。用力推脚踏板以伸展双腿，完全伸直双腿。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢弯曲膝盖，将脚踏板降回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by sitting on the edge of a bench with your upper back resting against it and your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart. Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands. Engage your glutes and core muscles, then press through your heels to lift your hips off the bench, creating a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes. Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先坐在长椅边缘，上背部靠着长椅，双脚平放在地上，臀部宽宽。将杠铃放在臀部，双手牢牢握住。激活臀肌和核心肌肉，然后用脚跟支撑，将臀部从长凳上抬起，形成一条从膝盖到肩膀的直线。在顶部停顿片刻，收紧臀部。慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with one hand using an overhand grip. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head in a neutral position. Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，单手用过顶握法握住杠铃。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，头保持中立。将杠铃拉向胸口，肘部靠近身体，肩胛骨紧贴。将杠铃以控制的方式放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。把一条腿伸到身后，用脚尖保持平衡。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续加重，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿重复。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at a height that allows you to comfortably rest it on your upper back. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned outwards. Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the bar by straightening your legs and stepping back from the rack. Take a deep breath and brace your core. Initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将杠铃机架设在一个你能舒适地放在上背部的高度。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾略微向外。走到杠铃下方，将杠铃放在上背部，放在斜方肌上。双手略宽于肩宽握杠铃。通过伸直双腿并后退，从杠铃架上卸下杠铃。深呼吸，稳固核心。通过向后推臀部并弯曲膝盖开始深蹲。降低身体直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。整个动作过程中保持胸部挺起，背部挺直。用脚跟支撑站起，伸展臀部和膝盖。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整器械的重量和高度设置。用上握握把，略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，双脚离地悬挂。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向手柄，肘部保持靠近身体。继续拉，直到下巴高于手柄。在顶部暂停片刻，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height. Stand facing the barbell with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back and position the barbell on your front shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and deltoids. Keep your chest up, back straight, and core engaged. Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将杠铃架设在肩高的位置。站立时面向杠铃，双脚与肩宽。用过手握法握杠铃，略宽于肩宽。后退一步，将杠铃放在前肩，放在锁骨和三角肌上。保持胸部挺直，背部挺直，核心收紧。通过膝盖和臀部弯曲身体，就像坐在椅子上一样。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully. Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，使把手与肩平齐。坐在机器上，背部贴着垫子，双脚平放在地板上。用过握握把手，将其从支撑上抬起，双臂完全伸展。将把手放到肩膀高度，肘部略微弯曲。将把手高举过头顶，直到手臂完全伸展。在顶部稍作停留，然后慢慢将把手放回肩膀高度。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the cable machine. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Sit down and position your thighs under the thigh pads, keeping your feet flat on the floor. Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a neutral spine. Pull the handles down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats. Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，面向拉索机。用过手握把，双手与肩同宽。坐下，将大腿放在大腿垫下，双脚平放在地板上。稍微向后倾，胸部抬起，保持脊柱中立。将把手向下拉向上胸部，将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。动作结束时暂停片刻，感受背阔肌的收缩。慢慢松开手柄，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Place the arm blaster on your upper arms, ensuring a secure fit. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with the opposite arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将手臂爆能器放在上臂，确保牢固贴合。保持上臂不动，呼气，同时收缩肱二头肌，将一只哑铃向肩膀弯曲。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。用另一只手臂重复动作。继续交替双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards. Place a barbell on the ground in front of you, centered between your feet. Bend your knees and lower your hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, to grip the barbell with an overhand grip. Engage your core and drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees simultaneously. As you lift, keep your chest up and back straight, and push your hips forward to fully engage your glutes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚分开比肩宽宽，脚趾朝外。将杠铃放在你前方的地面上，正中两脚之间。弯曲膝盖，降低臀部，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，用过手握法握住杠铃。收紧核心，用脚跟推动杠铃离地，同时伸展髋部和膝盖。举重时，保持胸部抬起，背部挺直，臀部向前推以充分收回臀肌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，保持控制。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back against the bench and your feet flat on the ground. Place your hands on the bench for support. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背靠长凳，双脚平放在地上。双手放在长凳上以提供支撑。收紧臀肌和腿后肌群，然后抬起臀部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将臀部放下至起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with a straight bar attachment at chest height. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cable. Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees. Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise. Start with your arm fully extended and perpendicular to the floor. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and push the bar down until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 站在胸前，面向带有直杆连接装置的拉绳机。用过手握住杠铃，后退以增加拉索张力。双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。整个练习过程中保持背部挺直，核心收紧。开始时手臂完全伸展并垂直于地面。保持上臂静止，呼气并向下推杠直到手臂完全伸展。暂停片刻，然后吸气，慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Position your upper arms against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the rope towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the rope back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索连接连接到低滑轮钢索机上。站在机器前，双脚与肩同宽。用中性握法（手掌相对）握住绳索。将上臂贴在讲道台垫上，肘部微微弯曲。保持上臂静止，呼气，通过收缩肱二头肌将绳索向肩膀弯曲。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将绳索放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the handles to the cables at chest height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward. Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables. Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise. With a slight bend in your elbows, slowly bring your arms forward and together in front of your chest. Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement. Slowly reverse the movement, returning your arms to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将手柄与钢索挂在胸前高度。双脚与肩同宽，背对拉索机站立。用上手握把，手掌朝前。稍微向前迈步，以增加钢索的张力。在整个练习过程中保持核心收紧，背部挺直。肘部微微弯曲，缓慢地将双臂向前并合拢在胸前。在动作达到顶点时收紧胸肌。慢慢反转动作，将手臂恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body. Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向拉索机。右手握住拉索把手，手掌朝下，手臂完全伸展并与地面平行。保持肘部静止且贴近身体。慢慢弯曲肘部，将拉索把手向下放到头后。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换侧，用左臂完成动作。

英文描述: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handle with your right hand and extend your arm fully, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged. Pull the handle towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blade and bending your elbow, keeping your arm close to your body. Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your left arm.
中文描述: 将拉绳柄连接到低滑轮，双脚平放在地上面向机器坐下。右手握住手柄，手臂完全伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。从臀部向前倾，保持背部挺直，腹部收紧。通过收回肩胛骨并弯曲肘部，将手柄拉向躯干，保持手臂贴近身体。动作顶端收紧背部肌肉，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧，用左臂完成动作。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。双臂向两侧举起，肘部保持轻微弯曲，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Place a dumbbell on the floor next to the bench. Stand facing the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend at the waist and place your left knee and left hand on the bench for support. Pick up the dumbbell with your right hand using a reverse grip (palm facing down). Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your left arm.
中文描述: 设置一个倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。在长凳旁的地板上放置一个哑铃。站立面向长凳，双脚与肩宽。腰部弯曲，左膝和左手放在长凳上以提供支撑。右手用反握法（手掌朝下）提起哑铃。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将哑铃拉向胸部，肘部靠近身体。动作顶端收紧背部肌肉。将哑铃以控制的方式放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。换侧，用左臂重复动作。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂不动，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举重直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝下，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并举起哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢开始将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh. Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh. Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down. Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在斜凳上，一手拿着哑铃，放在大腿上。身体前倾，将上臂贴在大腿内侧。将哑铃抬向一侧，保持手臂微微弯曲，手掌朝下。继续抬起，直到手臂与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴在平坦的长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。双臂直伸向地面，肘部保持轻微弯曲。激活肩部肌肉，将手臂向两侧抬起，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下至起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh. Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh. Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position. Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward. Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
中文描述: 坐在平坦的长凳上，一只手拿着哑铃，放在大腿上方。躺在长凳上，保持哑铃贴在大腿上。用空着的手帮忙把哑铃抬到起始位置。哑铃正好放在肩膀上方，手臂伸直，手掌朝内。将哑铃向一侧放下，形成一个宽弧线，肘部保持轻微弯曲。当手臂与地面平行时暂停，然后反向移动，将哑铃带回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数，然后换臂，重复。

英文描述: Adjust the incline bench to a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, resting it on your shoulder. Push the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 将斜坡调整为45度角。坐在长凳上，背靠垫子，双脚平放在地面。一只手握哑铃，双手握着，放在肩膀上。将哑铃向上推离身体，手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you. Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。一只脚踩地，另一条腿伸直在前方。微微前倾，双臂向两侧伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。慢慢将哑铃放下并向两侧放下，感受胸口的拉伸感。在底部稍作停顿，然后收紧胸肌，将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换腿，重复此过程。

英文描述: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline. Lie face down on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Allow your arms to hang straight down towards the floor, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将长凳调整为45度倾斜。俯卧在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。让双臂直直垂向地面，肘部略微弯曲。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the ez barbell to hang down in front of you. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the ez barbell upwards towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。用下手握法握住EZ杠铃，手掌朝上，双手与肩同宽。将上臂放在大腿上，让EZ杠铃垂在你面前。保持上臂不动，呼气，将EZ杠铃向上弯曲，靠近肩膀。在顶部稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将EZ杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward. Keeping your back straight and your elbows close to your sides, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。保持背部挺直，肘部靠近身体两侧，呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand. Place your left foot on a stepbox or elevated surface behind you. Keeping your back straight and core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, lowering the dumbbell towards the ground. As you lower the dumbbell, simultaneously lift your left leg behind you, maintaining a straight line from head to heel. Lower the dumbbell until you feel a stretch in your right hamstring, then return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，右手握着哑铃。左脚放在身后的踏板箱或高处。保持背部挺直且核心收紧，臀部向前弯曲，哑铃向下放下。放下哑铃时，同时将左腿抬向身后，保持从头到脚跟的直线。将哑铃放下直到右侧腿后肌感到拉伸，然后回到起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step forward with one foot and position your feet so that your front foot is flat on the ground and your back foot is elevated on a bench or step. Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, keeping your back knee slightly bent and your back heel off the ground. Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。单脚向前迈步，双脚摆放，前脚平放在地面，后脚抬高放在长凳或台阶上。通过弯曲前膝和臀部，保持后膝微微弯曲，后脚跟离地，身体降低。继续降低，直到前大腿与地面平行，然后用前脚跟推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿，重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing forward. Place your other hand on an incline bench for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握哑铃，手掌朝前。另一只手放在斜凳上以提供支撑。保持上臂不动，呼气，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface. Step up onto the bench or step with your right foot, pushing through your heel to lift your body up. As you step up, simultaneously lift your left knee towards your chest. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your left foot back to the ground while keeping your right foot on the bench or step. Repeat the movement with your left foot on the bench or step. Continue alternating between your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在长凳或台阶前，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。右脚放在长凳或台阶上，确保整只脚都接触地面。走上长凳或用右脚踏步，用脚跟推动身体向上。上台时，同时将左膝抬向胸口。动作顶端暂停，然后缓慢将左脚放回地面，同时右脚保持站在凳子或台阶上。左脚在长凳或台阶上重复动作。继续左右替，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards. Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended. Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight. Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight. Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body. Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbell back down between your legs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚分开比肩宽，脚趾朝外。双手举哑铃，双臂伸直。弯曲膝盖，将臀部下沉成深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直。将哑铃放下，双臂保持伸直。用脚跟踩地，臀部向前伸展，将哑铃拉到身体前方。动作顶端收紧臀肌，然后将哑铃放回双腿之间。重复至所需次数。
