英文描述: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, with your palms facing down. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight and your neck in line with your spine. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将稳定球放在地上，脸朝下趴在球上，臀部靠在球上，双脚靠墙以保持稳定。双臂伸直，手掌朝下。收紧核心，缓慢抬起上半身离开球，保持背部挺直，颈部与脊柱保持对齐。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and your heels resting on top of the stability ball. Place your arms by your sides for stability. Engage your glutes and core muscles to lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your shoulders to your heels. Bend your right knee and bring it towards your chest, keeping your left leg extended and your foot flexed. Kick your right leg diagonally across your body, extending it fully and engaging your hamstrings. Slowly return your right leg to the starting position, maintaining control and stability. Repeat the movement with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时仰卧，双腿伸展，脚跟放在稳定球上。将手臂放在身体两侧以保持稳定。激活臀部和核心肌肉，将臀部抬离地面，形成从肩膀到脚跟的直线。弯曲右膝，向胸前移动，保持左腿伸展，脚屈曲。右腿斜踢身体，完全伸展并收紧腿后腱。缓慢将右腿恢复到起始位置，保持控制和稳定性。左腿重复动作，左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back on a mat with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on your chest. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在垫子上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面。用过手握法握杠铃，将它放在胸口。用力收紧腹部，缓慢将上半身抬离地面，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width. Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position. As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest. As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在平坦的长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，双手放在大腿上。用大腿帮助抬起哑铃，一次抬起哑铃，这样你就能在肩膀宽度时将它们举在前方。达到肩宽后，将手腕向前旋转，使手掌背向背对。这就是你的起始姿势。吸气时，慢慢将哑铃放到身体两侧，直到与胸口平齐。呼气时，用肱三头肌将哑铃抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and a dumbbell in one hand, resting your elbow on the inside of your thigh. Fully extend your arm and hold the dumbbell with an underhand grip. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双腿分开，一手拿哑铃，肘部靠在大腿内侧。手臂完全伸展，用下手握住哑铃。保持上臂静止，呼气，将重量向肩膀弯曲，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height. Place your hands on the parallel bars with a close grip, palms facing each other. Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整器械以适应你想要的重量和高度。双手紧握双手，双手相对，放在平行杠上。双臂完全伸展，双脚离地悬挂在杠铃上。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向单杠，肘部紧贴身体。继续拉直到下巴高于杠铃。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards. Hold a kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended downwards. Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight. Drive through your heels and explosively extend your hips and knees, pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin. As you pull the kettlebell up, keep your elbows high and wide, and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚张开大于肩宽，脚趾朝外。双手举壶铃，双手放在身体前方，双臂向下伸展。弯曲膝盖，降低臀部进入深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直。用脚跟推动，爆发性地伸展髋部和膝盖，将壶铃拉向下巴。拉壶铃时，保持肘部高且宽，肩胛骨紧拢。将壶铃放回起始位置，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the footplate. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the footplate, shoulder-width apart. Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the footplate, keeping your heels off the edge. Release the safety handles and push the footplate away from you by extending your knees. Once your knees are fully extended, slowly lower your heels by flexing your calves. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the footplate back up by extending your calves. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整腿推机的座椅，使双脚踩在脚踏板上时膝盖微微弯曲。坐在机器上，背部靠靠背，双脚平放在脚踏板上，肩宽。将脚趾和脚掌球放在脚踏板上，保持脚跟不碰边缘。松开安全把手，通过伸展膝盖将脚踏板推开。膝盖完全伸展后，通过弯曲小腿慢慢降低脚跟。在底部稍作停顿，然后伸展小腿将脚踏板推回去。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle with your arm extended in front of you, parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back. Slowly rotate your arm outward, away from your body, while keeping your elbow in the same position. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。手臂伸直，平行于地面，握住钢索手柄。保持肘部微微弯曲，肩胛骨向后拉。慢慢将手臂向外旋转，远离身体，同时保持肘部保持原位。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells as close to your opposite shoulder as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。肘部靠近躯干，上臂保持静止。呼气并举起哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃尽量靠近对侧肩膀。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand. Bend your knees slightly and press the kettlebell overhead with your right arm, keeping your elbow locked. Rotate your torso to the left, shifting your weight onto your left foot. Bend your left knee and lower your torso towards the ground, keeping your right arm extended overhead. As you lower, keep your eyes on the kettlebell and your chest lifted. Once your left hand touches the ground, push through your left foot and straighten your left leg, driving your hips forward. As you drive your hips forward, use your core and right arm to press the kettlebell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握壶铃。膝盖微微弯曲，右臂将壶铃压过头顶，肘部保持锁定。将躯干向左旋转，将重心转移到左脚上。弯曲左膝，将躯干向下放，右臂保持伸直。下降时，眼睛盯着壶铃，胸部抬起。左手触地后，用左脚用力，伸直左腿，推动臀部向前。当你向前推髋部时，用核心和右臂将壶铃按回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Allow the kettlebells to hang straight down in front of your body. In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while shrugging your shoulders. As the kettlebells rise, pull them up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows high and out to the sides. Catch the kettlebells at shoulder height, with your palms facing inward and your elbows pointing forward. Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个壶铃，采用上握。膝盖微微弯曲，髋部向前折叠，保持背部挺直，胸部挺立。让壶铃直悬在身体前方。一个流畅的动作中，爆发性地伸展臀部和膝盖，同时耸肩。壶铃升起时，将壶铃拉向肩膀，肘部保持高高并向两侧张开。在壶铃肩高时接住壶铃，手掌朝内，肘部向前。将壶铃放回起始位置，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Press the kettlebell overhead in a straight line, fully extending your arm. As you press the kettlebell overhead, simultaneously dip your knees and quickly straighten them to generate momentum. As the kettlebell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it by bending your knees and hips. Catch the kettlebell with a slight bend in your knees and hips, and your arm fully extended overhead. Stand up straight, fully extending your knees and hips, and stabilize the kettlebell overhead. Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and hips, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握壶铃，保持肩高。膝盖微微弯曲，收紧核心。将壶铃按直线举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。当你将壶铃按在头顶时，同时屈膝并迅速伸直以产生动量。当壶铃达到最高点时，迅速屈膝和臀部，将壶铃压到壶铃下方。膝盖和臀部微微弯曲，手臂完全伸展举过头顶接住壶铃。站直，膝盖和臀部完全伸展，壶铃稳住头顶。弯曲膝盖和臀部，将壶铃降回起始位置，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged. As you push back up, kick one leg out to the side, extending it fully and engaging your glutes. Return your leg to the starting position and repeat the push-up, alternating legs with each repetition. Continue alternating leg kicks and push-ups for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，双脚并拢。通过弯曲肘部，保持背部挺直，核心收紧，身体向下降低。向上推时，将一条腿向侧踢，完全伸展并收紧臀部。将腿恢复到起始位置，重复俯卧撑，每次重复交替双腿。继续交替做腿踢和俯卧撑，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended. Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles. Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴在垫子或长凳上，双腿完全伸展。有伴侣或使用阻力带固定脚踝。收紧腿后腱，双腿向臀部抬起，保持膝盖伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your upper arms stationary and curl the dumbbells as high as possible while contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。保持上臂不动，哑铃尽量弯曲到最高，同时收缩肱二头肌。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you. Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower into a squat position, gripping the barbell with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and chest up as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees. As the barbell reaches hip level, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides. As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, pulling yourself into a deep squat position. Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your knees bent. Stand up by extending your hips and knees, keeping the barbell overhead. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃放在你面前的地面上。弯曲膝盖，臀部铰接，降低到深蹲姿势，用上手握住杠铃。保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，用脚跟将杠铃抬离地面，伸展髋关节和膝盖。当杠铃达到臀部水平时，爆发性地向上拉，耸肩，肘部高高向两侧拉。当杠铃达到最高点时，迅速从杠铃下方下移，进入深蹲姿势。双臂完全伸展，膝盖弯曲，在头顶接住杠铃。站起时伸展臀部和膝盖，杠铃保持在头顶。通过反向动作将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 用下手握住引体向上杠铃，双手与肩同宽。双臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在杠铃上。用力背部肌肉，将身体拉向杠铃，胸部引领。继续拉直到下巴高出杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Place the roller under your glutes, just above your knees. Lean back and place your hands on the ground behind you for support. Engage your glutes and slowly roll the roller forward, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling a stretch in your glutes. Slowly roll the roller back to the starting position, extending your legs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先坐在地上，双腿向前伸展。将滚轮放在臀部下方，膝盖上方。向后倾斜，双手撑在身后地面以提供支撑。收紧臀部，缓慢将滚轮向前滚动，弯曲膝盖并向胸前移动。动作结束时暂停片刻，感受臀部的拉伸感。慢慢将滚轮滚回起始位置，伸展双腿。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance. Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward. Press the bar up overhead until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整铁匠机的座高，使杠铃与肩平。双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。用过手握法握住杠铃，略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起，后退，保持站姿稳定。将杠铃降低到颈后，肘部向前。将杠铃向上压，直到双臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting on your traps. Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the bar and take a step back, maintaining a stable stance. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as your flexibility allows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把铁匠机架好，杠铃放在肩膀高度。双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。从杠铃下方站到横杆上，横跨你的上背部，放在斜方肌上。双手的宽度略大于肩宽，握住杠铃。卸下杠铃，后退一步，保持站姿稳定。保持胸部抬起和核心收紧，开始深蹲时，向后推臀并弯曲膝盖。将身体降低，直到大腿与地面平行，或者尽可能低，直到你的柔韧性允许。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟踩回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest. Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整铁匠机的座椅，使杆子与肩部高度。坐在长椅上，背靠着垫子，双脚平放在地上。用过手握法握住杠铃，间距略宽于肩膀。双臂完全伸展，将杠铃从架子上抬起，直接放在胸口上方。慢慢将杠铃放向额头，肘部靠近头部。在底部暂停片刻，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to comfortably stand with your feet flat on the ground. Position yourself under the bar with your shoulders directly below it and your feet shoulder-width apart. Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform or weight plates, with your heels hanging off the edge. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise. Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将铁匠机杆调整到一个让你能舒适地站立、双脚平放在地上的高度。把自己放在杠铃下方，肩膀正好在杠铃下方，双脚与肩同宽。将脚掌放在高起的平台或负重板上，脚跟悬挂在边缘。用过手握法握住杠铃，间距略宽于肩膀。锻炼过程中要收紧核心，保持背部挺直。慢慢抬起脚跟，尽量抬高脚跟，将身体重量抬到脚掌掌上。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie face down on the ground with your legs extended. Bend your left knee and reach back with your left hand to grab your left foot or ankle. Gently pull your left foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your left quad. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release. Repeat with your right leg.
中文描述: 趴在地上，双腿伸直。弯曲左膝，左手向后伸手抓住左脚或脚踝。轻轻地将左脚拉向臀部，感受左大腿四头肌的拉伸。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后松开。右腿重复。

英文描述: Lie face down on the ground with your legs straight. Bend your right knee and reach back with your right hand to grab your right foot or ankle. Gently pull your right foot or ankle towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in the front of your right thigh. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release and repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 趴在地上，双腿伸直。弯曲右膝，右手向后伸手抓住右脚或脚踝。轻轻地将右脚或脚踝拉向臀部，感受右大腿前侧的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒。放开，另一侧重复。

英文描述: Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings. Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly. Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body. Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion. Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise. Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout. Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.
中文描述: 将椭圆机的电阻水平和倾斜度调整到你想要的设置。踩上机器的踏板，轻轻握住把手。先用脚向下压，并将把手拉向身体。继续这个动作，在推拉之间交替，模拟走路或跑步的动作。保持稳定的节奏，并在整个锻炼过程中保持核心的激活。坚持到你理想的有氧锻炼时长。在下车前逐渐降低机器的强度和速度。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Bend one knee and place your foot flat on the ground. Using your hands or a towel, gently pull your toes towards your body, feeling a stretch in your calf. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat on the other leg.
中文描述: 仰躺，双腿伸直。弯曲一只膝盖，脚平放在地上。用手或毛巾轻轻拉动脚趾，感受小腿的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒。松开拉伸，另一条腿重复。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee. Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release and repeat on the other side.
中文描述: 仰躺，双腿伸直。弯曲右膝，将右脚踝放在左大腿上，膝盖上方。双手抓住左大腿，轻轻拉向胸前。保持拉伸20-30秒。放开，另一侧重复。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and lift your shoulders off the ground, curling forward towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。收紧腹部，抬起肩膀，向膝盖前倾。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, forming a T shape with your body. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，分布在身侧。将双臂向两侧举起，直到与地面平行，与身体形成T字形。停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手握住稳定球，双臂伸直在身前。慢慢将稳定球放向胸部，感受胸大肌的拉伸。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on the pad of the preacher bench, allowing your arms to fully extend. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand as you contract your biceps. Continue to curl the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with your left arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长椅上，双手各拿一个哑铃，手掌朝上。将上臂放在讲道者长椅的垫子上，让双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲右手的哑铃，同时收紧肱二头肌。继续弯举哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。暂停片刻，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。用左臂重复这个动作。继续交替挥臂，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended. Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. While performing the bicep curl, raise one leg off the ground and hold it in the air for the duration of the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，双臂完全伸展。慢慢将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，肘部靠近身体两侧。在动作顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。做肱二头肌弯举时，抬起一条腿，并在整个动作过程中保持在空中。重复到所需次数，然后换腿重复。

英文描述: Lie flat on the floor with your face down and your arms extended straight out in front of you, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Rotate your palms so they are facing down towards the floor. Keeping your arms straight, lift the dumbbells off the floor by contracting your forearms. Continue lifting until your forearms are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 趴在地上，脸朝下，双臂伸直，双手各握一个哑铃。旋转手掌，使其朝向地面。保持手臂伸直，通过收缩前臂将哑铃抬离地面。继续举重直到前臂完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平。保持一会儿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both hands behind your head. Keep your elbows close to your ears and your upper arms stationary. Slowly extend your forearms upward, squeezing your triceps at the top. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握毛巾放在头后。肘部靠近耳朵，上臂保持静止。慢慢将前臂向上伸展，在上方收紧三头肌。停顿片刻，然后慢慢把毛巾放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height. Kneel down on the pad facing the machine, with your hands gripping the handles. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and close to the machine. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整机器以符合你想要的重量和高度。跪在垫子上，面向机器，双手握紧手柄。弯曲肘部，保持背部挺直并贴近器械，降低身体。在底部稍作停顿，然后推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width. Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position. As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest. As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Make sure to use only your triceps and do not use your forearms or biceps to help lift the dumbbells. After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在平坦的长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，双手放在大腿上。用大腿帮助抬起哑铃，一次抬起哑铃，这样你可以将哑铃举到肩膀宽度前方。达到肩宽后，将手腕向前旋转，使手掌朝向背对。这就是你的起始姿势。吸气时，慢慢将哑铃放到身体两侧，直到与胸口平齐。呼气时，用肱三头肌将哑铃抬回起始位置。确保只用肱三头肌，不要用前臂或肱二头肌来帮助举哑铃。在收缩位置停顿一会儿后，重复该动作，完成规定的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad. Grasp the handles with a wide grip and keep your elbows slightly bent. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整器械到你想要的高度，并把膝盖固定在垫子上。用宽握力握住手柄，肘部保持微微弯曲。通过弯曲肘部，降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。伸展双臂，将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position. Jump explosively upwards, extending your legs and arms. While in the air, spread your legs apart and bring your arms out to the sides. Land softly with your feet shoulder-width apart, bending your knees to absorb the impact. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，身体下蹲。爆发性地向上跳，伸展双腿和手臂。空中时，双腿分开，双臂向两侧展开。双脚与肩同宽轻柔着陆，弯曲膝盖以吸收冲击。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step forward with your right foot, bending your knee and lowering your body into a lunge position. Push off with your right foot and step back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with your left foot, alternating legs with each step. Continue stepping back and forth, maintaining a steady pace. Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右脚向前迈步，弯曲膝盖，身体下垂进入弓步姿势。右脚蹬地，回到起始位置。左脚重复动作，每步交替迈步。继续前后迈步，保持稳定节奏。重复到所需的时长或次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh. Allow your wrist to extend, letting the dumbbell roll down towards your fingers. Slowly curl your wrist back up, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地上。一只手握着哑铃，前臂放在大腿上。让手腕伸展，让哑铃向手指滚动。慢慢将手腕卷回，将哑铃拉向前臂。重复到所需次数，然后换到另一只手。

英文描述: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall or other stable surface. Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将稳定球放在地上，俯卧在球上，臀部放在球上，双脚靠在墙壁或其他稳定表面上。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧核心，缓慢抬起上半身离开球，伸展背部直到身体从头部到脚跟形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle. Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh. Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground. Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest. Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 将长椅倾斜角度调整为30-45度。坐在长凳上，一手拿着哑铃，放在大腿上。躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上。双臂直伸过胸前，握住哑铃。将哑铃向一侧放下，形成一个宽弧线，肘部保持轻微弯曲。当手臂与地面平行时暂停，然后反转动作将哑铃带回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height. Stand perpendicular to the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the band handle with both hands and step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band. Bring your hands to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body. Engage your core and maintain a stable stance. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, pushing the band away from your body. Hold the extended position for a few seconds, focusing on maintaining tension in your core. Slowly bring your hands back to your chest, resisting the pull of the band. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在腰部高度的坚固锚点上。站立时与锚点垂直，双脚与肩同宽。双手握紧弹力带把手，离开固定点以在弹力带中产生张力。将双手放向胸前，保持肘部弯曲并贴近身体。收紧核心并保持稳定站姿。双臂伸直，将弹力带从身体外推开。保持伸展姿势几秒钟，专注于保持核心的紧张。慢慢将手收回胸前，抵抗弹力带的拉扯。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand. Place your feet flat on the ground and let your arms hang straight down with your palms facing your body. Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将一张倾斜的长凳摆成45度角，双手各握一个哑铃坐下。双脚平放在地上，双臂直垂，手掌朝向身体。保持手臂伸直，肩膀尽量往耳朵方向耸肩。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the edge of a bench or have someone hold your feet down. Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳边缘，或让别人扶着你的脚。平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身，向前蜷曲直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground. Walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your upper back is supported on the ball and your head, neck, and shoulders are off the ball. Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inward. Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground. Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，一手拿哑铃，双脚平放在地上。双脚向前移动，滚动球，直到上背部支撑在球上，头部、颈部和肩膀离开球。手臂伸直，哑铃直举在胸前，手掌向内。慢慢将哑铃放向一侧，保持肘部微微弯曲。当手臂与地面平行时暂停片刻。用力胸肌，将哑铃抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your upper arm resting on the pad. Hold the dumbbell with a neutral grip (palms facing your body). Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长椅上，一手拿哑铃，上臂放在哑铃垫上。保持中立握法（手掌朝向身体）。保持上臂静止，呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端暂停，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher curl bench with your feet flat on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your upper arm against the preacher pad. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在牧师弯举凳上，双脚平放在地上。一只手握哑铃，反手握法，上臂靠在讲道垫上。保持上臂静止，呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up. Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝上。肘部放在大腿内侧，膝盖上方。保持上臂不动，呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing away from the machine. Hold the rope handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows out to the sides. Keeping your hips stationary, flex your waist and crunch your torso down towards your thighs. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索把手连接到高滑轮上，跪下背对机器。双手握住绳柄，将其放在头后，肘部保持两侧外开。保持臀部不动，弯曲腰部，向大腿方向弯曲躯干。在底部暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body. Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight. Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body. Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在平坦的长凳上，一只手拿着哑铃，手掌朝向身体。双脚平放在地上，保持背部挺直。将哑铃抬至肩膀高度，肘部靠近身体。将哑铃向上按压，直到手臂完全伸展。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip. Let the dumbbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palm facing your body. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbow. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握哑铃，采用上手握法。哑铃悬挂在大腿前方的臂长处，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，呼气，将哑铃直举至下巴方向，肘部引导。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band. Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes. As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other. Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition. Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，双腿伸直，双臂举过头顶，握住乐队。同时收紧腹肌，抬起双腿和上半身离地，双手伸向脚趾。当你放下双腿和上半身时，换个位置，双腿交叉。重复这个动作，每次重复时交替调整双腿的位置。继续练习到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body. Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃。腰部前倾，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂向后伸直，肘部靠近身体。慢慢把哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Kneel on the floor and hold the handles of the band with both hands, palms facing down. Place the band on the ground in front of you and position your hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and slowly roll the wheel forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control. Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 跪在地上，双手握住乐队的把手，手掌朝下。将乐队带放在你面前的地上，双手与肩同宽。收紧核心，缓慢地将方向盘向前滚动，尽量伸展身体，同时保持控制。在最远处暂停片刻，然后慢慢将方向盘向膝盖方向滚动，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the band handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, pushing the bands away from your chest. Slowly lower the bands back down to your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴着长凳。用过手握法握住弹力带把手，间距略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，将弹力带从胸前推开。慢慢将弹力带放回胸前，保持肘部呈90度角。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead. Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。双手握哑铃，掌心朝下，双臂直伸过头顶。保持上臂靠近头部，肘部向前，慢慢弯曲肘部，将哑铃放到头后。暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at ankle height. Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent. Hinge at the hips and lean forward, maintaining a neutral spine. Extend your right leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top. Lower your right leg back down and repeat with the left leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力圈固定在脚踝高度的坚固锚点上。站立时背对锚点，双脚与肩同宽。后退一步，在弹力带中制造张力，保持膝盖微微弯曲。臀部弯曲，身体前倾，保持脊柱中立。右腿向后伸直，臀部顶部收紧。右腿放下，左腿重复。继续交替做足，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your hands behind your head and your knees bent. Lift your feet off the ground and bring your right knee towards your chest while simultaneously twisting your torso to bring your left elbow towards your right knee. Straighten your right leg while bringing your left knee towards your chest and twisting your torso to bring your right elbow towards your left knee. Continue alternating the twisting motion, as if you are pedaling a bicycle, while keeping your core engaged throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双手放在头后，膝盖弯曲。抬起双脚，右膝向胸前，同时扭转躯干，使左肘向右膝靠近。伸直右腿，同时将左膝向胸前，扭动躯干使右肘向左膝。继续交替旋转动作，就像踩自行车一样，同时保持核心收紧。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam. Stand facing the anchor point and grab the band with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your feet hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your back straight as you pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在高锚点上，如引体向上杆或坚固的横梁。站在锚点面朝上，双手与肩同宽握住弹力带。后退以增加弹力带张力，保持双脚与髋部同宽。收紧核心，保持背部挺直，将弹力带向下拉向胸口，同时将肩胛骨紧紧挤压。动作结束后稍作停顿，然后慢慢将弹力带放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight. Bring your upper arms close to your sides and keep your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部前倾，保持背部挺直。将上臂靠近身体两侧，肘部保持90度弯曲。双臂向后伸直，动作顶端收紧三头肌。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides. Place a tennis ball between your ankles. Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在墙边，双脚与肩同宽。在墙壁和下背部之间放一个健身球。双手各握一个哑铃，双臂伸展到身体两侧。在脚踝之间放一个网球。抬起脚跟，抬起身体踮起脚尖。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall. Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides. Place a tennis ball between your knees. Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 背靠墙站立，在下背部和墙之间放置一个健身球。双脚与肩同宽，稍微向前方。双手各握一个哑铃，双臂伸展到身体两侧。把网球放在膝盖之间。抬起脚跟，抬起身体踮起脚尖。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head. Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。一只手拿哑铃，手臂直直地伸过头顶。弯曲肘部，将哑铃放到头后，保持上臂靠近耳朵。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后回到起始位置。另一只手重复。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双手握杠铃，手掌朝上。肘部靠近躯干，上臂保持静止。呼气并收紧肱二头肌，同时举起哑铃，尽量将杠铃靠近肩膀。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing up, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地面，头放在长凳末端。握紧EZ杠铃，手掌朝上，双臂直伸过胸前。保持上臂静止，慢慢弯曲肘部，将杠铃放到头后。暂停片刻，然后把手臂伸回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up a barbell on a power rack at chest height. Stand facing the barbell and position yourself underneath it, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest, with your arms fully extended. Lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在胸口高度的杠铃架上架好杠铃。站在杠铃面前，站在杠铃下方，双脚与肩同宽。用过手握法握杠铃，间距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起，双臂完全伸展，直接举在胸前。将杠铃向下放向胸部，肘部紧贴身体。当杠铃碰到你的胸口时，请稍作停顿。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Place the balance board on a flat surface. Step onto the balance board with one foot, ensuring it is centered. Slowly shift your weight onto the foot on the balance board, keeping your core engaged. Maintain your balance and stability as you hold the position for a desired amount of time. Repeat the exercise with the other foot.
中文描述: 把平衡板放在一个平坦的表面上。单脚踩在平衡板上，确保平衡板居中。慢慢将体重转移到平衡板上的脚上，保持核心收紧。保持平衡和稳定性，保持该姿势所需的时间。用另一只脚重复这个动作。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs. Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping the other leg on the ground. Lower the raised leg back down and repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双腿间握着杠铃。保持双腿伸直，尽量抬起一条腿，另一条腿保持落地。将抬起的腿放下，另一条腿重复。继续交替双腿，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your hands by your sides. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground about 6 inches. Keeping your legs straight, alternate lifting one leg slightly higher than the other. Continue this fluttering motion for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸直，双手放在身体两侧。收紧核心，将双腿离地约6英寸。保持双腿伸直，交替将一条腿稍微抬高于另一条。继续这种拍打动作，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your elbows close to your sides and slowly curl one arm up towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps at the top. Lower the arm back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握紧带，手掌朝上。保持肘部靠近身体两侧，慢慢将一只手臂向肩膀弯曲，肱二头肌顶部收紧。将手臂放回起始位置，另一只手臂重复。继续交替握臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place a resistance band just above your knees. Engage your glutes and core muscles. Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。在膝盖上方放置阻力带。激活臀肌和核心肌肉。脚跟踩地，抬起臀部，顶端收紧臀肌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。上臂后侧靠在讲道者长椅或斜凳上，肘部微微弯曲。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲哑铃，同时收紧肱二头肌。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平齐。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢地将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height. Kneel down facing away from the anchor point and hold the band with both hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides. Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, bringing your hands towards your opposite hip. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在腰部高度的坚固锚点上。跪下背对锚点，双手握紧弹力带，肘部弯曲并贴近身体两侧。收紧腹肌，缓慢将躯干向一侧扭转，双手朝向对侧髋部。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。另一侧重复。继续左右交替，重复次数达到预期。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the handles of the cable machine with an overhand grip. Position your hands at shoulder height, with your palms facing forward. Keep your core engaged and your back straight. Press one handle up and forward until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，用上手握住拉绳机的把手。双手保持与肩高，掌心朝前。保持核心收紧，背部挺直。将一只手柄向上并向前推，直到手臂完全伸展。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手柄放回起始位置。另一只手臂重复。交替换双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using only your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，并将杠铃放在上背部。尽量将脚跟抬离地面，只用脚趾。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands close together. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement. Exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双手紧握杠铃，双手紧握。整个动作中肘部靠近躯干，上臂保持静止。举重时呼气，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬高杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down. Keep your arms straight and lift the band up in front of you until your arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手掌心朝下，将弹力带放在大腿前方。保持手臂伸直，将弹力带举起至与地面平行。在弹力带顶部暂停片刻，然后慢慢将弹力带放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by lying flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee. At the same time, bring your left knee towards your right elbow, creating a twisting motion. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and extend your legs back to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and your right knee towards your left elbow. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，肘部朝外。收紧腹部，抬起上半身，右肘向左膝方向。同时，将左膝向右肘方向，形成扭转动作。在顶部稍作停顿，然后缓慢放下上半身，双腿恢复到起始位置。重复动作，这次左肘向右膝，右膝向左肘。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down. Keep your arms straight and slowly raise them forward until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手掌朝下，将弹力带放在大腿前方。保持手臂伸直，慢慢向前抬起，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Plant your feet firmly on the ground and keep your back straight against the bench. Start with the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and palms facing each other. Press the dumbbells up and away from your body, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一个倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌相对。双脚稳稳踩地，背部保持直贴长凳。哑铃开始与肩平，肘部弯曲，手掌相对。将哑铃向上并远离身体，双臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your feet together. Place the band around the arches of your feet and hold the ends of the band with your hands. Engaging your abs, lift both legs off the ground until they are perpendicular to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 仰躺，双腿伸直，双脚并拢。将弹力带绕在脚弓周围，用手握住弹力带末端。收紧腹部，双腿抬离地面，直到与地面垂直。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢把双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles. Extend one leg forward and rest the top of your foot on a bench or step behind you. Hold onto a support with one hand for balance. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your knee in line with your toes. Push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，并在脚踝上绑上阻力带。一条腿向前伸出，脚背放在凳子或身后的台阶上。一只手握住支撑以保持平衡。弯曲站立腿，身体下蹲为深蹲姿势，保持膝盖与脚趾保持一致。用脚跟推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold the band with one hand and extend your arm fully in front of you. Keeping your back straight, pull the band towards your body by bending your elbow and squeezing your shoulder blades together. At the same time, twist your torso towards the side of the pulling arm. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension in the band and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。单手握住弹力带，手臂完全伸直在身前。保持背部挺直，通过弯曲肘部并夹紧肩胛骨将弹力带拉向身体。同时，将躯干向拉臂侧侧扭转。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢释放弹力带的张力，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and a dumbbell resting on your lower abdomen. Bend your knees and bring the dumbbell towards your glutes, keeping your feet flat on the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸展，哑铃放在下腹部。弯曲膝盖，将哑铃朝臀部方向移动，双脚保持平放在地上。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach a resistance band to a sturdy anchor point at ground level. Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step forward to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent. Hinge at the hips and push your glutes back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees. Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Drive your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在地面的坚固锚点上系上一个阻力带。站立时背对锚点，双脚与肩同宽。向前迈步，在弹力带中制造张力，保持膝盖微微弯曲。臀部弯曲，臀部向后推，保持膝盖轻微弯曲。将躯干降低至与地面平行，感受腿后肌腱的拉伸。向前推臀部，收紧臀肌，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point. Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将带子牢固地固定在一个稳定的锚点上。仰躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手握住弹力带，双臂直伸向天花板。用力腹部，缓慢抬起上半身，向前弯曲，直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始姿势。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate. Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge. Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability. Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整座椅高度，使膝盖稍微弯曲，双脚平放在脚踏板上。脚趾放在脚踏板上，脚跟悬在边缘。抓住把手或座椅两侧以保持稳定。用脚掌前部用力，尽量抬高脚跟。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a stationary object at chest height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands in front of you. Keep your arms straight and lift them out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将胸带固定在一个与胸部高度相同的固定物体上。双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住乐队。保持手臂伸直，向两侧抬起，直到与地面平行。动作顶端将肩胛骨紧紧收紧。慢慢把手臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold the band with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and wrap it around your fingers. Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地上。用过手握法握住弹力带，手掌朝下，然后用手指环绕。前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬挂在边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，夹紧前臂。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将手腕放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Allow the kettlebells to hang in front of your body with your arms fully extended. In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders. As the kettlebells reach shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebells in the rack position, with your palms facing inward and the kettlebells resting on the outside of your forearms. Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat the movement with the opposite arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个壶铃，采用上握。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。让壶铃悬挂在身体前方，双臂完全伸展。一个流畅的动作中，爆发性地伸展臀部，耸肩，将壶铃拉向肩膀。当壶铃达到肩高时，旋转手腕，将壶铃置于架状位置，手掌向内，壶铃放在前臂外侧。将壶铃放回起始位置，用另一只手臂重复动作。继续交替双臂，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. As you lower yourself, tap your chest with your right hand. Push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time tapping your chest with your left hand. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，身体保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，身体向下降低。当你降低身体时，用右手轻敲胸部。将自己推回起始位置。重复这个动作，这次用左手轻敲胸部。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ball, curling your shoulders towards your hips. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度。仰躺在稳定球上，直到下背部得到支撑，上半身与地面平行。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧腹肌，抬起上半身离开球，肩膀向臀部弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell with both hands above your chest, arms extended. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双手举起哑铃，双臂伸展。慢慢将哑铃放到头后，同时保持双臂伸直。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a stable anchor point at waist height. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the band with one hand, palm facing inward, and step back to create tension in the band. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Pull the band towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在腰部高度的固定锚点上。站立时面向固定点，双脚与肩同宽。单手握住弹力带，手掌朝内，后退以在弹力带内产生张力。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。将弹力带拉向腰部，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将弹力带放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other. Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight. As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead. Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows. Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将壶铃放在胸前，掌心相对。通过弯曲膝盖、向后推臀部，保持胸部抬起、背部挺直，进入深蹲姿势。当深蹲达到最低点时，爆发力用脚跟站起，同时将壶铃压过头顶。动作顶端锁定双臂，肘部完全伸展。通过反向动作，弯曲肘部并将重量放回胸前，将壶铃降回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at chest height. Stand with your side facing the anchor point and grab the band with one hand. Step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band. Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees. Bring your hand holding the band across your body, towards the opposite shoulder. While maintaining tension in the band, push your hand forward and away from your body, extending your arm. Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other hand.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在胸前的坚固锚点上。站立时侧面朝向锚点，单手抓住弹力带。离开固定点以增加弹力带张力。双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。将握带的手横跨身体，向另一侧肩膀方向移动。保持弹力带张力的同时，将手向前推远离身体，伸出手臂。慢慢回到起始位置，重复到所需次数。换侧，用另一只手重复动作。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将哑铃举到肩膀高度，肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展。在哑铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands. Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Release the tension on the rope and repeat the stretch on the other leg. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，双腿伸直在前。将绳子绕在脚掌上，用手握住绳子的末端。轻轻地将绳子拉向自己，弯曲脚部并拉伸小腿肌肉。保持拉伸15-30秒。放松绳子上的紧张，然后在另一条腿上重复拉伸。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your chest. Bend your knees slightly and rotate your torso to the right, swinging the barbell down towards your right hip. As you reach the bottom of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and rotate your torso to the left, swinging the barbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder. Continue this twisting motion, alternating sides, for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃，放在胸前。稍微弯曲膝盖，向右旋转躯干，将杠铃向下摆向右臀部。当动作达到底部时，迅速反转动作，将躯干向左旋转，杠铃向上横跨身体向左肩方向摆动。继续这种扭转动作，交替左右，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet. Hold the band with your palms facing forward and raise your hands to shoulder height, elbows bent. Press the band overhead, fully extending your arms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带放在脚下。手掌朝前握住弹力带，双手举至肩膀高度，肘部弯曲。将弹力带压过头顶，双臂完全伸展。在弹力带顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将弹力带放回肩膀高度。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your left foot. Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed. Slowly raise your left heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your left heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the right leg.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，将弹力带环绕在左脚前掌上。如有需要，握住稳定物体保持平衡。慢慢抬起左脚跟离地，将身体重量抬到脚掌前端。在脚掌顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将左脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后切换到右腿。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your foot. Hold onto a stable object for balance. Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立，将弹力带环绕在脚掌前端。握住稳定的物体保持平衡。慢慢抬起脚跟，将身体重量抬到脚掌上。在脚掌顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数，然后换到另一条腿。

英文描述: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you. Bend your knees and lower into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest lifted. From the squat position, pull the band handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在腰部高度的坚固锚点上。站立时面向锚点，双脚与肩同宽。双手掌相对，双臂伸直，握住弹力带把手。屈膝并蹲下，保持背部挺直，胸部抬高。从深蹲姿势开始，将弹力带把手拉向身体，双肩胛骨紧紧挤压。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height. Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the band with both hands and bring it up to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body. Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在腰部高度的坚固锚点上。站立时背对锚点，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住弹力带，将其举到胸前，肘部弯曲并贴近身体。收紧腹肌，缓慢向前卷起，将胸部靠近膝盖。在卷腹顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet. Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Pull the band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带放在脚下。双手相对握住弹力带把手，双臂伸直在前。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前倾，保持背部挺直。将弹力带拉向胸前，双肩胛骨紧贴。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，双手掌心朝前，肩膀齐平。将哑铃向上按压，直到双臂完全伸展过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回肩部水平。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet, holding the ends with your hands. Keep your arms straight and relaxed, and let the band hang in front of your thighs. Engage your traps by shrugging your shoulders upward, lifting the band as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带放在脚下，双手握住弹力带末端。保持手臂伸直放松，让弹力带悬挂在大腿前方。通过耸肩向上，尽量将弹力带抬高，从而启动斜方肌。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands, palms facing down. Extend your arms straight out to the sides, keeping them parallel to the ground. Slowly bend your elbows and bring your hands towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms still. Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arms back out to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带，掌心朝下。双臂伸直向两侧，保持与地面平行。慢慢弯曲肘部，双手向肩膀方向，保持上臂静止。暂停片刻，然后慢慢将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and bringing your chest towards the bar. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 悬挂在引体向上杆上，手掌朝外，双臂完全伸展。收紧核心，双肩胛骨紧贴。通过弯曲肘部，将胸部靠近杠铃，将身体拉向杠铃。动作顶端暂停，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Place a band around your thighs, just above your knees. Stand facing a step or platform with your feet hip-width apart. Step up onto the platform with your right foot, pushing through your heel. Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight. Lower your left foot back down to the ground. Repeat with your left foot stepping up onto the platform. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在大腿上方，刚好在膝盖上方，绑上一条弹力带。站在台阶或平台上，双脚与臀部同宽。右脚踏上平台，用脚跟推开。左腿向身后伸直，保持伸直。左脚重新落地。左脚踏上平台重复动作。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper legs. Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body. Keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent, hinge at the hips and lower the band towards the ground. Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the band. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带绕在大腿上方。双手握住弹力带，放在大腿前方，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，膝盖微弯曲，臀部弯曲，将弹力带向下放下。当弹力带放下时，感受腿后肌的拉伸感。收紧臀部和腿后肌，将身体抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward. Engage your core and press the dumbbell straight up overhead, fully extending your arm. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握着哑铃，手掌朝前。收紧核心，将哑铃直举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回肩部水平。重复至所需次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the resistance band handles in each hand, with your palms facing down and elbows bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arms forward, pushing the resistance band away from your chest. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。双手握住阻力带手柄，手掌朝下，肘部弯曲成90度角。双臂向前伸展，将阻力带从胸前推开。动作结束时暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band. Engaging your abs, lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸直，双臂举过头顶，握住弹力带。收紧腹部，同时抬起双腿和上半身，双手伸向脚趾。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿和上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Hold your hands together in front of your chest or hold a weight if desired. Lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your sit bones. Twist your torso to the right, bringing your hands or weight towards the right side of your body. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing your hands or weight towards the left side of your body. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。稍微向后倾斜，同时保持背部挺直，核心收紧。双手并拢放在胸前，或者如果需要，可以举重物。双脚抬离地面，保持在坐骨上保持平衡。将躯干向右扭转，将手或重心带向身体右侧。稍作停顿，然后将躯干向左扭转，将手或重心向身体左侧移动。继续左右交替，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height. Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band. Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height. Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms. Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly bring the band back towards your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带绕在胸前高度的坚固物体上。双手握住弹力带，离开锚点，在弹力带中产生张力。保持与固定点垂直的位置，侧面朝向弹力带。双臂伸直，保持双臂与胸前齐高。收紧核心，将弹力带从胸前推开，双臂完全伸展。保持该姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将弹力带拉回胸前。重复至所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold the band with both hands, palms facing up, and rest your forearms on your thighs. Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地上。双手握住弹力带，手掌朝上，前臂放在大腿上。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，收紧前臂。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手腕放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your body. Slowly curl your wrists upwards, bringing the barbell towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在铁匠机前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握法握杠铃，双手与肩同宽。保持背部挺直，肘部靠近身体。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将杠铃靠近身体。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by hanging from the rings with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双臂完全伸展，身体挺直悬挂在环上。通过弯曲肘部，降低身体，直到肩膀低于肘部。通过伸直手臂推自己回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet. Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight. Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees. Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted. Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带放在脚边。双手握住弹力带，手掌朝向身体，双臂保持伸直。收紧核心，保持膝盖微微弯曲。慢慢在臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。将弹力带向下放向地面，同时保持双腿伸直。在底部稍作停顿，然后收紧臀肌和腿后肌，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet. Hold the band handles at shoulder height with your palms facing forward. Engage your core and press the band overhead, fully extending your arms. As you press, twist your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable. Pause for a moment at the top, then return to the starting position. Repeat the press and twist on the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带放在脚下。将弹力带把手握在肩膀高度，手掌朝前。收紧核心，将弹力带压过头顶，双臂完全伸展。按压时，将躯干向一侧扭转，保持臀部稳定。在顶端稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。重复按压并扭转另一侧。继续交替使用，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Slowly raise the barbell in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down. Continue lifting until the barbell is slightly above shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双脚在大腿前方，用过手握法握住杠铃。保持背部挺直，收紧核心。慢慢将杠铃举起，保持手臂伸直，手掌朝下。继续举起杠铃，直到杠铃略高于肩膀。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable position for your height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards. Hold onto the handles or bars for stability. Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to raise your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将雪橇机调整到适合你身高的舒适位置。站在平台上，双脚与肩同宽，脚趾略微向外。握住把手或把手以保持稳定。通过弯曲膝盖和臀部来降低身体，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。继续下降，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。稍作停顿，然后用脚跟支撑身体，将身体抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the barbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，双手各握一个杠铃，手掌朝前。保持上臂不动，举重时呼气，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，交替双臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，采用过顶握法。保持手臂伸直，举起前方的哑铃，举过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet hip-width apart. Lift your right knee up towards your chest as high as you can while balancing on your left leg. Step forward with your right foot and lower your body into a lunge position, bending both knees to a 90-degree angle. Push off with your right foot and bring your left knee up towards your chest. Step forward with your left foot and lower your body into a lunge position. Continue alternating legs and lunging forward, keeping your core engaged and maintaining a steady pace. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与臀部同宽站立。在左腿保持平衡的同时，尽量将右膝抬向胸前。右脚向前迈步，身体下垂进入弓步姿势，双膝弯曲成90度角。用右脚蹬地，左膝抬向胸口。左脚向前迈步，身体降低进入弓步姿势。继续交替双腿并向前冲刺，保持核心发力并保持稳定的节奏。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, just below your collarbone. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, keeping your elbows up and your upper arms parallel to the ground. Lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽，杠铃放在上胸部，紧贴锁骨下方。用过顶握法握杠铃，保持肘部抬起，上臂与地面平行。通过弯曲膝盖和臀部，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，将身体降低到深蹲姿势。在深蹲底部暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip. Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，用过手握法握杠铃。将杠铃举过头顶，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂靠近头部，慢慢弯曲肘部，将杠铃放到头后。暂停片刻，然后伸展双臂将杠铃举回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach the band to a pull-up bar or sturdy anchor point. Step onto the band and grip the bar with your palms facing away from you, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your core engaged and your shoulders down and back. Pull your body up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together and driving your elbows down towards your hips. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将弹力带固定在引体向上杆或结实的锚点上。踏上弹力带，双手朝向背侧握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸展，保持核心收紧，肩膀向下和向后。通过将肩胛骨紧紧夹紧，肘部向下压向臀部，将身体拉向杠铃。继续拉直到下巴高出杠铃，然后慢慢放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand in front of a bench or step with a barbell resting on your upper back. Place one foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface. Push through your heel and step up onto the bench or step, fully extending your hip and knee. Pause briefly at the top, then lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat with the opposite leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站在长凳或台阶前，杠铃放在上背部。一只脚踩在凳子或台阶上，确保整只脚都与台面接触。用脚跟用力，踏上长凳或台阶，完全伸展髋部和膝盖。在顶端短暂停顿，然后再回到起始位置。反对腿重复。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell between your legs. Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height. As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist and punch your hand straight up, locking out your arm overhead. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握壶铃，采用上握。膝盖微微弯曲，髋部弯曲，将壶铃放到双腿之间。爆发性地伸展髋部、膝盖和脚踝，利用惯性将壶铃摆到肩膀高度。当壶铃达到肩高时，旋转手腕，手部直上，手臂锁定在头顶。将壶铃放回起始位置，重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Place a band around your upper arms, just above the elbows. Assume a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to heels. Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在上臂肘部上方绑上一条带子。做俯卧撑姿势，双手正好放在肩膀下方，身体从头到脚跟呈直线。弯曲肘部，胸部向下，保持肘部靠近身体两侧。用手掌推开手臂，然后回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。
