英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you. Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower your torso and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and chest lifted as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees. As you stand up straight, squeeze your glutes and keep your core engaged. Lower the barbell back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃放在你面前的地上。弯曲膝盖，臀部铰接，降低躯干，用过手握法握杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，胸部抬起，用脚跟将杠铃抬离地面，伸展髋部和膝盖。站直时，收紧臀肌，保持核心肌群发力。通过弯曲臀部和膝盖，保持背部挺直，将杠铃放回地面。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴着长凳。用略宽于肩宽的上手握法握住杠铃。把杠铃从架子上抬起，双臂完全伸展，直接举在胸口上方。杠铃慢慢向下放向胸部，保持肘部内收。当杠铃碰到你的胸口时，请稍作停顿。通过伸展双臂将杠铃推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs. Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step. Lower your heels as far as possible, feeling a stretch in your calves. Raise your heels as high as possible, contracting your calves. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地板上，杠铃放在大腿上。将脚掌球放在一个抬高的平台上，比如障碍物或台阶。尽量降低脚跟，感受小腿的拉伸感。尽量抬高脚跟，收缩小腿。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor. Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest. Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，头部在一端，双脚触地。握杠铃时握持与肩宽的握法，双臂伸直至胸前。将杠铃放到头后，同时保持手臂微微弯曲。暂停片刻，然后将杠铃抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Bend forward at the hips while keeping your back straight and chest up. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Pull the barbell towards your lower chest by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。臀部前倾，同时保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。用上手握法握住杠铃，双手略宽于肩宽。通过收回肩胛骨并收紧背部肌肉，将杠铃拉向下胸部。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing forward. Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 站直，双脚与肩同宽，握杠铃时用下手握法，手掌朝前。肘部靠近躯干，举重时呼气，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续抬起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on the seat facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from your hips. Pull the cable towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles. Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在座椅上，面向滑索机，双脚平放在地板上。用下手握住滑索连接件，手掌朝上，双手与肩同宽。保持背部挺直，稍微前倾，远离臀部。通过收回肩胛骨并收紧背部肌肉，将滑索拉向躯干。在收缩达到顶点时暂停片刻，然后慢慢松开滑索回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，双脚稳固，头部低于臀部。握杠铃时，握杆时握得较宽，略宽于肩宽。将杠铃放到胸前，肘部向两侧张开。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured. Hold a barbell with a wide grip and extend your arms straight above your chest. Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，头部低于臀部，双脚稳固。握杠铃时握得较宽，双臂伸直于胸前。将杠铃控制地放到头后，保持手臂伸直。稍作停顿，然后将杠铃抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs. Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell up towards your chest by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握杠铃，手掌朝上。杠铃保持臂长悬挂在大腿前方。保持上臂不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向胸口弯曲。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Place a barbell on the floor in front of you. Stand with the balls of your feet on the edge of the barbell, with your heels hanging off. Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed. Raise your heels as high as possible, using your calves to lift your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把杠铃放在你面前的地板上。脚掌掌放在杠铃边缘，脚跟悬空。如有需要，抓住稳定物体保持平衡。尽量抬高脚跟，用小腿抬起身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell in front of your chest with your hands shoulder-width apart, elbows pointing forward. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。双手与肩同宽，肘部朝前，将杠铃放在胸前。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，身体下蹲进入深蹲姿势，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。动作降低，直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用力用脚跟回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured. Hold a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest. Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms slightly bent. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by contracting your lats. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，头部低于臀部，双脚稳固。用内旋握法（手掌朝向背向外）握杠铃，双臂直伸于胸前。将杠铃控制地放到头后，保持手臂微微弯曲。稍作停顿，然后收紧背阔肌将杠铃抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your arms straight and raise the barbell in front of you until it reaches shoulder height. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Next, lower the barbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握杠铃，手掌朝下。保持双臂伸直，将杠铃举到肩膀高度。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。接着，将杠铃放到头后，保持双臂伸直。在杠铃底部暂停片刻，然后将杠铃抬回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and shoulders. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。将杠铃放在肩膀前方，放在锁骨和肩膀上。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，身体下蹲进入深蹲姿势，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。蹲下直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。在底部暂停片刻，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight. Stand on the sled machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off. Hold onto the handles for stability. Raise your heels as high as possible by pushing through the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整雪橇机的重量到一个舒适的水平。站在雪橇机上，脚趾踩在平台上，脚跟悬空。抓住手柄以保持稳定。通过用脚掌力将脚跟尽可能抬高。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down. Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在斜方肌或后三角肌上。在开始下沉身体时，收紧核心并保持胸部抬起。膝盖和臀部弯曲，像坐在椅子上一样向后和向下推臀部。将身体降低，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。保持膝盖与脚趾保持对齐，体重放在脚跟上。用脚跟踩地站起，伸展臀部和膝盖。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the barbell for stability. Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。用肘部弯曲处握住杠铃，双手握紧杠铃以保持稳定。收紧核心，保持胸部抬起，同时将臀部向后放下，进入深蹲姿势。保持膝盖与脚趾对齐，体重放在脚跟上。降低到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能低。用脚跟踩地站起，动作顶端收紧臀肌。重复至目标次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball in both hands at chest level. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Explosively extend your hips and legs, while simultaneously throwing the medicine ball overhead. Release the ball at the top of the movement and catch it on the way down. Lower your body back into the squat position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握着药球，位于胸前。膝盖微微弯曲，核心发力。身体下放进入深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，胸部抬起。爆发性地伸展臀部和双腿，同时将药球抛向头顶。在动作顶点释放球，并在下落时接住。将身体重新放回深蹲姿势，重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by lying flat on your back on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands. Engage your glutes and core muscles, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes. Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，仰卧在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地板上。将杠铃横放在臀部，双手牢牢握住。激活臀大肌和核心肌肉，然后抬起臀部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，收紧臀部。慢慢将臀部放下至起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down. Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在斜方肌或后三角肌上。在开始下沉身体时，收紧核心并保持胸部抬起。膝盖和臀部弯曲，像坐在椅子上一样向后和向下推臀部。把身体往下放，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。保持膝盖与脚趾保持对齐，体重放在脚跟上。用脚跟踩地站起，伸展臀部和膝盖。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down. Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。将杠铃横跨上背部，放在斜方肌或后三角肌上。在开始下沉身体时，收紧核心并保持胸部抬起。膝盖和臀部弯曲，像坐在椅子上一样向后和向下推臀部。将身体降低，直到大腿与地面平行或略低于地面。保持膝盖与脚趾保持对齐，体重放在脚跟上。用脚跟踩地站起，伸展臀部和膝盖。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a v-bar attachment to a cable machine at chest height. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Take a step back to create tension in the cable. Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise. Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows. As you pull, twist your torso to one side, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, feeling the contraction in your upper back. Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position, untwisting your torso. Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, alternating the twisting direction with each rep.
中文描述: 在胸前高度将V型杆连接在拉索机上。站在拉索机前，双脚与肩同宽。用上手握住V型杆，手掌朝下。后退一步以增加拉索的张力。在整个练习过程中保持背部挺直，核心保持收紧。通过收回肩胛骨并弯曲肘部，将V型杆拉向躯干。拉力时，将躯干向一侧扭转，双肩胛骨紧紧收紧。动作结束时稍作停顿，感受上背部的收缩。缓慢释放紧张，回到起始位置，松开躯干。重复该动作，达到所需的次数，每下交替扭转方向。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一张倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地上。用过手握法握杠铃，间距略大于肩宽。卸下杠铃，缓慢地将杠铃放向胸部，保持肘部保持45度角。在底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach the handles to the cables at chest height. Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot slightly in front of the other. Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides. Keep a slight bend in your elbows and engage your core. Pull the cables together in front of your chest, crossing them over each other. Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement. Slowly release the cables back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 把手柄在胸前高度固定在电缆上。站在钢丝机中央，一只脚稍微向前。手掌朝下，双臂向两侧伸展，握住把手。保持肘部微微弯曲，核心发力。把钢索拉到胸前，交叉交叉。在动作达到高潮时收紧胸肌。慢慢将钢索放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor. Hold the EZ barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, maintaining the slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the arc motion. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，头朝一端，双脚着地。握EZ杠铃时，手掌朝向背侧，双手与肩同宽。双臂伸直，直直地过胸，肘部保持轻微弯曲。将杠铃以弧形动作放到头后，保持肘部的轻微弯曲。暂停片刻，然后通过反向弧线动作将杠铃恢复到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. While keeping your legs together, lower them to one side until they are a few inches above the ground. Pause for a moment, then lift your legs back to the starting position. Repeat the movement to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺，双腿伸直，双臂垂在身侧。把手放在臀肌下方支撑。收紧腹部，抬起双腿，保持伸直。双腿并拢时，将双腿向一侧降低，直到离地面几英寸。暂停片刻，然后抬起双腿回到起始位置。把动作换到另一边。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your ankles. Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground. As you lower, push your hips back and allow your knees to bend slightly. Lower the band towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your upper body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚踝上。双手握住弹力带，放在大腿前方，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，髋部铰链，缓慢将上半身向下降低。下蹲时，将臀部向后推，膝盖微微弯曲。将弹力带放向地面，感受腿后肌的拉伸。在底部暂停片刻，然后用力臀部和腿后肌，将上半身抬回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your body, just below your waist. Step your left foot forward and your right foot back, keeping your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position. Repeat the movement, alternating your forward and back foot with each repetition.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。用过手握法握杠铃，将杠铃放在身体前方腰部下方。左脚向前迈步，右脚向后迈步，保持双脚与肩同宽。弯曲膝盖，身体下蹲，保持背部挺直，胸部挺直。用脚跟支撑，重新站回起始位置。重复动作，每次重复时交替前后脚。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴着长凳。用上手握法握杠铃，略宽于肩宽。将杠铃放到胸前，肘部紧贴身体。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip. Keep your arms straight and your core engaged. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，用上手握住拉绳把手。保持手臂伸直，核心收紧。双臂向两侧举起，直到与地面平行。在顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back resting against an incline bench. Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at a 90-degree angle with your elbow bent. Press the cable handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部靠着斜凳。一只手握住钢索把手，手臂呈90度角，肘部弯曲。将钢索把手向前并向上按压，手臂完全伸展。在钢索手柄顶部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将钢索把手放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 设置一个倾斜的长凳，呈45度角。双脚平放在地上躺下。紧握杠铃，略窄于肩宽。卸下杠铃，缓慢地向胸部放下，肘部紧贴身体。当杠铃触及胸部时暂停。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back. Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright. Lower your body by bending your right knee until your thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg, alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时，双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃放在上背部。右脚向前迈一步，保持躯干直立。通过弯曲右膝，降低身体，直到大腿与地面平行。用右脚跟用力，回到起始位置。左腿重复，交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手紧贴，正好放在肩膀下方。收紧核心，身体向下贴地，肘部靠近身体两侧。用手掌撑开双臂，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部贴在长凳末端。用过握握法握杠铃，双手与肩同宽，双臂直伸越过胸口。保持上臂静止，弯曲肘部，缓慢将杠铃向下放向额头。稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended over the edge, holding a barbell with an underhand grip. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在牧师长凳上，胸部贴着垫子，双臂伸出边缘，握着杠铃，下手握持。保持上臂静止，呼气并弯曲杠铃，同时收紧肱二头肌。继续举起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，慢慢开始将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部贴在长凳末端。用过顶握法握杠铃，双手与肩同宽，双臂直伸越过胸前。保持上臂不动，弯曲肘部，慢慢将杠铃向下放向额头。在底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your forehead, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部贴在长凳末端。用过手握法握杠铃，双手与肩同宽，双臂直伸过胸前。保持上臂静止，慢慢将杠铃向下放向额头，弯曲肘部。当杠铃刚好在额头上方时暂停，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，双脚稳固，膝盖弯曲。双手放在头后或胸前。收紧腹肌，抬起上半身，向膝盖前倾。在上半身顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复到所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your arm fully extended and palm facing inwards. Place your opposite hand on your thigh for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一只手握着哑铃，手臂完全伸展，手掌朝内。另一只手放在大腿上以提供支撑。保持上臂不动，呼气，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。继续抬起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，同时收紧肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing towards your feet. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴近长凳。双手与肩同宽，双手朝向脚部，紧握杠铃。将杠铃从架子上抬起，双臂完全伸展，正好放在胸前。慢慢将杠铃向下放向胸部，肘部紧贴身体。当杠铃触及胸部时暂停片刻，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold an EZ barbell with an underhand grip. Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Curl the barbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary. Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，握住EZ杠铃，采用下手握法。肘部放在大腿内侧，膝盖上方。将杠铃向肩膀弯曲，同时保持上臂不动。动作顶端收紧肱二头肌，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing up. Extend your arms fully, lifting the barbell above your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部贴在长凳末端。双手与肩同宽，掌心向上握紧杠铃。双臂完全伸展，将杠铃举过胸口。保持上臂不动，慢慢弯曲肘部，将杠铃向额头方向下移。在底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双手握住边缘，手指向前。将臀部从长椅上滑下，用手支撑体重。通过弯曲肘部，降低身体，使上臂与地面平行。通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with one hand, palm facing up, and extend your arm straight up over your chest. Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 仰躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。单手握住杠铃，手掌朝上，手臂直上伸过胸前。慢慢将杠铃向下放向胸部，肘部保持靠近身体。在杠铃底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, palms facing down. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell towards the ground by flexing your wrists, keeping your forearms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the barbell back up by extending your wrists. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，前臂放在大腿上，手掌朝下。用过手握法握杠铃，双手与肩同宽。通过屈曲手腕将杠铃向下放下，保持前臂不动。在杠铃底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢伸展手腕将杠铃抬回去。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in one hand with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Bend at the hips and lower the barbell towards the outside of your leg, keeping your arm straight and your chest up. Lower the barbell as far as you can while maintaining good form. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一手握杠铃，采用上手握法。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。臀部弯曲，将杠铃向下放向腿外侧，保持手臂伸直，胸部抬起。尽量将杠铃放到尽量低，同时保持良好姿势。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换侧。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel in front of you with both hands. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手举毛巾在前方。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。将毛巾拉向胸前，双肩胛骨紧贴。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松紧张，回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back. Lift one foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair, keeping your chest up and your back straight. Lower yourself until your thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃横跨上背部。抬起一只脚并向前伸展，保持与地面平行。弯曲站立腿，身体像坐回椅子一样放下，保持胸膛挺直，背部挺直。降低身体直到大腿与地面平行，然后用脚跟用力回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿，重复。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell with a wide grip, positioning it overhead with your arms fully extended. Engage your core and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外露。用宽握力握杠铃，双臂完全伸展，将杠铃置于头顶。收紧核心，身体下沉进入深蹲姿势，保持胸部抬起，膝盖与脚趾相径。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟蹬地回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by lying face down on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes touching the ground. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your core muscles and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight. Rotate your torso to one side, bringing your shoulder towards your hip. Keep your hips and legs stable throughout the movement. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the rotation to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先趴在稳定球上，双脚与肩同宽，脚趾触地。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。调动核心肌肉，缓慢地将上半身从球上抬起，保持背部挺直。将躯干向一侧旋转，肩膀靠近臀部。在整个动作过程中保持臀部和腿部稳定。停顿片刻，然后回到起始位置。重复旋转到另一侧。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，双手握杠铃，手掌朝上。将前臂放在长凳上，让手腕悬挂在边缘。保持前臂静止，呼气并尽量将手腕向上弯曲。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor. Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner until you feel a stretch in your lats. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，头朝一端，双脚着地。用肩宽握法握杠铃，双臂伸直至胸前。保持手臂伸直，控制性地将杠铃放到头后，直到你感觉背阔肌被拉伸。稍作停顿，然后将杠铃举回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，单手握哑铃，握持中性。臀部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将哑铃拉向胸口，肘部靠近身体，肩胛骨紧贴。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise the barbell out to the sides, keeping your arms straight, until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，手持杠铃，手掌朝下。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。将杠铃向两侧抬起，保持手臂伸直，直到与地面平行。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the ground. Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in an arc-like motion until you feel a stretch in your lats. Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and press the barbell back to the starting position above your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，头朝一端，双脚着地。用内旋握法握杠铃（手掌朝外），双臂直伸到胸前。保持手臂伸直，将杠铃以弧形动作放到头后，直到你感觉背阔肌被拉伸。暂停片刻，然后反向将杠铃按回胸部上方的起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Slowly lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbells close to your chest. Once you are fully lying down, extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在斜坡凳上，双手各拿一个哑铃，哑铃放在大腿上。慢慢地躺回长凳上，保持哑铃靠近胸口。完全躺下后，双臂直伸向天花板，肘部微微弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 躺在下坡凳上，双脚稳固，头部低于臀部。反向握法握杠铃，稍宽于肩宽。松开杠铃，缓慢将杠铃放下，肘部收紧。在底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至目标次数。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad. Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整机器到你想要的高度，并把膝盖固定在垫子上。手掌朝下，双臂完全伸展，握住手柄。通过弯曲肘部，使身体向下，直到上臂与地面平行。暂停片刻，然后将自己推回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs. Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step. Position the barbell across your thighs and hold it securely with your hands. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, lift your heels off the ground by extending your ankles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，杠铃放在大腿上。将脚掌球放在一个抬高的平台上，比如障碍物或台阶。将杠铃横放在大腿上，用双手牢牢握住。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，伸展脚踝，抬起脚跟离地。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with a close grip behind your neck, palms facing forward. Keep your elbows close to your head and slowly lower the barbell towards the back of your head. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地上。握紧杠铃，紧握颈部后方，手掌朝前。保持肘部靠近头部，慢慢将杠铃向下放到头后。暂停片刻，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Take a large step forward with one leg, keeping your torso upright. Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, while keeping your back leg straight. Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃横跨上背部。单腿向前迈出大步，保持躯干直立。通过弯曲前膝和臀部，身体下放，同时保持后腿伸直。继续下蹲，直到前大腿与地面平行。暂停片刻，然后用前脚跟推回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换腿。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Take a large step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright. Lower your body by bending your knees and hips until your right thigh is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg forward for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽，将杠铃横跨上背部。右脚迈出大步，保持躯干直立。通过弯曲膝盖和臀部，使右大腿与地面平行，降低身体。暂停片刻，然后用右脚跟用力回归起始位置。左腿向前重复，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with an overhand grip. Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双脚双肩齐开，杠铃用上手握法举在肩前。将杠铃压在头顶，双臂完全伸展。把杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with your right hand and step back to create tension in the cable. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Keep your upper arm close to your body and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your forearm backward, straightening your arm fully. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 站在一台有线电视机前，双脚与肩同宽。用右手握住钢索把手，后退以增加钢索的张力。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向前折叠，保持背部挺直。保持上臂靠近身体，肘部弯曲成90度角。将前臂向后伸展，完全伸直手臂。暂停片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Attach a rope to a cable machine and set the pulley at the highest position. Lie down on a bench with your head towards the cable machine. Hold the rope with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the rope behind your head while maintaining control. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the rope back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将绳索连接到钢索机上，并将滑轮调到最高位置。躺在长凳上，头朝向拉索机。双手握住绳索，双臂直伸至胸前。保持双臂伸直，慢慢将绳子放到头后，同时保持控制。在底部稍作停留，然后慢慢将绳索拉回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent. Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 在胸部高度将绳子连接到钢索机上。站立时背对机器，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳子，把绳子放在头后，肘部弯曲。收紧腹肌，缓慢地将躯干向前收缩，肘部向膝盖方向。在碎块顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down and arm fully extended. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by flexing your elbow. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
中文描述: 站直，一手拿哑铃，手掌朝下，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂不动，通过弯曲肘部将哑铃向肩膀弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需次数，然后换手臂。

英文描述: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长椅或椅子上，双脚平放在地上。双手各握一个哑铃，双手掌心朝下，采用过顶握法。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬挂在边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，将哑铃拉向身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso. Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上。保持背部挺直，肘部靠近躯干。呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，收缩肱二头肌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh. Raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body. Rotate your forearm outward, away from your body, while keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your forearm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，一只手握着哑铃，放在大腿上。将哑铃举到肩膀高度，肘部保持靠近身体。前臂向外旋转，远离身体，同时保持上臂不动。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将前臂旋转回起始位置。重复到所需的次数，然后切换到另一只手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip. Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，用上握住EZ杠铃。将杠铃举过头顶，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂靠近头部，弯曲肘部慢慢将杠铃放到头后。稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position. As you squat down, bring your knees up towards your chest and hug them with your arms. Hold this position for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立，双脚与肩同宽。弯曲膝盖，身体下沉进入深蹲姿势。蹲下时，将膝盖抬向胸前，用手臂抱住膝盖。保持这个姿势片刻，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复到所需的次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointed slightly outward. Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended. Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, pushing your butt back. Swing the kettlebell back between your legs, keeping your arms straight and maintaining a flat back. Drive your hips forward and swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height, using the momentum generated by your hips. Allow the kettlebell to swing back down between your legs and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾稍微向外伸出。双手举壶铃，双手举在身体前方，双臂伸展。膝盖微微弯曲，臀部向后扭转，臀部向后推。将壶铃摆回双腿之间，保持双臂伸直，保持背部平坦。将髋部向前推，利用髋部产生的惯性将壶铃摆到肩膀高度。让壶铃再次摆回双腿之间，重复该动作，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position. Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder. Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 开始时跪姿，双手放在地上，肩宽。双腿向后伸展，脚尖着地，身体抬起进入平板支撑姿势。保持核心收紧，臀部稳定，抬起一只手，轻拍另一侧肩膀。把手放回地面，另一只手重复。继续左右交替练习，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Push off with your right foot and jump into the air, switching the position of your feet mid-air. Land softly with your left foot forward and immediately lower your body into a lunge position. Continue alternating between lunges and jumps for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先站立时双脚与肩同宽。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。用右脚蹬地，跳跃起来，在空中交换双脚的位置。左脚轻轻落地，立即将身体放下进入弓步姿势。继续在弓步和跳跃之间交替，达到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet. While maintaining the side plank position, lift your top leg towards the ceiling, keeping it straight. Slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
中文描述: 先侧卧，双腿伸展并叠放在一层。用前臂支撑身体，肘部保持在肩膀正下方。收紧核心，抬起臀部，从头部到脚部形成一条直线。保持侧板支撑姿势的同时，将上腿抬向天花板，保持伸直。慢慢把腿放回起始位置。重复到想要的次数，然后换边。

英文描述: Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level. Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees. Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 调整器械到你想要的辅助水平。站在脚台上，用上手握把，间距略宽于肩宽。保持胸部抬起，肩膀后挺，收紧核心，稍微弯曲膝盖。通过弯曲肘部，将肘部向下拉起身体。继续拉，直到下巴高于杠铃。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest. Slowly lift your legs up, keeping them straight, until your body is parallel to the ground. Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 先用过手握法悬挂在引体向上杠上，双手略宽于肩宽。收紧核心，将肩胛骨向下和向后拉。弯曲膝盖，向胸前收起。慢慢抬起双腿，保持伸直，直到身体与地面平行。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Slowly lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长椅上，双脚平放在地上，背部贴着长凳。用反握法握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。把杠铃从架子上抬起，双臂完全伸展，直接举在胸口上方。慢慢将杠铃向下放向胸部，保持肘部靠近身体。当杠铃刚好在你胸口上方时，暂停一下。将杠铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝上。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬挂在边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯曲，动作顶端用力收紧前臂。暂停片刻，然后将手腕放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽，脚趾微微外翻。将杠铃放在上背部，放在斜方肌上。开始深蹲时，收紧核心并保持胸部抬起，向后推臀并弯曲膝盖。把身体往下放，直到大腿与地面平行，或者尽可能低。用脚跟踩地站起，伸展臀部和膝盖。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，杠铃放在颈后，用上手握法握住。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。通过伸展双臂，肘部完全伸展，将杠铃压在头顶。在杠铃顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Lie flat on your back on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip and position it on your hips. Engaging your glutes, lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。用过手握法握杠铃，将其放在臀部。激活臀部，抬起臀部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm extended down towards the floor. Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
中文描述: 双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度角，坐在稳定球上。一只手握着哑铃，手掌朝上，手臂向下伸展。肘部放在大腿内侧，膝盖上方。保持上臂不动，呼气，将哑铃向肩膀弯曲，同时收紧肱二头肌。动作顶端稍作停顿，吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复至所需次数，然后换臂重复。

英文描述: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. As you push back up, lift your right hand off the ground and tap your left shoulder. Return your right hand to the ground and repeat the push-up, this time lifting your left hand and tapping your right shoulder. Continue alternating shoulder taps with each push-up repetition. Maintain a stable core and avoid excessive hip rotation throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 从高平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽，身体从头到脚跟保持直线。通过弯曲肘部，保持靠近身体两侧，身体向下。向上推时，右手离地，轻敲左肩。右手回放地面，重复俯卧撑，这次抬起左手，轻敲右肩。每次俯卧撑重复交替拍肩。保持核心稳定，避免过度旋转髋部。重复至所需次数。

英文描述: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and one hand placed slightly wider than the other. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight. As you lower yourself, shift your weight to one side and lift the opposite arm off the ground, extending it straight out to the side. Push through your chest and triceps to raise your body back up to the starting position, while simultaneously lowering your extended arm back to the ground. Repeat the movement, alternating the arm you extend with each repetition.
中文描述: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，一只手略宽。收紧核心，弯曲肘部，保持背部挺直，身体向下降低。降低身体时，将重心转向一侧，抬起另一只手臂，伸直向侧面。通过胸部和三头肌发力，将身体抬回起始位置，同时将伸出的手臂放回地面。重复此动作，每次重复时交替伸出的手臂。

英文描述: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a weight in front of your chest with both hands, or place a barbell across your upper back. Keeping your chest up and your core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾略微向外。双手将重物放在胸前，或将杠铃放在上背部。保持胸部抬起，核心收紧，缓慢地通过膝盖和臀部弯曲身体来降低身体。继续下蹲，直到大腿与地面平行或尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后用脚跟支撑回到起始位置。重复到所需的重复次数。

英文描述: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders. Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward. Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off. Hold onto the bar for support, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
中文描述: 将史密斯机杆调整到肩膀下方的高度。站立时面向杠铃，双脚与臀部同宽，脚趾朝前。脚掌掌放在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空。握紧杠杆以支撑，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。尽量抬高脚跟，将身体重量抬到脚掌掌上。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。
